name: Sara (personal)
subject: Are you with me in the fight for reproductive freedom?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, later this month we’ll mark one year since the Supreme Court’s ruling in Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization - the ruling that overturned Roe v. Wad e.
But that ruling didn’t just overturn Roe.
For so many of us, the Dobbs ruling overturned our lives and our futures. It shattered the way we think about our bodies and our rights.
And it transformed how many of us engage in the political process. We saw truly incredible passion and action last November in the midterm elections - a direct result of the anger and fear that the Dobbs ruling created. Thanks to that action and those votes, we kept Democratic control of the Senate and came pretty darn close to holding the House, despite predictions of a major red wave across the board.
Now - as we’re watching state legislatures enact brutal and extreme abortion bans around the country - is the time to hold onto that passion and action.
So I have to ask: Are you with me in the fight for reproductive freedom? Add your name to my petition today if I can count on your support in this battle. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/swGgRUanwkaCan87HlPqoQ2]
We may be over a year out from our next federal elections, but I can tell you that the folks who are trying to push extreme anti-choice and anti-abortion laws aren’t wasting a single moment of this time - so we can’t afford to, either.
I’m doing everything I can inside the House to fight for bodily autonomy and human rights - from pushing to codify Roe to reintroducing my reproductive and sexual health data privacy legislation, the My Body, My Data Act , which prevents our private data from being used against us.
But I need to know you’re by my side - not just next November, but right now .
Sign my petition to keep fighting for reproductive freedom and the right to access safe abortion care. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/swGgRUanwkaCan87HlPqoQ2]
Thank you so much.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: The world has lost one of its leading lights
body:
Listen now (5 min) | Daniel Ellsberg played a key role in ending a fraudulent war 50 years ago. Who will stop the next one?
| |
---|---|---
| | | [Open in app](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/the-world-has-lost-one-of-its-leading?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store) or [online](https://substack..Ob-FdCMvTNqCNITHMnmEDn3C9ZYEGpczQg8PXodoH4o?)
---
[](https://substack..Ob-FdCMvTNqCNITHMnmEDn3C9ZYEGpczQg8PXodoH4o?)
---
---
| |
Jun 19
---
[The world has lost one of its leading lights](https://substack..Ob-FdCMvTNqCNITHMnmEDn3C9ZYEGpczQg8PXodoH4o?)
Daniel Ellsberg played a key role in ending a fraudulent war 50 years ago. Who will stop the next one?
| | [Listen to preview](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=129323761&utm_source=podcast-email&play_audio=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI5MzIzNzYxLCJpYXQiOjE2ODcxMzcxMTQsImV4cCI6MTY4OTcyOTExNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LZ_tLQVfF7TeAOV_cYRNrt9JtL-1Mno1ig5zutUNugU&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email#play)|
---|---|---
---
---
[](https://substack.com/profile/15484941-shahid-buttar)| | Shahid Buttar| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=129323761&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI5MzIzNzYxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY4NzEzNzExNCwiZXhwIjoxNjg5NzI5MTE0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Kgm-0Gis1lNL4ZjuWnwu7q6xgoiM5DT2LDia9FUbyMw&utm_medium=email&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=129323761&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI5MzIzNzYxLCJpYXQiOjE2ODcxMzcxMTQsImV4cCI6MTY4OTcyOTExNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LZ_tLQVfF7TeAOV_cYRNrt9JtL-1Mno1ig5zutUNugU&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=129323761&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI5MzIzNzYxLCJpYXQiOjE2ODcxMzcxMTQsImV4cCI6MTY4OTcyOTExNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LZ_tLQVfF7TeAOV_cYRNrt9JtL-1Mno1ig5zutUNugU)
50 years ago, [a saga more dramatic than any fiction](https://substack.cc/redirect/8a2592cc-e604-4ce3-807a-d370b20f26dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) gripped the entire world as a military whistleblower fought the Nixon administration over the public's right to know the real story about the fraudulent war on Vietnam.
As [the Pentagon Papers ](https://substack.cc/redirect/7fd3d2ae-f3d3-4055-8fe2-d2932881bb4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)revealed years of government lies, newspaper editors around the country mobilized to inform the public, organizing across over a dozen newspapers to counter an aggressive campaign by Nixon's Department of Justice to guard the official narrative--based on lies--that enabled the war and its grotesque escalation.
| [](https://substack.cc/redirect/d82dd176-a6e4-4084-bd6c-f4eb10770933?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This history is not only recent, but also crucially relevant to [a continuing pattern of bipartisan Pentagon lies](https://substack.cc/redirect/ebb0dc9d-10a1-4aa1-99b1-9b284d98eb75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) enabling the wars on both Iraq and Afghanistan, as well as a new generation of lies enabling escalating conflicts in eastern Europe and Asia.
In the years since Ellsberg helped bring down Nixon, American newspaper editors [lost their independence](https://substack.cc/redirect/c321a3f9-88db-4d1f-be01-4b81c9f6df92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to a combination of consolidation across the media landscape, predation by private equity, and the rise of access journalism and corresponding unwillingness to risk compromising relationships with government sources.
The result is a more or less useless, co-opted press corps that, despite the protections of the First Amendment, might as well be state-controlled. Journalists in the United States have generally reduced themselves to propagandists, sycophants entirely too willing to defer to government lies enabling military industrial corruption over and over again.
The collapse of journalism in the United States is one reason why the legacy of Daniel Ellsberg is so important today. Washington's bipartisan prosecution of publisher Julian Assange for the "crime" of revealing Pentagon lies is another. Washington's relentless thirst for [excuses to sell weapons](https://substack.cc/redirect/05932f26-5bc5-432a-b5f5-744d198b72f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) offers a third. Together, they indicate why it could be so important--especially to the international community and the historical record--for the Nobel Peace Prize committee to grant Daniel Ellsberg the international recognition that he has long deserved.
[Sign the petition on change.org!](https://substack.cc/redirect/8a2592cc-e604-4ce3-807a-d370b20f26dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Beyond acknowledging the incomparable contributions of a world historical figure, that recognition could play a key role in educating Americans--most importantly newspaper journalists and editors--about the crucial role of transparency in lending legitimacy to the government's actions. It would highlight the dire need to protect transparency in an era when whistleblowers (and now, even publishers) face escalating retaliation, as severe as prosecution for espionage, simply for performing their constitutional function of informing the public.
I'm grateful to have met Daniel Ellsberg and to have [spoken alongside](https://substack.cc/redirect/987e3421-ddd5-476e-b3c0-334fc72e0835?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) him. He remained brilliant, lucid, and indescribably encyclopedic throughout his long and illustrious life. As a figure who has done more to expose and challenge military industrial corruption in Washington than anyone else in U.S. history, we all owe him a unique and profound debt.
My newsletter aims to expose bipartisan corruption from Washington, DC to San Francisco. This post is public, so feel free to share it.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=129323761&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI5MzIzNzYxLCJpYXQiOjE2ODcxMzcxMTQsImV4cCI6MTY4OTcyOTExNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LZ_tLQVfF7TeAOV_cYRNrt9JtL-1Mno1ig5zutUNugU)
Paid subscribers can access my review of the documentary film about Ellsberg nominated for an Oscar in 2010.
Thanks for reading--and please [sign the petition](https://substack.cc/redirect/fccb7604-595e-44a4-9489-29dc695cebb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the Nobel Peace Prize committee if you haven't already!...

name: Special Elections Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Re-electing Justin Jones and Justin Pearson will deal a huge blow to the GOP →
body:
You won’t believe what just happened. TN Republican legislators and their allies flooded Rep. Jones’ opponent with HUGE donations (up to $1,000+) ahead of this month’s special election primary. | | |
---

He officially launched his campaign to be the next United States senator for West Virginia - and I was right by his side!

I usually only ask for treats (and the occasional belly rub), but I wanted to ask you for something even MORE important today. **[Will you please fill out an important questionnaire](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=37018ac0183f483eb9ffa856ae3330f7&_e=oXHzNp6wRSdLdfXErdqVWt_DgtOELQcnMCk5uBCntGVt3GkMtZ49R1VDK261aHdtqXd9huOVZYwyb1Tf375FF9U5it1B2AbAY4stWxbF3uDjSV0Y4VGaJIRzMeg1dxznsOLZkcye44FPThqR0Wd_l_G8jsGtBjy7ql2mJJq9zhTzlrsxbFDGPou8bxDD9ztH_Skd1-jGuZaq6-CTaHvGQMTkB4zyEhYU4wkn6YNsg9VEIisPtevnuS58CODfCKo53L-eltLQpaMexj3eQvkb508kopQ7bRRLp-k-QfJynP1B1r-ytNbSkUVD7wkUdlO9PtEw01QklBPdWYH3K8pJ966e_3t1cZZoMZaecVoRXXlscrs3naigc-YWKe4pYJbsEphSCP002LFaIHDNLDACXHEX93N3doLvj_vaAodIkeEIun3JCMYBM7sYE7BtFkB1qrimvjkiI45sUM-1niBElX7pnqjY5RL5f-hzjArtHyC_YQTkDBwo4arZUNN9cCsWKSXhadE8hFRyFoQD0oyc9zfomvs5nB8t014Idk5ZSYoV_PJcQx6b5lXNCrayTylq7eavIToMjM3L6GH5i-N6qw%3D%3D)** my Dad and his team will use to flip this Senate seat Republican for the first time since 1959?

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

subject: Senator Chase is the real leader on school choice

body:
-New campaign video-
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NCnmzoQb2om8g6Uv9srJlq-b5Xn_tZatPxiOae2BniT1vXX9XXL_93By4vgctxFCDQqZ0uK6thCbLRTaL7v7E08doY8FwfJ5ia9xF778yOt37HFmmXynY3zU2JhLDo_zGTvoiKIrLVozaPeULFCvXUkXoQfGChaM8NLnAiQNk9M=&c=pJVnj83JKPALKmPUK2O0RK7IYqnCkB1ElFZl3Ri9B2x2gMMqwYUtLg==&ch=vZlKQHiVZl55oJIyDpomRX9ZA6LIMb6ZEtBWgqAtOJXusAwvhDtosQ==)
---
---
| AS A FORMER HOMESCHOOL MOM YOU KNOW I'M PRO-SCHOOL CHOICE
---
| Dear Friends, Please WATCH this video. While others talk about school choice, I've actually done it.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NCnmzoQb2om8g6Uv9srJlq-b5Xn_tZatPxiOae2BniT1vXX9XXL_94XHfw08z7ejMCQYdPFwSH50tr34QBV-qcKw_HrixjT81jrBeeGMgKcCD5CliEIpcTdPJZcDKvNfoeIeSOPH5nFej3naC6E9VBywTNzvy8kXZQyu7DFQXR8=&c=pJVnj83JKPALKmPUK2O0RK7IYqnCkB1ElFZl3Ri9B2x2gMMqwYUtLg==&ch=vZlKQHiVZl55oJIyDpomRX9ZA6LIMb6ZEtBWgqAtOJXusAwvhDtosQ==)
---
You can count on me to support school choice in Virginia. I have an 8 year voting record that shows I've supported every school choice bill that's come before me, including sponsoring legislation supporting Educational Savings Accounts, Charter Schools and the Tebow Bill.
We homeschooled our 4 children for 8 years, educated them in a private Christian School and later in a public high school.
Parents need more choice, not less. We're tired of the cookie cutter one size fits all educational system that is determined to indoctrinate our kids into leftist woke ideology. If parents do choose to send their children to school, they should still be in the driver's seat, not the back seat.
We need to protect our children's innocence and not allow politics to dictate their safety and well-being.
Parents know their students best and should have more choice, not less. A child's zip code shouldn't determine their level of education. You can continue to count on me to champion school choice in Virginia.
For God & Country, Amanda Chase
---

name: American Defense News
subject: Biden's Digital Dollar Gives Government Total Control
body:
The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.

| |
# **Financial Freedom in America**
# **will soon be gone!**

**The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.** On November 15th, 2022, the Federal Reserve announced they are now testing the **'digital dollar'.** They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo. **And you should be scared!** The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government. They'll be able to....
* **Know what's in your accounts and what you buy**

name: LindseyGraham.com
subject: FLASH POLL: Your choice for the 2024 Presidential candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Help shape the Republican game plan for 2024 by sharing your thoughts on potential candidates. |
---
Fellow American, 2024 is just around the corner.

It's crucial that Republicans quickly make our game plan for next year, and we need your input to complete it.

Undoing the damage caused by Joe Biden and the Democrats requires a strong leader in the White House. [**Fellow American, who do you think is the strong conservative leader that can put our country back on track?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61936924:WxxAlzDNl:m:1:877327319:7458839282BB72C93AAE146FA896636F:r)

Since we last reached out, several new Republicans have declared their candidacy for the Republican Presidential nomination. We want to know if your opinion has changed now that more people have entered the race.

We need to hear your voice. [**Are you supporting the same Republican candidate?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61936924:WxxAlzDNl:m:1:877327319:7458839282BB72C93AAE146FA896636F:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61936924:WxxAlzDNl:m:1:877327319:7458839282BB72C93AAE146FA896636F:r)

_(In alphabetical order)_

2. Governor Chris Christie (NJ)

4. Larry Elder
5. Ambassador Nikki Haley
6. Governor Asa Hutchinson (AR)
7. Vice President Mike Pence
8. Vivek Ramaswamy
9. Senator Tim Scott
10. Mayor Francis Suarez
11. President Donald J. Trump

Your opinion regarding these Presidential candidates is vital. **Republicans like you are the key to sending a true conservative leader to the White House.**

[**Take a moment to participate in the Team Graham Flash Poll and share your opinion now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61936924:WxxAlzDNl:m:1:877327319:7458839282BB72C93AAE146FA896636F:r)

Thank you for your valuable input!

Sincerely,

Team Graham Polling

name: Doug Burgum
subject: Woke was what you did at 5am to start the day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doug Burgum for America
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs6rjEzDxN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os6rjEzDxN

Friend,

Where we come from, "woke" was what you did at 5am to
start the day.

Nowadays, most campaigns focus on fundraising with "woke"
principles to cater to the whims of the radical Left rather than
fighting against it.

Our campaign is different: we run on small-town
commonsense.

We fought and won against the Democrats in 2016 and 2020
for the North Dakota Governorship, so we're already running on a
record of real results which speak for themselves.

Now, we need to win in 2024.

We hope to use as little time as possible in this
campaign on fundraising so we can focus on real changes for
patriots like YOU. To get there, we must first secure our spot on
the debate stage in August by reaching 40,000 donors.

Can you help us get on the debate stage by chipping in $2
or more today?

Chip in $2 today →

Why just $2 or more? This amount may seem small, yet just
$2 or more from every patriot who reads this message is enough to
SECURE our spot on the debate stage this August.

Chip in $2 today →

Please chip in $2 or MORE to help our campaign reach the
debate stage and reverse Joe Biden's agenda in 2024. >>

With gratitude,

Doug Burgum

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Can you handle the truth? I think you can.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I’d rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ze1dsboam6nnaa0l7d500j0fcqiq6oe5oc3p8lbo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5jmdojfdbjcgqn2ohmeepnas736so67c77m8on0sdic6p7acbn61ojccrmmmoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3collm3g74sb6e4rj6p37m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm1pr4ctie6o30s8iv0)
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

| |

---
| | | Today, I want to talk to you about the truth.

The unadorned, unvarnished truth.

The truth is important.

_Without the truth, we cannot order society.
Without the truth, we cannot survive as human beings.
Without the truth, we cannot thrive as human beings. _

_**[Can you handle the truth? I think you can.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zev3m93j5ln442lrumiich9tgq610r3vnuq46s0o_rp22sh2s8i66o77chjm9or0c3h2bs "Can you handle the truth? I think you can.")**_

The truth is, I think it's important to speak your mind. So I do. Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me.

This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

**So here 's the truth:** The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it's leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America.

**Here 's the solution:** We must DEFEAT the Democrats at _**every level**_ of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats' woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity.

**Here 's how we'll WIN: **This all starts with YOU, Friend. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. They were outraised last quarter by $12M, so we cannot afford for a single patriot to sideline themselves.

_**[Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1mbh43cv8uuse18f380t54687efb853kuil4lao_rp22sh2s8i66o77chjm9or0c3h2bs "Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.")**_
---
| | | [INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0am2m3bgrlt1g98eq4036bv21o1dg9mtpsifoko_rp22sh2s8i66o77chjm9or0c3h2bs "INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12")
---
Thanks for listening to me, I hope you take what I said to heart and take action right away.

**The future of our country is counting on you. **

Thanks,
John Kennedy
(R-Louisiana)

---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjvpoql7p8m8ck2jn8ibb2tdnm0l838jg0ft9dho_rp22sh2s8i66o77chjm9or0c3h2bs "John Kennedy")

Donald Trump leads Joe Biden by 45% to 39% in the latest Harvard CAP-Harris monthly poll, taken in the week after Trump was indicted by a federal grand jury over his handling of classified documents.

# MONDAY, JUNE 19, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today marks the anniversary of the very first baseball game played under recognizably modern rules. On June 19, 1846, the New York Nine beat the Hoboken Baseball Club 23-1 in Hoboken. Mercifully, the game ended after four innings. Today, we're talking about President Biden excusing the Chinese for sending a spy balloon over the U.S., a new Texas law banning DEI offices in state-funded universities, and the hunt to find a collectible 'Lord of the Rings' card worth $2 million.

Have thoughts on what we can do better? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! ## Majority Feels Trump Charges are Political
Donald Trump [leads Joe Biden](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu6yAUgOGngY0IDgTCwHAXb7lrRwvjg6ECg2ySKG9fpXPnf_ik_-s-330ued_--4puxDb7MPITZ66ZsAzkDHR1ERFQUnRC34wwCvSNJieF9VrwiD7aZZVBg1LojTV24bcQV5odcJBcCys4F9Je9DUEuVw9DzYGNJIojmse7bh8t7yPhLG82xOPS2iVFpfG6CeR_whMBKaRMOVSPo3AlFrFHV8ngSn42n3edgKT4lclhWHjeNTOFvTjZEtecWfLm2nWP8rJ8s6Ag2LVj5AenfVWCoGJHm7tr1xKPrUhim_V51-Ojr_P_AQAAP__OgJkqg) 45% to 39% in the latest Harvard CAP-Harris monthly poll, taken in the week after Trump was indicted by a federal grand jury over his handling of classified documents. The survey also shows that 55 percent of Americans believe [the indictment is politically motivated](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGuqzAQRL_GdEbGBhMKitfQ5bW3RMt6HTYyGDkbovz9VVLfcqQZzdH5uc5X4MT77T9sNErMM6DwSbPxuhm0dbOtwhiJLLmKxsZf-qZvrb9U6-haswAYDMPQeYxIvvP9MkA0LVqIS8WjNdYZ3wyNMY0bat8huqUDg0NE6p1qDQWWXOp75l1WiumdTyo15q1K4ypyPJT7p-yk7HTPO8gKuzxLonedy03Z6XOg7GS8slNzUXZaoZxQgj5ySrrr9EEFaRedo5aV9PFcEqM-mV7fLOW5HZr3wCjbpwePz5SFEVJ66y0LnyAUlJ2qMobjxSnxw_eqNbcNOH1R5W9zvwEAAP__R9Fxug), and 56 percent view it as election interference.

One reason: 65 percent believe President Biden also mishandled classified documents, while 72 percent take that view with Hillary Clinton's email scandal.
## Controversial 2024 Primary Dates Set
Democrats selected Feb. 24 for their [first primary in South Carolina](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O8yAQAJ_G7oj4M4SC4mvc5WuvtJZliTlhY2GSKG9_ytVXjqYZzddtuUEueb__h418T3UB7PlJCzdMOCbVIsfoE5EkNZIX5mqF1dJcx9VboXS8WgAt0OkYVIwYAk4OjJAQxJi95FJxI5zgXCh3MROiChNwdAnJqkFzirnXdvmuee8rpfKuT2oXrNtY_Nr7cQ7q3yDnQc5w7PQ6P-oDrWcsNMj5rI--MoRWS96BNToeoWSEnR0tb9DeTHKpmSFK3Dly0UCCIEyEpCjiNBmDVqix-Xi8cin5NHbQ_L5BLr8d_e8tPwEAAP__aZpj3Q), setting up a battle with New Hampshire and other states that historically have gone earlier.

The party agreed to give [New Hampshire until Sept. 1 ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOqzAQRb_GdKCZsWND4eI1dHntlsgxQ5iVwchYQfn7Vbbe5lZXOkfn6z7dgyTZn__Dxr4ueQqxyosnsC0OLemJmtkvzMS6YY-2d-gM2b5Z_TADQm9iWGJvH-YRAR0iOozWLKxdI56ANFgcEAD10NlbjPpxCxCHJbLTygDPUnPpvrPsdeUlvfOLSxfz1iS_1nqcSv9TNCoar-vqjpykSsyfg6Jx5-tUNH4oikawikb8zMxbjiXUsyUg0-58tWvYjnOVwu1RZAvl3QIgkHHYFD8fl6Qkp3XKwHMLkn4N6t9BfgIAAP__cB9e-g)to comply with the new primary calendar, but N.H. politicians have refused to budge on voting first. Iowa and Georgia are also considering their options.

If New Hampshire does go first, President Biden won't be on the ballot, but longshot candidates Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Marianne Williamson are and could win the first Democratic primary.
## Wyndham Clark Wins US Open
Wyndham Clark, a golfer who had never finished better [than 75th in a major tournament,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8Gb1jwsMEMDF3Y0rWjRfBzTIrBAhrLf1-lc-fTSaf7us03F2JIj0-3o2lrnp1v4YUzk5RrCmKGbjErIqDo0HA5Ka4GkFO3Ge6Y1HBX6J3SOMCKMIkF-MjdyLQcumCAgWCSa84YF7qXo_fiPjrm9epRCTIwXELLpX_mkNqGa7zyC0vv895Fs7V2VCI-CFgC9jzPHuuR3pCAfeS4ErC15XIRsDMBGxYCVqhJSaXZ27jSsrmd-ujKN-WMniFV-lNpPjBRTuuWG-W1Ue8KYqG7e-bSFbMcZ4gxVKnIwB67C_EvqP3_5zcAAP__anFlQg) held off the best golfers in the world to win the US Open Sunday at Los Angeles Country Club.

Though challenged at various times by [Rickie Fowler, Rory McIlroy ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7Fu6yAUgOGngQ0LDg6EgeEu3nLXjhaGQ0yLITI0KG9fpXPnf_j0f9zWm0s5lft_d6Dtsa7O9_TElSsmDAO5Ag02IgJKilaoqxZ6BnWlu93mCN4IJaLRYTMbbEJdo-FBXUCrONNkgYPkShjBuZBmUhfv5XZx3JvoUUsycwyp13P6rKn0HWN-1Seek68HzXbv_dGI_EdgIbCMMaaW3onAcq85ElgKjvZOrxJ2dzCf3fnFRiqNvWX2zRqrDyz0tOExUs6pKU1mfj9cyr9I__v5JwAA___LBFeX)(who finished second) and Scottie Scheffler (the top player in World Golf rankings), Clark held on to win by one stroke.

➤**WNBA star** Brittney Griner will fly charter for the rest of the 2023 season after being harassed while waiting for a commercial flight. The WNBA approved the rules change to allow Griner and, most likely, the whole Phoenix Mercury team to use a charter jet service. The loss came on the same weekend the team angered many by honoring a group of anti-Catholic "drag nuns." It was Morant's second suspension: He did the same thing in March and received an 8-game suspension. ➤**Stocks** slipped lower Friday, ending six straight days of gains, but the week was still the best the three major exchanges have had since March. clean_body: Donald Trump leads Joe Biden by 45% to 39% in the latest Harvard CAP-Harris monthly poll, taken in the week after Trump was indicted by a federal grand jury over his handling of classified documents. | | | | | | MONDAY, JUNE 19, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today marks the anniversary of the very first baseball game played under recognizably modern rules. On June 19, 1846, the New York Nine beat the Hoboken Baseball Club 23-1 in Hoboken. Mercifully, the game ended after four innings. Today, we're talking about President Biden excusing the Chinese for sending a spy balloon over the U.S., a new Texas law banning DEI offices in state-funded universities, and the hunt to find a collectible 'Lord of the Rings' card worth $2 million. Have thoughts on what we can do better? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover, and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying The Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Majority Feels Trump Charges are Political Donald Trump 45% to 39% in the latest Harvard CAP-Harris monthly poll, taken in the week after Trump was indicted by a federal grand jury over his handling of classified documents. The survey also shows that 55 percent of Americans believe , and 56 percent view it as election interference. One reason: 65 percent believe President Biden also mishandled classified documents, while 72 percent take that view with Hillary Clinton's email scandal. Controversial 2024 Primary Dates Set Democrats selected Feb. 24 for their , setting up a battle with New Hampshire and other states that historically have gone earlier. The party agreed to give comply with the new primary calendar, but N.H. politicians have refused to budge on voting first. Iowa and Georgia are also considering their options. If New Hampshire does go first, President Biden won't be on the ballot, but longshot candidates Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Marianne Williamson are and could win the first Democratic primary. Wyndham Clark Wins US Open Wyndham Clark, a golfer who had never finished better held off the best golfers in the world to win the US Open Sunday at Los Angeles Country Club. Though challenged at various times by finished second) and Scottie Scheffler (the top player in World Golf rankings), Clark held on to win by one stroke. [Medal of Honor Monday: Army Lt. Col. William J. O’Brien](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhgt3218n1kih0o1cdsbefss2bds7nkv9u85i48o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f833cui69pt5mkoj8cdlkupjb85nmerr4td5mupr2d1kumi34tdkumgr2td66uorb9rkm6or9d1lmmhbb9ti69qbactnk8gq48bi4bh28or0sti61pj2c9i649fg)
Army Lt. Col. William Joseph O'Brien spent almost his entire adult life in the service of the military. He eventually made the ultimate sacrifice for the nation during World War II, but not before his leadership and actions during the Battle of Saipan earned him the Medal of Honor.

name: JAMES JUDGE
subject: WATCH: We battled a school system against LGBT indoctrination - and we won!
body:
| | | |
---
| Fellow Conservatives, Citizens Defending Freedom is continuing its successful work in defeating the LGBT agenda that has invaded our public school systems. In Polk County, Florida, our members stood against a June "Pride Month" proclamation in the Polk County School District. Due in part to our efforts, that proclamation was CANCELED! WATCH:

---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byDJVlccgsWHV0af_zVrpHYols2BtnDjPkzZD644PrGMmmLYuMB4jB5_T480A7LNKU4kbRhckSVXMH_Dbk13i2hVdpvLxGfO7MzttWXcOxC4q-vETh_jKf1aW8Zldo3zPDEP2j944dFCpj_eDn_mWNaBtUFN06TUJsztDeq2VRNl7pttZzEmm7QPIZUEkElQJHwyh33uV4ggl47U-thOj3a65QEnVzVxWemY61fii2g=&c=k1g_T4V8k1rWEsw8FQZhnv_9BMRgbX_ZHc6-5WtS-Njzpm9YjztuqA==&ch=k5h7Z2xN7N7yloKqrFUrM2_FTGYrfyIGp3WcFWOur8pgBUtxVfkwTQ==)
---
|
The "progressive" left-wing LGBT activists are more angry at us than ever. We're not afraid of them. We're going to keep fighting, and we're going to keep winning, just like we won when he had [pornographic books removed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byDJVlccgsWHV0af_zVrpHYols2BtnDjPkzZD644PrGMmmLYuMB4jKEORBRO3BRVL21fZN9ajDe3iarLeWrpfBRKt2HYdV9ZftPLSp7EfiNYLzXmI9eY2wcgO_bHoYT52zIygFvHTR99XIfvAmt6NL0GXRrHxgp5xqvZZniJR_f5oj5lwMhgU3FJItw_XZMh2-cNE0RGc9XclZMsTmzx_JIgeAA7ScG3Tm8mMASVzvzkzzjfs-EkI9bjrppx7DJ5I4svTBDWV5psyDoltuzeHIfHgtvovvj_DonZq9ApHsY=&c=k1g_T4V8k1rWEsw8FQZhnv_9BMRgbX_ZHc6-5WtS-Njzpm9YjztuqA==&ch=k5h7Z2xN7N7yloKqrFUrM2_FTGYrfyIGp3WcFWOur8pgBUtxVfkwTQ==) from Florida school libraries. But we can only do that with your gracious support. Your [generous contributions](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byDJVlccgsWHV0af_zVrpHYols2BtnDjPkzZD644PrGMmmLYuMB4jB5_T480A7LNKU4kbRhckSVXMH_Dbk13i2hVdpvLxGfO7MzttWXcOxC4q-vETh_jKf1aW8Zldo3zPDEP2j944dFCpj_eDn_mWNaBtUFN06TUJsztDeq2VRNl7pttZzEmm7QPIZUEkElQJHwyh33uV4ggl47U-thOj3a65QEnVzVxWemY61fii2g=&c=k1g_T4V8k1rWEsw8FQZhnv_9BMRgbX_ZHc6-5WtS-Njzpm9YjztuqA==&ch=k5h7Z2xN7N7yloKqrFUrM2_FTGYrfyIGp3WcFWOur8pgBUtxVfkwTQ==) help our grassroots county chapters nationwide operate on a daily basis, so they can continue to hold local officials accountable, and bring transparency to the public. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: On Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
158 years ago today, Union soldiers arrived in Galveston, Texas. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65053402/412177145/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ14P_HOL_E_20230619_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjNkMjkxMS1hYTBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36YZmvju0-IlhMq5-ItwlBOuQ4Gcus9WqwMnCpAlJkc=&emci=943d2911-aa0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9f3d2911-aa0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Just two years ago, Juneteenth became an official federal holiday. But its history traces back much, much further. On June 19, 1865 — 158 years ago today — Union soldiers arrived in Galveston, Texas. They declared that slavery was finally over, and the formerly enslaved people of Galveston erupted in joy. Ever since, today has been known as Juneteenth: the annual and oldest known celebration commemorating the end of slavery in the United States. I’m very happy that Juneteenth has received the official recognition it deserves. It’s a chance to tell the story of how even in the face of oppression, Black Americans throughout our history have never stopped imagining and fighting for a better tomorrow. Not just for themselves, but for our entire nation. Of course, it isn’t enough to look back and celebrate how far we’ve come. We have to look ahead and see what more we need to do. Just remember the history: On that first Juneteenth, it had been over two years since President Lincoln had signed the Emancipation Proclamation — but freedom on paper doesn’t always mean freedom in practice. And that’s certainly still true now. Today, we have to recommit ourselves to rooting out systemic racism in every aspect of our economy and society. We have to confront white supremacy in all of its forms. We have to cement the unshakeable truth that Black lives matter. So if you’re enjoying a long weekend for Juneteenth, and if you weren’t otherwise planning on it, I want to encourage you to meaningfully recognize this holiday. Do some reading on what Juneteenth is all about. Visit a museum. Attend a local event. Commit to getting involved in your community for racial justice. I understand the responsibility that I and others have as white Americans to ask what we are doing to dismantle a system that has too often undervalued Black life. We cannot just be passive allies. We have to actively fight for everyone who’s still waiting for justice. That’s what I’m remembering today as we honor Juneteenth. Elizabeth

subject: Eastern monarchs are the next victims of the insect apocalypse
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **The presence of Eastern monarch butterflies in their wintering grounds dropped 22% in the last year alone. Donate $27 or more now and help us reach our urgent $3,200 goal to protect monarchs and the planet!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830753?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830754?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830755?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830756?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
There’s no sugarcoating the devastating news: **Eastern monarch butterflies are facing serious population declines.**
In the last year alone, the presence of these beautiful orange and black pollinators in their wintering grounds **_declined by 22%._** Pesticides like Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup are a key driver. **But monarchs are at risk of dying off. They’re officially ENDANGERED according to the International Union for Conservation of Nature.** [**Friend, there’s no time to waste: Stop Bayer-Monsanto’s butterfly-harming pesticides before it’s too late to undo the damage. Donate $27 immediately to help protect vulnerable monarchs and the planet, and help us reach our $3,200 goal by midnight tonight!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830757?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
It’s no secret that pesticides are dangerous, Friend. But did you know that Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup is decimating a plant that monarch butterflies rely on for survival? Milkweed is the __only food source__ for baby monarch caterpillars. It’s also where monarchs lay their eggs. Without milkweed, **monarch caterpillars can’t hatch and survive.**
At Friends of the Earth, we’re doing everything in our power to protect pollinators like monarch butterflies and our ecosystems from toxic pesticides. But we’re up against big corporations, like Bayer-Monsanto. These corporations are raking in profit no matter the cost to the planet. Plain and simple, we can’t win this fight without your help. Will you stand with us today and help protect vulnerable monarchs and the planet from greedy industries?
**Help stop Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup from driving Eastern monarch butterflies toward extinction and harming the planet. Rush your $27 contribution and help us reach our $3,200 goal by midnight tonight!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830753?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830754?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830755?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830756?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Monarch butterflies once numbered in the hundreds of millions. But numbers have declined by 80%, and up to 99% in some places. **Now, we’re seeing fewer and fewer monarchs completing the epic 2,500 mile migration that they’re known for.**
A key contributor to their decline? Herbicides like glyphosate -- the main ingredient in Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup. This toxic weed killer has virtually wiped out milkweed across monarchs’ U.S. migratory path. This plant is the only food source for young monarchs. Without milkweed, survival is nearly impossible for monarchs. So it’s no surprise that as use of Roundup has increased, monarch populations have plummeted.
To make matters worse, a recent study highlighted a frightening fact: **every single sample of milkweed collected was contaminated with pesticides -- one-third with levels deadly to monarchs.** The few young monarchs that manage to hatch do so on toxic pesticide-riddled milkweed. _**Their first meal may be their last.**_
Monarch butterflies don’t deserve to die when their lives have barely begun. And neither of us wants to see a world without these iconic pollinators, Friend. The stakes have never been higher. It’s time to stop Bayer-Monsanto from harming any more butterflies before we lose them forever.
**Stand up to greedy corporations like Bayer-Monsanto and help protect vulnerable monarchs and the planet before the loss is too great: Donate $27 or more today.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830753?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830754?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830755?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830756?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The dangers of Roundup don’t end with monarchs, Friend. Its main ingredient, glyphosate, is a probable carcinogen. It’s been associated with developmental harm in people, along with disruption of the gut microbiome, kidney toxicity, and fatty liver disease. Farmers and homeowners are suing Bayer-Monsanto due to _**high rates of non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma linked to the Roundup they've used on their farms and gardens.**_ Roundup is causing extensive harm that must be stopped before it's too late.
But despite clear damage being done by these dangerous herbicides, Bayer-Monsanto shows no signs of slowing its reckless pursuit of profit. The company has made it clear time and again that it’s willing to keep lining its pockets at the expense of people AND the planet.
Meanwhile, monarchs are running out of places to lay their eggs. Their babies are hatching on pesticide-riddled milkweed, eating these plants, and dying. **With vulnerable monarch butterflies and human health on the line, the stakes are too high to wait a minute more to take action.**
Friends of the Earth is fighting tooth and nail to save these pollinators. But it’s an uphill battle -- one we can’t win without your help. Your membership support today will go a long way towards fueling our vital work and stopping the downward spiral of pollinators and the planet. Please Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save monarchs from extinction and protect our planet. Will you stand with us today and donate $27 to help us reach our urgent $3,200 goal before the clock strikes midnight?
**Act now while there are still monarchs left to save. Donate $27 and help us reach our $3,200 goal for monarchs and the planet before midnight tonight!**
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830753?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: It's time for revival
body:
Our nation needs REVIVAL.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zturiqml9j4e0h22thlvcras88td1of8u3g0tskg_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie0ob6clh2bs)
---
Fellow American, **Our nation needs _REVIVAL_.** These are dark and trying times for America, and now more than ever, we need to turn to our great God for peace... for hope... for victory. That’s why TPUSA Faith has launched our **Kingdom to the Capitol Tour** \-- a series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY STATE CAPITALS over the next several months designed to ignite the flame of REVIVAL in bible-believing Americans across the country! We’re traveling from state to state and gathering _tens of thousands_ of believers together to seek the face of our Heavenly Father and invite his blessing on our great nation. And we’re praying for the partnership of friends like you as we continue building momentum for this movement. In fact, we can’t do it without you! [**As a friend, a fellow believer, and a lover of our great country, can I count on you to partner with TPUSA Faith in this important initiative by making a generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give today?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zegdbjgr0jtrud97fnt6tku9u3ude8qq2sdh4vb0_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie0ob6clh2bs)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3sjsrut7e9bo3iask8qp915d1p0namp629a1hfo_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie0ob6clh2bs)
---
Your generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities ... to fill local church buildings with worshipers ... and to send an army of believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most. Whether it’s the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools, the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, you don’t have to look hard to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. But followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people. And that’s exactly what we’re pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship at these powerful events. [**But we can’t do it without you. Will you please make your generous and much-needed gift right now?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zof09r8hc4e7284j32riadckagalk6ro2i2mie00_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie0ob6clh2bs) Together, we can make these the first of many thousands to have their hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events. [**Your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give will enable us to bring hundreds more people to our Kingdom to the Capitol worship events -- until we've hosted one in EVERY state capital in America! -- over the next several months.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrufnhsv7c9a5in7acee75henoj6l4bfm3i4eqag_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie0ob6clh2bs)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjpfjaq449b8kk0qflief7ptei5eodlqkq40m558_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie0ob6clh2bs)
---
Right now, we have events scheduled in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma; Austin, Texas; Topeka, Kansas; Madison, Wisconsin; Springfield, Illinois; Indianapolis, Indiana; and many more. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. These are desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God’s kingdom near. That’s exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. [**Will you please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of our world?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkh801l8ojbue80jn2q09epi29tltci3j5rhcts8_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie0ob6clh2bs) Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfpv584hrrm44nl02molv4g3ehphnp54prk97048_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie0ob6clh2bs)

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

|
Congratulations to Senator Amanda Chase!

7th Year in a Row Conservative Achievement Award!

CPAC's American Conservative Union Scorecards for 2023 are in!
---
| My 8 Year Conservative Voting Record ON PRO-FAMILY ISSUES 100% pro-life
---
| Dear Friends and Supporters, Years before I ever ran for public office, I volunteered for the pro-life family organization, The Family Foundation. Protecting innocent life was and still is one of the top issues for me as a pro-life mother of 4. When I ran for the Virginia Senate for the first time in 2015, protecting innocent life was top on my list and front and center as one of my platforms. 8 years later, protecting innocent life is still one of my top platforms.
In 2022, when SCOTUS overturned Roe versus Wade, I stood strong and committed to protecting innocent life, even when some Republican legislators chose not to do so.
I'm unapologetically pro-life and pro-family. Period. I believe life begins at conception and all innocent life must be protected. Despite serving in a Democrat-controlled Senate, I continued to introduce the Life Begins and Conception Act in 2023 and The Pain Capable Unborn Child Protection Act in both 2020 and 2022.
I also voted against the so called Equal Rights Amendment that was sponsored by my current Republican opponent and former seatmate Glen Sturtevant, who is challenging me for the opportunity to continue to represent Chesterfield and Colonial Heights in Senate District 12.
What exactly is the ERA or Equal Rights Amendment?
This failed amendment seeks to enshrine abortion in the US Constitution and promotes gender fluidity. Conservative women worked hard for decades at the state and federal level to keep this amendment from becoming a reality. I know many of them and have worked with them for over a decade.
The first female state senator in Virginia, the late Senator Eva Mae Scott fought against this amendment. In fact, she was redistricted out of her seat because of her fight against the ERA. She knew what the liberals were up to and didn't buy their lies and deception. Well intentioned Senator Glen Sturtevant thought he knew better and fell for the lies of the left, who are ushering in abortion on demand, late term abortion and gender fluidity.
Glen both sponsored and voted for this atrocity and didn't reverse course when other Republican legislators and conservative stakeholders tried to reason with him to rescind his efforts and reverse course. He wouldn't listen.
---
| MY LEGISLATIVE VOTING RECORD
---
| THE FAMILY FOUNDATION SCORECARD
---
| The Family Foundation Action General Assembly Report Card is designed to disclose important legislator votes and present an opportunity for citizens to compare their state legislators' voting records.
With this analysis, citizens can make informed decisions at the polls and be well prepared to lobby and work with elected officials. Covering a wide range of issues, this publication helps citizens hold representatives accountable--illustrating their worldview as it pertains to values issues.

clean_body: Voting Records Matter | | | | == | PROVEN, TESTED, TRUSTED We can trust Amanda! | | | | VOTING RECORDS MATTER | Senator Chase in the ONLY PROVEN Conservative in Senate District 12 100 % Pro-Family Voting Record | | | American Conservative Union Chairman, Matt Schlapp, presents Senator Amanda Chase a Conservative Achievement Award in 2019 | == | Congratulations to Senator Amanda Chase! 7th Year in a Row Conservative Achievement Award! CPAC's American Conservative Union Scorecards for 2023 are in! | My 8 Year Conservative Voting Record ON PRO-FAMILY ISSUES 100% pro-life | Dear Friends and Supporters, Years before I ever ran for public office, I volunteered for the pro-life family organization, The Family Foundation. Protecting innocent life was and still is one of the top issues for me as a pro-life mother of 4. When I ran for the Virginia Senate for the first time in 2015, protecting innocent life was top on my list and front and center as one of my platforms. 8 years later, protecting innocent life is still one of my top platforms. In 2022, when SCOTUS overturned Roe versus Wade, I stood strong and committed to protecting innocent life, even when some Republican legislators chose not to do so. I'm unapologetically pro-life and pro-family. Period. I believe life begins at conception and all innocent life must be protected. Despite serving in a Democrat-controlled Senate, I continued to introduce the Life Begins and Conception Act in 2023 and The Pain Capable Unborn Child Protection Act in both 2020 and 2022. I also voted against the so called Equal Rights Amendment that was sponsored by my current Republican opponent and former seatmate Glen Sturtevant, who is challenging me for the opportunity to continue to represent Chesterfield and Colonial Heights in Senate District 12. What exactly is the ERA or Equal Rights Amendment? This failed amendment seeks to enshrine abortion in the US Constitution and promotes gender fluidity. Conservative women worked hard for decades at the state and federal level to keep this amendment from becoming a reality. I know many of them and have worked with them for over a decade. The first female state senator in Virginia, the late Senator Eva Mae Scott fought against this amendment. In fact, she was redistricted out of her seat because of her fight against the ERA. She knew what the liberals were up to and didn't buy their lies and deception. Well intentioned Senator Glen Sturtevant thought he knew better and fell for the lies of the left, who are ushering in abortion on demand, late term abortion and gender fluidity. Glen both sponsored and voted for this atrocity and didn't reverse course when other Republican legislators and conservative stakeholders tried to reason with him to rescind his efforts and reverse course. He wouldn't listen. | MY LEGISLATIVE VOTING RECORD | THE FAMILY FOUNDATION SCORECARD | The Family Foundation Action General Assembly Report Card is designed to disclose important legislator votes and present an opportunity for citizens to compare their state legislators' voting records. With this analysis, citizens can make informed decisions at the polls and be well prepared to lobby and work with elected officials. Covering a wide range of issues, this publication helps citizens hold representatives accountable--illustrating their worldview as it pertains to values issues. | 2016-2017 100% CHASE 88% STURTEVANT no voting record RAMIREZ | | | == | 2018-2019 100% CHASE 76% STURTEVANT no record RAMIREZ | | | == | 2020-2021 100% CHASE voted out STURTEVANT no record RAMIREZ | | | == | Senator Amanda Chase GOING ON THE RECORD FOR LIFE | CNN INTERVIEW | == | Senate Floor Speech on the Anniversary of Roe versus Wade 2022 | == | CHANNEL 3 INTERVIEW | == | Life Begins at Conception Video Press Release | == | Senator Chase presents SR87 Life Begins at Conception Bill before the Senate Rules Committee | My pro-life Senate bill was the last pro-life Senate bill to be killed in the Senate, escaping Senator Louise Lucas's Senate Health and Education Committee. Even though I knew the Democrat-controlled 13 to 4 Senate Rules Committee would kill or "pass by indefinitely," I wanted to put the Democrats on the record for "not supporting the science." This was a simple bill that simply says that "life begins at fertilization", which is supported as fact by 85% of scientists. Listen to the extreme and irrational comments by Planned Parenthood who clearly didn't read the bill. | == | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | SESSION NEWSLETTERS | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | HOW DO I VOTE? | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Stacked against Christians
body:
Public schools are teaching sex education to fourth graders

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26883%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X8OzWcHStP0mu1W7hF71Ew&sysid=1)
---
Friend, I gave my life to Christ when I was in fifth grade. But fifth graders today are facing a cultural, political, and social climate that is stacked against Christians. Public schools are teaching sex education to fourth graders, telling kindergarteners to choose their gender, and writing curriculum based on critical race theory. As Christians, we have a strong sense of right and wrong, good and bad, true and false. Yet, our nation’s children are being shaped by an education system that vehemently disagrees with our beliefs. **_America needs Christians who have the Holy Spirit working in their lives to stand up for what they believe and let the light of truth into our schools, communities, and culture._** That’s exactly why **TPUSA Faith** launched **Kingdom to the Capitol** -- a series of live worship events in **_ALL FIFTY state capitals_** to ignite the flame of REVIVAL all across our country. **As a fellow believer in Christ, I want to invite you to attend Kingdom to the Capitol when we’re in your state capital.** [**But whether or not you’re able to attend, I hope you’ll support TPUSA Faith with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100 to enable us to bring hundreds more people to each of our FIFTY worship events.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26884%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ja9xnBr8Nas6g9FSvzgucA&sysid=1)
---
[Support Kingdom to the Capitol](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26895%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zHFv0V5QQxnwbZF7L%2fLN6A&sysid=1)
---
Our educational system should illuminate the world around us, helping us to see things as they truly are... revealing what’s right, good, true, and beautiful. TPUSA Faith is on a mission to empower Christians who care about our nation’s children and public education to go to school boards, classrooms, and city councils to boldly ask our leaders to do what is right. Right now, we have **Kingdom to the Capitol** events scheduled in Texas, Wisconsin, Virginia, and more, and we are planning future events in additional state capitals. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. [**Will you please pray for the success of our REVIVAL tour and support this mission for the glory of God, for the good of our nation’s children, and the future of our nation?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26896%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LlC6Swa1QJw4FjmPypJTuA&sysid=1) I believe this is a season for revival for our nation. These are desperate times in America. Whether we’re talking about public education, the spread of socialism, gender ideology, or abortion, you don’t have to look far to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. With the generous partnership of followers of Jesus -- like you -- TPUSA Faith will promote these powerful worship events far and wide, fill local church buildings with worshipers, and send an army of believers back into their communities. I pray that by coming together as believers in Christ, we will renew the hope of Christians and bring much-needed revival to our nation. [**As Christians, it often feels like we are being ganged up upon, which is why it’s critical that we come together in powerful worship and prayer in EVERY state capital. But we can’t do that without you. Will you please make a much-needed gift right now?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26897%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SVnTFawXKh4BFL0oPyVREg&sysid=1) Our educational system should be filled with the Spirit as it teaches our children how to discern God’s will, how to live in society, and how to be wise. But you and I both know that our current public education system has strayed as far as possible from this purpose. TPUSA Faith is working to engage, equip, and empower Christians to change the trajectory of public education -- and our nation -- for the future of our children. **Kingdom to the Capitol** is our most ambitious and historic revival tour yet, visiting every single state capital in America with the hope of restoring American Biblical values in schools and communities across our nation. [**Whether the Lord leads you to give $35, $50, $100, or some other amount, I hope you can support our FIFTY worship events during a desperate -- and dark -- time for America. In order to reach EVERY state capital, and save our nation, it’s critical that we have your support today.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26898%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kqIot47t5dzx4LtrfQA1BQ&sysid=1)
---
[Support Kingdom to the Capitol](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26895%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zHFv0V5QQxnwbZF7L%2fLN6A&sysid=1)
---
Together, Friend, we can spark REVIVAL in our beloved nation. God bless you,
---
Charlie Kirk TPUSA Faith
---

I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. With your help, we held onto this GOP battleground district. And after a 24-year drought, I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Fellow American,

Unlike most professional politicians, I didn’t have a privileged leg up or a family member who could make some introductions to get to where I am today.

So let me introduce myself - **[my name is Beth Van Duyne:](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb915942bf5143a2be61c715646885ba&_e=fBZDN5IZrQQ98d0ok2L-nipoYHAX1EHhzKL7fWvmonuufslwwjumPeXyJnwmNV6JWjY-oqVKbn3zYU4Hhgmk-QsQy1ahClloQhsxtQtCLlQPXyTL_2Wofs0QAXQaG8ncVEOs5H5JQykFfsp29JqjSEH8hwmY5f9JjkxOe3LzcloORW4sP2Kq29a1LaF5zSYNCastIZ0xJecPvzNj-QPpY1g3MW9lGZNtogE6m9DcqnrGeZsLB6GnZ9OL4WB7sRMVjWsUCzNfz14IZFxEMCMOQS5QUVIVinrxXH2iWNwu5BY4svy4kO4rCdhu6qM9QdJPCT3GI4Sj_fYT259SPrLHytXgQyfzcSI8cyI_chip9hW-Mws76mLCVrhFNJSB0SDAyu1Sp5MMqZa-ITuQL0oKTTQzubzGZLRgrWOD2y9Y8Jr_EPDDy64vzLQqeZB3gOne)**

I am a working, single mother of two amazing kids, a proud American patriot, an unapologetic conservative, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, and a **U.S. Congresswoman with unwavering Texas grit.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb915942bf5143a2be61c715646885ba&_e=fBZDN5IZrQQ98d0ok2L-nipoYHAX1EHhzKL7fWvmonuufslwwjumPeXyJnwmNV6JWjY-oqVKbn3zYU4Hhgmk-QsQy1ahClloQhsxtQtCLlQPXyTL_2Wofs0QAXQaG8ncVEOs5H5JQykFfsp29JqjSEH8hwmY5f9JjkxOe3LzcloORW4sP2Kq29a1LaF5zSYNCastIZ0xJecPvzNj-QPpY1g3MW9lGZNtogE6m9DcqnrGeZsLB6GnZ9OL4WB7sRMVjWsUCzNfz14IZFxEMCMOQVsRi5tm5d8vWp94F657Wf_KSCl1RL785dAxRITzu-y9aUWMRqEXkOXDM_7pY7WzI-yKNDlVUBxX22lOCmLoewjpffg06MKrDUnbEkv0pLj__15qLJzPhAjeeHpAhQ05-4bgwi8zrM0az2UCOksklj5fODVmFqu-cn66VukP6GBT)
In 2020, political pundits and polls declared Texas’ 24th Congressional District one of the MOST LIKELY seats in the ENTIRE NATION to FLIP BLUE.

I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. [**With your help, we held onto this GOP battleground district.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb915942bf5143a2be61c715646885ba&_e=fBZDN5IZrQQ98d0ok2L-nipoYHAX1EHhzKL7fWvmonuufslwwjumPeXyJnwmNV6JWjY-oqVKbn3zYU4Hhgmk-QsQy1ahClloQhsxtQtCLlQPXyTL_2Wofs0QAXQaG8ncVEOs5H5JQykFfsp29JqjSEH8hwmY5f9JjkxOe3LzcloORW4sP2Kq29a1LaF5zSYNCastIZ0xJecPvzNj-QPpY1g3MW9lGZNtogE6m9DcqnrGeZsLB6GnZ9OL4WB7sRMVjWsUCzNfz14IZFxEMCMOQVnGpbCLvePsY-148CBG5ML_0G430TvnmZ7YJdYtuK-IWhq4YPYcEOZAk6ctAKGJxIT9KoAog2ZEp1wvlzVmqdWgYeSpDhU6neB0QovzKK_iY_2N_fsdGs9B5DRFzX5Fx-hXxau0KueXRkdVocSypinurSkPu31COvmUYl_WaWqy) And after a 24-year drought, **I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED.**

In full transparency - [**I’m emailing to recruit conservatives like yourself to join my team before the 2024 Election.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb915942bf5143a2be61c715646885ba&_e=fBZDN5IZrQQ98d0ok2L-nipoYHAX1EHhzKL7fWvmonuufslwwjumPeXyJnwmNV6JWjY-oqVKbn3zYU4Hhgmk-QsQy1ahClloQhsxtQtCLlQPXyTL_2Wofs0QAXQaG8ncVEOs5H5JQykFfsp29JqjSEH8hwmY5f9JjkxOe3LzcloORW4sP2Kq29a1LaF5zSYNCastIZ0xJecPvzNj-QPpY1g3MW9lGZNtogE6m9DcqnrGeZsLB6GnZ9OL4WB7sRMVjWsUCzNfz14IZFxEMCMOQZHVHqXIl0OoIGH30of_ZEzP4Inm8F2kaw2BwyjM3ThywdP1e42hASzdNNuZL_NL44y0UHl4kqSydw0uAwAKaHwDXld1lulvb7Xp13DcLS6wcGf2Uv7A-VcCwrbBMk5Q_2oUvsIbAMXC4gRUjXxsOQxLsqPRrsq65S--H5rsLDPq) But just like everything I have achieved in life, I am willing to work for your support. _So, for now, I simply want you to get to know me:_

_**I am no stranger to beating the odds, Fellow American. **_

**I left home at the age of 17 with nothing but an unwavering determination and a fierce belief in the American Dream.** For years, I worked numerous jobs just to pay my rent. Eventually, **I put myself through college, defying the odds and graduating Magna Cum Laude from Cornell University.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb915942bf5143a2be61c715646885ba&_e=fBZDN5IZrQQ98d0ok2L-nipoYHAX1EHhzKL7fWvmonuufslwwjumPeXyJnwmNV6JWjY-oqVKbn3zYU4Hhgmk-QsQy1ahClloQhsxtQtCLlQPXyTL_2Wofs0QAXQaG8ncVEOs5H5JQykFfsp29JqjSEH8hwmY5f9JjkxOe3LzcloORW4sP2Kq29a1LaF5zSYNCastIZ0xJecPvzNj-QPpY1g3MW9lGZNtogE6m9DcqnrGeZsLB6GnZ9OL4WB7sRMVjWsUCzNfz14IZFxEMCMOQbvuw7pGafHPslJNShU71rNt2mpZSna2doaHQsHGQ4Ouo_8rHY6Xn_h_408F9NKXFjiLBZo_4LO8rMheTDTVqXthSuF9lWR5hjmmYSu2R-sUu9EfXvTlLrr_u7R0rqCCrtFdCW77oqEZgLoFdDXcexVOgerwGeMy4spyYWE67U2a)
It was a struggle, Fellow American. I was getting paid a little over $3 an hour and working paycheck to paycheck - living paycheck to paycheck. I paid for my own way through college with the help of student loans, and then I struggled for 10 years afterward to pay the loans back.

_**But through it all, I knew nothing would stop me from achieving the America Dream.**_

At my core, I knew my heart belonged in Texas. After graduating, I moved back to Irving, which has been my home for over 30 years. I was intent on becoming an integral part of the place that shaped me. _And that I did..._ **In 2011, I became the FIRST female EVER elected to serve as the Mayor of Irving, Texas.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb915942bf5143a2be61c715646885ba&_e=fBZDN5IZrQQ98d0ok2L-nipoYHAX1EHhzKL7fWvmonuufslwwjumPeXyJnwmNV6JWjY-oqVKbn3zYU4Hhgmk-QsQy1ahClloQhsxtQtCLlQPXyTL_2Wofs0QAXQaG8ncVEOs5H5JQykFfsp29JqjSEH8hwmY5f9JjkxOe3LzcloORW4sP2Kq29a1LaF5zSYNCastIZ0xJecPvzNj-QPpY1g3MW9lGZNtogE6m9DcqnrGeZsLB6GnZ9OL4WB7sRMVjWsUCzNfz14IZFxEMCMOQYe6s9WPyKWaYLyct1ydxKaZ_Ax65vy3Cc9eUz6nAT-vimoUc0DIyMfJ2hrq9nHjNbaVga5WrhOY7lqpqA_XI_9HS37cv5ONfHTMyRz5gpAgeUwy2igNDcwXwp9pJn2ScPJ6_pCnh-EyOxgf3ASITg6VQfGqKDpvOMEJVTtXjUnk)
[ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb915942bf5143a2be61c715646885ba&_e=fBZDN5IZrQQ98d0ok2L-nipoYHAX1EHhzKL7fWvmonuufslwwjumPeXyJnwmNV6JWjY-oqVKbn3zYU4Hhgmk-QsQy1ahClloQhsxtQtCLlQPXyTL_2Wofs0QAXQaG8ncVEOs5H5JQykFfsp29JqjSEH8hwmY5f9JjkxOe3LzcloORW4sP2Kq29a1LaF5zSYNCastIZ0xJecPvzNj-QPpY1g3MW9lGZNtogE6m9DcqnrGeZsLB6GnZ9OL4WB7sRMVjWsUCzNfz14IZFxEMCMOQVWwmn6RlARjuP3cph193TPbNfzPKK6M3LVxg40byOG7z5mjjsIudK2c9qKMSHxWcdfelrBlzRuXCSckwFqzTgxFtsolzEBe3ltwO6BtKmWJ36f_rxB4YKyvf1DqF6XiDFcC0WBokeH-cPCvkeLa-LErva9js3OVpMj0P6CHp5xo)
Under my leadership, the City of Irving witnessed unprecedented economic growth and development. On my watch, we added 40,000 jobs and an estimated $3 billion in growth and new developments. During my time as mayor, Irving was named the fifth safest city in America.

**In 2017, I was appointed to serve our nation in a presidential administration, working under Secretary Ben Carson.** I am proud to have worked on many of the Trump Administration’s greatest economic successes, such as opportunity zones and leading Housing and Urban Development’s disaster recovery efforts for southeast Texas in the aftermath of Hurricane Harvey.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb915942bf5143a2be61c715646885ba&_e=fBZDN5IZrQQ98d0ok2L-nipoYHAX1EHhzKL7fWvmonuufslwwjumPeXyJnwmNV6JWjY-oqVKbn3zYU4Hhgmk-QsQy1ahClloQhsxtQtCLlQPXyTL_2Wofs0QAXQaG8ncVEOs5H5JQykFfsp29JqjSEH8hwmY5f9JjkxOe3LzcloORW4sP2Kq29a1LaF5zSYNCastIZ0xJecPvzNj-QPpY1g3MW9lGZNtogE6m9DcqnrGeZsLB6GnZ9OL4WB7sRMVjWsUCzNfz14IZFxEMCMOQWzcFq3Nm41x0xw38d7pklVHN57_PCuTbjrBI4Up6UNUmA9wh84lYM6wXpbN6fo70EbCkROw9MycPUAEUXlJACf7VU9Y06HTT8cJ5yJZlrprqr9Y2OJxjm6M1Z4elPbic0ydsH8HZazff4kkpZxPvZZO5S9QqI_2JFOHzLcCexmk)
**Today, the 17-year old girl that left home in pursuit of the American Dream is fighting for ALL Americans from the floor of the United States House of Representatives.**

[ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb915942bf5143a2be61c715646885ba&_e=fBZDN5IZrQQ98d0ok2L-nipoYHAX1EHhzKL7fWvmonuufslwwjumPeXyJnwmNV6JWjY-oqVKbn3zYU4Hhgmk-QsQy1ahClloQhsxtQtCLlQPXyTL_2Wofs0QAXQaG8ncVEOs5H5JQykFfsp29JqjSEH8hwmY5f9JjkxOe3LzcloORW4sP2Kq29a1LaF5zSYNCastIZ0xJecPvzNj-QPpY1g3MW9lGZNtogE6m9DcqnrGeZsLB6GnZ9OL4WB7sRMVjWsUCzNfz14IZFxEMCMOQfqOZRg9cIPAn9Lnd5v-BlN3nKWUskcabfGqEL-pgNXZo-TEfRSFr3a1PuqLCmllstCOZV3Qp_pqaUxCK2EZllf7MG2OTP5GyPpYwh_SgP7s4Dp1Lnfwyv5w6QOv6ca-MgXVZncQw2fb4flMMGVic5ehp61WdCXGlqGkGNFtVpuR)
**I’ve been asked what prompted me to run for public office; the answer is simple - _my children._** We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb915942bf5143a2be61c715646885ba&_e=fBZDN5IZrQQ98d0ok2L-nipoYHAX1EHhzKL7fWvmonuufslwwjumPeXyJnwmNV6JWjY-oqVKbn3zYU4Hhgmk-QsQy1ahClloQhsxtQtCLlQPXyTL_2Wofs0QAXQaG8ncVEOs5H5JQykFfsp29JqjSEH8hwmY5f9JjkxOe3LzcloORW4sP2Kq29a1LaF5zSYNCastIZ0xJecPvzNj-QPpY1g3MW9lGZNtogE6m9DcqnrGeZsLB6GnZ9OL4WB7sRMVjWsUCzNfz14IZFxEMCMOQWYtk5ejumj-W2ixxYMbPKYej51SKF2kaoJ85VcsoPhqDQcfQCZGLXmri1CRd9jamg3I8zeXAcwmUdF-zoBD50SzWOmmiStaHCI0Nk1rFK8aL1ipmpZ9FoYpFLVfEjkzFMBSNeMM_J80PhHngmW13nDr9R8C4u5a9kfYY3WPmggJ)
Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorism to achieve their goals. **When I think about my two children, I want them to have the same opportunities in life that I did; I want them to grow up safe and proud of our country.**

Now that you know more about me, I will leave you with this: As long as I am in Congress, I vow to fiercely champion the future of America, safeguarding our values and principles for generations to come. **[I promise to fight for the American Dream.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb915942bf5143a2be61c715646885ba&_e=fBZDN5IZrQQ98d0ok2L-nipoYHAX1EHhzKL7fWvmonuufslwwjumPeXyJnwmNV6JWjY-oqVKbn3zYU4Hhgmk-QsQy1ahClloQhsxtQtCLlQPXyTL_2Wofs0QAXQaG8ncVEOs5H5JQykFfsp29JqjSEH8hwmY5f9JjkxOe3LzcloORW4sP2Kq29a1LaF5zSYNCastIZ0xJecPvzNj-QPpY1g3MW9lGZNtogE6m9DcqnrGeZsLB6GnZ9OL4WB7sRMVjWsUCzNfz14IZFxEMCMOQeNpRuRxdsSeD7i3uTMbFBfyDjXogja_zzdmHBHraWXSv-e2LmpDK3jp-NQiaPBvzUIApBwYc5HVYwF6zuql4oE3vtdcweIURimqB4UNDNzGhhzmKq66qlVMbWHuJ-KvhSsoBTshwXlWgB58YDdBL4Z7UxSe1zknRHV47pFMMjCi)**

**I’m Beth Van Duyne, and** [**I’m asking for your support. **GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? **Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.** She’s been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. **Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. [ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb915942bf5143a2be61c715646885ba&_e=fBZDN5IZrQQ98d0ok2L-nipoYHAX1EHhzKL7fWvmonuufslwwjumPeXyJnwmNV6JWjY-oqVKbn3zYU4Hhgmk-QsQy1ahClloQhsxtQtCLlQPXyTL_2Wofs0QAXQaG8ncVEOs5H5JQykFfsp29JqjSEH8hwmY5f9JjkxOe3LzcloORW4sP2Kq29a1LaF5zSYNCastIZ0xJecPvzNj-QPpY1g3MW9lGZNtogE6m9DcqnrGeZsLB6GnZ9OL4WB7sRMVjWsUCzNfz14IZFxEMCMOQSiHDHeUrb2DmsrnQhhgd0Pw1t5KXxcY3zXPX2PGyf2xVeXvV5X0qUginKRdL0BS--cJ1nPYAl_JkjBLUDKAQeUENmzVGrYwjXVdaG4yo_TSucYJ9_YKrUVLT-B8GHK41SxTpEGyfigcf8jt6BoxQPuLnDTRS1z_CVa1EdufzplA)

clean_body: I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. With your help, we held onto this GOP battleground district. And after a 24-year drought, I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED. | | Fellow American, Unlike most professional politicians, I didn’t have a privileged leg up or a family member who could make some introductions to get to where I am today. So let me introduce myself - I am a working, single mother of two amazing kids, a proud American patriot, an unapologetic conservative, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, and a U.S. Congresswoman with unwavering Texas grit. In 2020, political pundits and polls declared Texas’ 24th Congressional District one of the MOST LIKELY seats in the ENTIRE NATION to FLIP BLUE. I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. And after a 24-year drought, I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED. In full transparency - But just like everything I have achieved in life, I am willing to work for your support. So, for now, I simply want you to get to know me: I am no stranger to beating the odds, Fellow American. I left home at the age of 17 with nothing but an unwavering determination and a fierce belief in the American Dream. For years, I worked numerous jobs just to pay my rent. Eventually, I put myself through college, defying the odds and graduating Magna Cum Laude from Cornell University. It was a struggle, Fellow American. I was getting paid a little over $3 an hour and working paycheck to paycheck - living paycheck to paycheck. I paid for my own way through college with the help of student loans, and then I struggled for 10 years afterward to pay the loans back. But through it all, I knew nothing would stop me from achieving the America Dream. At my core, I knew my heart belonged in Texas. After graduating, I moved back to Irving, which has been my home for over 30 years. I was intent on becoming an integral part of the place that shaped me. And that I did... In 2011, I became the FIRST female EVER elected to serve as the Mayor of Irving, Texas. Under my leadership, the City of Irving witnessed unprecedented economic growth and development. On my watch, we added 40,000 jobs and an estimated $3 billion in growth and new developments. During my time as mayor, Irving was named the fifth safest city in America. In 2017, I was appointed to serve our nation in a presidential administration, working under Secretary Ben Carson. I am proud to have worked on many of the Trump Administration’s greatest economic successes, such as opportunity zones and leading Housing and Urban Development’s disaster recovery efforts for southeast Texas in the aftermath of Hurricane Harvey. Today, the 17-year old girl that left home in pursuit of the American Dream is fighting for ALL Americans from the floor of the United States House of Representatives. I’ve been asked what prompted me to run for public office; the answer is simple - my children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorism to achieve their goals. When I think about my two children, I want them to have the same opportunities in life that I did; I want them to grow up safe and proud of our country. Now that you know more about me, I will leave you with this: As long as I am in Congress, I vow to fiercely champion the future of America, safeguarding our values and principles for generations to come. I’m Beth Van Duyne, and Thank you, Beth Van Duyne Congresswoman (TX-24) Follow Beth On Social Media GET TO KNOW BETH: | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress. She’s been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. | Paid for by Beth Van Duyne for Congress
