| | Peter,

Joy has always gotten us through. Sometimes we laugh to keep from crying. But this joy... the world did not give it... We fought for it. And sometimes we outright took it. That is why we celebrate. That is why we Juneteenth.

This Juneteenth, The Collective PAC reaffirms our commitment to Building black political power and supporting Black candidates who are unapologetic in their efforts to bring substantive change to our country.

We still have work to do. All across the country, the GOP is working to eliminate voting rights, white wash American history, and thwart efforts to bring change to our criminal justice system.

Until there is no more education funding predicated on property taxes, voter suppression, police brutality, mass incarceration, environmental racism, redlining, gerrymandering, and so much more, our work is far from done.

[Join us to elect Black candidates up and down the ballot so that one day Black Americans can experience the justice promised to _all_ Americans.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3coLNd230CI6N8zUUyzTpUEI16Yt_NDLpMeSnKPeQ1BGN9tB9MCxknsACeyFG7o5lWJQs6UTHBUHPxJET634zIUouD2sWBNC-_Qq8hsSXN2_Z46fEbawCSXrKNfGJ_2HlsPDBSom6wj-OgZDJ39M7aQ_HPi4YSOZPE61Uz5pOX6LNq5PY3wVW45ECouQtrP2h2WieRjvMMms6Ff1hW8ArSBDF6Bt2uc1YZAfsWIlSqNRyBJz_iH5ITPd3JUOxGIwFzsmHQEy0qQn56xylkdYeNKAyPIMdLwSzetYYerVW69DZBOoHfoCraRcOc7-6i1JAYhG97Pe-OnEcBobRitnpuyCPKs1-2qSjToqqempqEpxL471XkFz9Jq5ornMnP3oPT/3x6/unNGYK9bSZ24fc8sCW1SXg/h1/DUTPTeUq4-h1fvyOC1VHvr5sCao3SaOT1iFw1xJ9B8E)

Collectively we win,

The Collective PAC Family

We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Let us recommit ourselves to fighting for fair representation, justice, and equity for Black Americans.

| Today, my team is commemorating our country’s newest federal holiday, Juneteenth.

As we celebrate the day that the last enslaved people were set free, we must not only reflect on how far our country has come but also recognize the long-lasting legacy of slavery and the scars of inequity it left behind.

I have committed my life to social justice – including advancing racial justice through voting rights, addressing housing and educational disparities, and fighting discrimination in the criminal justice system.

That work continues now in my time in Congress. I am committed to continuing to fight for liberty and justice for all and to uplift the voices of those in our community working towards true equity.

Let us recommit ourselves to fighting for fair representation, justice, and equity for Black Americans.

From everyone here at Team Scholten, Happy Juneteenth!

In solidarity,
Hillary Scholten
---

* * *
| | Paid for by Scholten for Congress

name: Letitia James
subject: Our fight goes on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65046059/412152158/-1997846888?refcode=jtk1102-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGE0MWJlMy1hMTBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0D_k9FXN__y-R2U9vZLzOD9jgCBxfI3Gkh3EdDv3E1k=)
---
Peter, today I’m thinking about how far we’ve come in our fight for freedom, and how far we still have to go.

When I was a child, I saw the Civil Rights Movement spill into the streets of New York. I saw my family members and neighbors join together and demand an end to racial discrimination, voter suppression laws, low-paying jobs, and unsafe and unaffordable housing.

And today, we’re still marching to fight many of these injustices.
Even though we’ve made significant progress in our fight for freedom, Black people are _still_ not free. **And, as long as the GOP continues to introduce bills that chip away at our rights to vote, plan our families, live a life free of gun violence, make a livable wage, access affordable housing, and more, we may _never_ be free.**
That’s why I’m still in this fight with you, Peter. When I made history in 2018 as the first Black woman to ever win a statewide election in New York, I knew my success would mean nothing if I couldn’t use my post to fight for the vulnerable. That’s why I vowed to do _everything_ in my power to protect the voiceless and vulnerable – both in New York and beyond.
I’ve spent the last four and a half years as your attorney general fighting to stop the nationwide assault on our most fundamental rights, but the road to equality is long and winding. That’s why this Juneteenth, I vow to celebrate ALL our wins – big and small. I promise to stay in this fight for as long as it takes to obtain true freedom and equality.

Thank you for reading.

Letitia
| | Peter, I’m up for re-election this November, and I need your help to defeat my Republican opponent and continue this fight. clean_body: | | | = Peter, today I’m thinking about how far we’ve come in our fight for freedom, and how far we still have to go. When I was a child, I saw the Civil Rights Movement spill into the streets of New York. I saw my family members and neighbors join together and demand an end to racial discrimination, voter suppression laws, low-paying jobs, and unsafe and unaffordable housing. And today, we’re still marching to fight many of these injustices. Even though we’ve made significant progress in our fight for freedom, Black people are still not free. And, as long as the GOP continues to introduce bills that chip away at our rights to vote, plan our families, live a life free of gun violence, make a livable wage, access affordable housing, and more, we may never be free. That’s why I’m still in this fight with you, Peter. When I made history in 2018 as the first Black woman to ever win a statewide election in New York, I knew my success would mean nothing if I couldn’t use my post to fight for the vulnerable. That’s why I vowed to do everything in my power to protect the voiceless and vulnerable – both in New York and beyond. I’ve spent the last four and a half years as your attorney general fighting to stop the nationwide assault on our most fundamental rights, but the road to equality is long and winding. That’s why this Juneteenth, I vow to celebrate ALL our wins – big and small. I promise to stay in this fight for as long as it takes to obtain true freedom and equality. Thank you for reading. Letitia | | Peter, I’m up for re-election this November, and I need your help to defeat my Republican opponent and continue this fight. = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Yesli Vega
subject: Jeanine Lawson for Chair
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF YESLI VEGA
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| Dear Neighbor,
Violent crime has increased by 70% in Prince William County since Ann Wheeler, Amy Ashworth, and their allies started their aggressive implementation of pro-criminal policies in 2020.
We are in the midst of the deadliest six month period in our beloved county's history (following a 150% increase in murders in 2022).
Data centers and developers run this county like never before, receiving tax breaks and paying only 50% of what they're required in Loudoun, while the average county homeowner has seen their tax bills increase by an average of $2,200 in the last four years.
This isn't campaign hyperbole.
These are the facts.
Cause and effect trends that will only accelerate and worsen with another term of Ann Wheeler dictating county policy.
Tomorrow, you can begin to change that.
My friend and colleague, Jeanine Lawson, has always stood up for our brave first responders, voting to increase the number of police officers, their pay, and against the pro-crime policies that have caused the crime epidemic we're living through in Prince William County...with no end in sight.
She has voted against each and every residential tax increase proposed by Wheeler and her majority (in addition to the Meals Tax) joining with me each and every year to lower your taxes.
And she was *the supervisor* who proposed raising the tax rate on data centers earlier this year (over Ann Wheeler's objections).
The contrast this year cannot be more clear.
If you're tired of the Wheeler induced crime wave, then I ask you to join me in voting tomorrow for Jeanine Lawson.
If you want to put people over data centers and developers, join me in voting tomorrow for Jeanine Lawson.
Wheeler, and Jeanine's primary opponent stand to gain personally from the destruction of our environment, the Rural Crescent, and Manassas Battlefield via the "Prince William Digital Gateway."
They're so interlinked that Jeanine's primary opponent has donated money to Wheeler's re-elect and every other board member that voted to fast-track the Digital Gateway monstrosity.
We can defeat this type of uni-party cabal that has been taking our county down the wrong path, beginning tomorrow.
Jeanine has fought alongside me for the last four years to put the citizens of Prince William County first on matters of public safety, taxes, and development.
If you haven't yet voted early I ask you to join me tomorrow in taking the first step to reverse course from this disastrous period and save our beloved Prince William County.
For Prince William,
Yesli Vega
P.S. The polls open at 6am tomorrow until 7pm. name: Susan Wild
subject: Today is Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
As we remember this historic moment, we must also grapple with the inequity and racism that persists in our country to this very day.

| Peter,

Today is Juneteenth, a day to commemorate the emancipation of enslaved people in the United States. As we remember this historic moment, we must also grapple with the inequity and racism that persists in our country to this very day.

Over the last few years, we’ve seen an increase in racially motivated hate, including discriminatory legislation, police brutality, and gun violence. Republican legislatures across the country have passed laws to make it harder for Black people and people of color to vote and have also passed legislation directly targeting how we teach racism in our schools.

I am committed to supporting our Black communities and finding solutions. [_**If you, like me, want to take action to be a part of the solution, I encourage you to consider making a donation to the NAACP to support their fight for civil rights.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65046114/412152298/818416900?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGZiM2I5Yy1hMTBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OlObP7WbzqUSxKyQdPgGQ-D6usEUE_EwqHoWgxB6ICk=)

In solidarity,
Susan

name: Wes Moore
subject: The promise of Juneteenth is my family's story
body:
Think about what it says about our country that the great-grandson of a man who was chased out by the Klan is now the governor of a state that was home to one of the largest slave ports in North America. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65046653/412154635/-1246499856?refcode=fl_em_na_20230619juneteenth_wm_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2MwNzY3My1hMjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KleqOop4YXTaRFeMBHVhC2zfUMeBUIZ6V6jQ-fMxcgg=)
---
Team, Today is Juneteenth – a national holiday that is not just a celebration but also a beautiful reckoning and acknowledgement of this country's imperfection. It is an imperfection that my family is well acquainted with. My great-grandfather fled South Carolina because of the Klu Klux Klan – an organization founded as a response to the end of slavery. He moved his family to Jamaica with the pledge to never return. Most of them never did. But his son, my grandfather, came back to America. He went to an HBCU, brought his family over. He always said, "I was born here. And no one has the right to take that away from me." | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65046657/412154655/-1246499856?refcode=fl_em_na_20230619juneteenth_wm_180da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2MwNzY3My1hMjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KleqOop4YXTaRFeMBHVhC2zfUMeBUIZ6V6jQ-fMxcgg=)
---
My grandfather and me
**This was a man who had a deep Jamaican accent his entire life and was one of the proudest Americans I've ever met. Because he knew his story was as much a part of the American story as anybody else.**
I tell his story because we are seeing an uprising in this country of those who want to ban our history and silence our voices. They don't want folks to know that the racist organization that tried to permanently chase my family from this country was founded in the wake of the Emancipation Proclamation.
* * *
But our history is our strength. Because when we know where we've been and what we've overcome, we know the path to a more perfect union.
* * *
My family's story laid the path for my governorship. It is on my great-grandfather and grandfather's shoulders that I stand.
Think about what it says about our country that the great-grandson of a man who was chased out by the Klan is now the governor of a state that was home to one of the largest slave ports in North America.
**This is the promise of Juneteenth.** And it's one I'm honored to fight for alongside you every single day.
Elevate,
Wes
P.S. Today is a celebration and an acknowledgement. clean_body: Think about what it says about our country that the great-grandson of a man who was chased out by the Klan is now the governor of a state that was home to one of the largest slave ports in North America. | = Team, Today is Juneteenth – a national holiday that is not just a celebration but also a beautiful reckoning and acknowledgement of this country's imperfection. It is an imperfection that my family is well acquainted with. My great-grandfather fled South Carolina because of the Klu Klux Klan – an organization founded as a response to the end of slavery. He moved his family to Jamaica with the pledge to never return. Most of them never did. But his son, my grandfather, came back to America. He went to an HBCU, brought his family over. He always said, "I was born here. And no one has the right to take that away from me." | = My grandfather and me This was a man who had a deep Jamaican accent his entire life and was one of the proudest Americans I've ever met. Because he knew his story was as much a part of the American story as anybody else. I tell his story because we are seeing an uprising in this country of those who want to ban our history and silence our voices. They don't want folks to know that the racist organization that tried to permanently chase my family from this country was founded in the wake of the Emancipation Proclamation. But our history is our strength. Because when we know where we've been and what we've overcome, we know the path to a more perfect union. My family's story laid the path for my governorship. It is on my great-grandfather and grandfather's shoulders that I stand. Think about what it says about our country that the great-grandson of a man who was chased out by the Klan is now the governor of a state that was home to one of the largest slave ports in North America. This is the promise of Juneteenth. And it's one I'm honored to fight for alongside you every single day. Elevate, Wes P.S. Today is a celebration and an acknowledgement. = | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner, and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: 10 TRUTHS.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of thes
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9dtqjoav8lohvdjkgeqka9gpp193k22sg3l1dq0_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie2o32clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uhijap5gc3i39dpkecrrbcdmeppjeoj36ioj4stlc2p71d9h66qbat1im1jbadtnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphmcaqr1o3nchj38o5jcgrr1db5e8iv0)

| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zl9ur5p488nvn3e3n73lot1bvfa2aonslhmlm798_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie2o32clh2bs)

Friend,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:
|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | [** CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z002inai7bbeujphhjmgaptt64t41p4rdralbfpg_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie2o32clh2bs)
---

America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. **Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing.**

If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, _**[I need you on my team.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvn3f68q1hneb2upp5r5v76mmk7h684gvsoquuag_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie2o32clh2bs)**_

This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. **[Will you join me today by chipping in $1 or more?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z14gm5rr9hfts6v88ho583mec2juh6ngvm3tnk8o_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie2o32clh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgl7t3h2qa36mb0diajnerfh3cpj5ftr5lbj2qlg_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie2o32clh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND WITH THE TRUTH **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zk9dus0fti1j8psu3deu5og78k9p5qdl6r6auvk8_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie2o32clh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.
[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zc88rv7dqmsg7fo788stv2j7e1kobp8qbpe9rv20_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie2o32clh2bs)

---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4hptsjqs7bamu6i784uh1iddr341utsk8rjcpeo_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie2o32clh2bs) | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvqpaj2q28nhn60o3as0rj476jt17l3p2na5hit8_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie2o32clh2bs) | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbaqp7ru6pnb0jjfotb52guh94r823e1pjcm1sng_rp22sh2s8i66o77chie2o32clh2bs)
---|---|---

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I wanted you to know about this.
---
| | | | | | | | | Please see a message from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, click **[here](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_s=0205c8bd16f04c0199f668b8f02896fe&_t=0mww8z_jtsNFBttZJabuSC6mP19Lc_gU8C_QH2g9E_x0LmtYnND558oFkGsZCMOSZoLTf79QdIGhTxlTY-hm7YMVlzMsA3GnKAgRNPfltQU%3D "here").**
---
| [](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=0205c8bd16f04c0199f668b8f02896fe&_e=5JMROh26lRnyjGNuR0Zs_egE3FxHpsO18DUusG6Z17NiiDsYhSUaw9f2GpLnuMKrXBTULgezGKaoOFP0dL3R8L7QzahE7Ho51EcebWjh3wGkiXzn1uE8xiI8ikhlOkMhJYyW11Q6kajXTqYvBQkcc6unVB5FQNxtqAbj-AbwvL7MNckP2f4Vtcyz5SZaux5WawectntW74cheFLXNXRPxwxQTSklqwBJ_Gl3aT-iixtygIXcDVMFEH1CJKMsMn5mKUkinxIx1gtnK76dx94mBhP0uBd4i-71-h6sqNxESZydue1D4AbEbOal6D0oTfXruUVbA3_EjFzHmYvLsHHPFUZaFRu5ISpVdm3z-DiAoaTFncl174lz153tyhKoJTgIIjI5j8gFGWiEyZrkpJWXtQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=0205c8bd16f04c0199f668b8f02896fe&_e=5JMROh26lRnyjGNuR0Zs_egE3FxHpsO18DUusG6Z17NiiDsYhSUaw9f2GpLnuMKrXBTULgezGKaoOFP0dL3R8L7QzahE7Ho51EcebWjh3wGkiXzn1uE8xiI8ikhlOkMhJYyW11Q6kajXTqYvBQkcc6unVB5FQNxtqAbj-AbwvL7MNckP2f4Vtcyz5SZaux5WawectntW74cheFLXNXRPxwxQTSklqwBJ_Gl3aT-iixvkXMqN3wfb2wmomephAdIurPy_aMiH6Geyq9okdBbS3JEknaaaSDnipyRVOyic04-oATdOoonh53uGGKNO_xxzhtPVOoBX0_7ab_Oqv682gGfS_V0FFaHA39gctq4TAIoFEip8sGq125oSe4bxSRPhdE48-0wLzZ1-H_zz1La7Ng%3D%3D)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It's because he HATES what we're doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we're fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That's why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=0205c8bd16f04c0199f668b8f02896fe&_e=5JMROh26lRnyjGNuR0Zs_egE3FxHpsO18DUusG6Z17NiiDsYhSUaw9f2GpLnuMKrXBTULgezGKaoOFP0dL3R8L7QzahE7Ho51EcebWjh3wGkiXzn1uE8xiI8ikhlOkMhJYyW11Q6kajXTqYvBQkcc6unVB5FQNxtqAbj-AbwvL7MNckP2f4Vtcyz5SZaux5WawectntW74cheFLXNXRPxwxQTSklqwBJ_Gl3aT-iixuWHv9YM9MK-p85f38hqLOg_JmcmiPOe09d1-MEE0uU0ipeRCYQ7yHGRBTerMoOtiAhsn_FRfYLOVXLGQKDcuoa472ukRATZ3rKpf5vjPHEJ7qHRq6S8VKq3VsfnIzBjiYMO8eKdKqqm3g7DxAeRpKHIxn4aTarzbVU_GOkHD9ZSw%3D%3D)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=0205c8bd16f04c0199f668b8f02896fe&_e=5JMROh26lRnyjGNuR0Zs_egE3FxHpsO18DUusG6Z17NiiDsYhSUaw9f2GpLnuMKrXBTULgezGKaoOFP0dL3R8L7QzahE7Ho51EcebWjh3wGkiXzn1uE8xiI8ikhlOkMhJYyW11Q6kajXTqYvBQkcc6unVB5FQNxtqAbj-AbwvL7MNckP2f4Vtcyz5SZaux5WawectntW74cheFLXNXRPxwxQTSklqwBJ_Gl3aT-iixs8n3lnay3EoSiuko39shvPCZzglGwarx_D0e4d0F_YBn6w38-e-LMlRAeGzjEqLZChx3w9YBUSd33Jls_nO_sZL0d7x7PO6Qokz-M8W5dMU_yWbgTexTXRq0PkNywTK3_IQuekflhRJF_6nfm_O08Gb5DU803vkPCth2a3dcvnOg%3D%3D "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I'M READY TO WIN](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=0205c8bd16f04c0199f668b8f02896fe&_e=5JMROh26lRnyjGNuR0Zs_egE3FxHpsO18DUusG6Z17NiiDsYhSUaw9f2GpLnuMKrXBTULgezGKaoOFP0dL3R8L7QzahE7Ho51EcebWjh3wGkiXzn1uE8xiI8ikhlOkMhJYyW11Q6kajXTqYvBQkcc6unVB5FQNxtqAbj-AbwvL7MNckP2f4Vtcyz5SZaux5WawectntW74cheFLXNXRPxwxQTSklqwBJ_Gl3aT-iixsZ62dBNCOLUKMCDt1CVd4Ui_-T8hs4opGNikxXn5qgVVBJdFnrwBhsqbDz0GkAXAbHBZaE3CiFfHgFtNo0SiweK9OjAcAEpWFvYqjIi6Hx_WDzKiySU3J0Bugnec2QoxeO4lFAH4OUJVmD5ERwK0eGLhe_nzfvtTy83i6zrjnPHA%3D%3D)
---
And we can win, Peter.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won't be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I'm excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here 's why I'm writing you today, Peter: [I want to ask you to become a donor to my presidential campaign and join our team.](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=0205c8bd16f04c0199f668b8f02896fe&_e=5JMROh26lRnyjGNuR0Zs_egE3FxHpsO18DUusG6Z17NiiDsYhSUaw9f2GpLnuMKrXBTULgezGKaoOFP0dL3R8L7QzahE7Ho51EcebWjh3wGkiXzn1uE8xiI8ikhlOkMhJYyW11Q6kajXTqYvBQkcc6unVB5FQNxtqAbj-AbwvL7MNckP2f4Vtcyz5SZaux5WawectntW74cheFLXNXRPxwxQTSklqwBJ_Gl3aT-iixvptshUosmuN9-CRb5qwfps-g2Jsah2B6AYaOsCAlPcQgIaUpBV67ZEu-tpQIiSxFvc5ZVYYcRTK1Tv5E8BECAdhI1bAcc-GMF49yzE6PTZnPF2AyfXpB1kJRSVTXv-zwmjUKhiNceXE_nFoo0Bm0sX9wpPKHd5DRTsXrhH7sHaYg%3D%3D "I want to ask you to become a donor to my presidential campaign and join our team.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=0205c8bd16f04c0199f668b8f02896fe&_e=5JMROh26lRnyjGNuR0Zs_egE3FxHpsO18DUusG6Z17NiiDsYhSUaw9f2GpLnuMKrXBTULgezGKaoOFP0dL3R8L7QzahE7Ho51EcebWjh3wGkiXzn1uE8xiI8ikhlOkMhJYyW11Q6kajXTqYvBQkcc6unVB5FQNxtqAbj-AbwvL7MNckP2f4Vtcyz5SZaux5WawectntW74cheFLXNXRPxwxQTSklqwBJ_Gl3aT-iixsSJPnD2oOIuQn9s2oc4z4OchDrNo3Xw5cN5IQdvw54aVEwdyuqtuolv0V_GqnlMnTjsYceggKikTAffO32c3KHlCnGI60I2EJcST864-FVbq2bxEhhdkaH_cId5NPRh0eHxU5U4zQT5gPVnYM9OBGncP-aW9xlRyg6CS9NEyKUdQ%3D%3D "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---

| [](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=0205c8bd16f04c0199f668b8f02896fe&_e=5JMROh26lRnyjGNuR0Zs_egE3FxHpsO18DUusG6Z17NiiDsYhSUaw9f2GpLnuMKrXBTULgezGKaoOFP0dL3R8L7QzahE7Ho51EcebWjh3wGkiXzn1uE8xiI8ikhlOkMhJYyW11Q6kajXTqYvBQkcc6unVB5FQNxtqAbj-AbwvL7MNckP2f4Vtcyz5SZaux5WawectntW74cheFLXNXRPxwxQTSklqwBJ_Gl3aT-iixuZ7nHWyVnwq-NsKf87DR_4vJu0e0PvvpXHe-Oj1VfA7adkfQYs1ef4hEJCMuKqRfymYKJS-vPEWnjHtsCnsSHsck1KM4z0NRL0Wtv7Rx1oVEzdCb34Cs7JOW8zVsnIdVjZGcI4HWuBCGa0RWqcOZBrtZR9D3A9bZRv7SAeVg-B-A%3D%3D)

In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country. But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. name: Shawn Wilson
subject: On this Juneteenth…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wilson for Louisiana
body:
Peter,Today is a day of tremendous significance and celebration in African American history. We honor the emancipation of enslaved individuals and reflect on the progress we've made – and the work that still lies ahead.

Juneteenth commemorates June 19th, 1865, when freedom was proclaimed for enslaved people in Texas two and a half years after the Emancipation Proclamation.

Let us embrace Juneteenth as a time of remembrance, reflection, and rededication to the pursuit of freedom and equality for all. Together, we will continue to break barriers, overcome challenges, and build a brighter future for Louisiana.

May this Juneteenth be filled with joy, unity, and a renewed commitment to the values that make our nation great. As I continue my campaign to be Louisiana's first African American governor, I am honored to have you by my side on this remarkable journey.

Thank you,

Shawn Wilson

Wilson for Louisiana
P.O. Box 4572
Baton Rouge, LA 70821

Paid for by Wilson for Louisiana

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Tomorrow is the primary that could decide abortion rights in Virginia
body:
Election Tomorrow!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1536ced-dadc-418d-9abe-17156a5cacdf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Happy Juneteenth, Blue Amp Action community! ** It's fitting that _today's our last chance to ensure the protection of abortion rights for over 8,600,000 Virginians_** _,_ **a state once the heart of the Old Confederacy. **We celebrate Juneteenth** _because in another Confederate state**(**_**Texas)**_,_**o _n June 19th 1865, Union General Gordon Granger announced that _Slaves were free_. _**_Today, we fight similar Southern authoritarians who **seek to deny history & make women second class citizens by taking away the very right to control their own bodies**._ [**_This is why the primary in VA tomorrow is so crucial!!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31eb2c32-2aff-47fa-bf78-dbba1872fc32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **It's no coincidence the _only abortion banning "Democrat," Joe Morrissey, __has the support of the "old boys network," even though he_ _ did jail time for a relationship with a 17-yr old while in his 50s. __Or that_** _** he's been challenged by an incredible Black woman, former Delegate, Lashrecse Aird, **_**_who promised she won't allow women's bodies to be pawns in the political games of conservative white men._ ** **Per HuffPost;** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e79ca9b-ad11-4255-8d21-ede5141268f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Yet, we have only til tomorrow to ensure millions of VA women retain their right to choose._ So **_l_** _et's honor Juneteenth's legacy and the courage of Lashrecsce Aird by electing her and doubling our pro-choice margin in the State Senate. _ [_With that in mind, will_ _ you rush_** _ Aird $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to lead the next generation of heroes to build on Juneteenth so we achieve true equality--including full abortion rights--for millions of Virginians?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d4c42af-d3b5-4f27-9427-7fc890e19c95/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting to move never let them take our constitutional rights. Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tede98b61-1860-4838-affc-534a479b0a16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: It's time for revival
body:
Our nation needs REVIVAL.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbouiijrf5dq3i4ubs6m2oga978in443kem4gg1o_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao76c1h2bs)
---
Fellow American, **Our nation needs _REVIVAL_.** These are dark and trying times for America, and now more than ever, we need to turn to our great God for peace... for hope... for victory. That’s why TPUSA Faith has launched our **Kingdom to the Capitol Tour** \-- a series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY STATE CAPITALS over the next several months designed to ignite the flame of REVIVAL in bible-believing Americans across the country! We’re traveling from state to state and gathering _tens of thousands_ of believers together to seek the face of our Heavenly Father and invite his blessing on our great nation. And we’re praying for the partnership of friends like you as we continue building momentum for this movement. In fact, we can’t do it without you! [**As a friend, a fellow believer, and a lover of our great country, can I count on you to partner with TPUSA Faith in this important initiative by making a generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give today?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5podul7f4nj2nfjr3ekduicvjd5hbobek9toaro_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao76c1h2bs)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuibt5uonem2espa768pj5duhci9fk51f6625sa0_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao76c1h2bs)
---
Your generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities ... to fill local church buildings with worshipers ... and to send an army of believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most. Whether it’s the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools, the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, you don’t have to look hard to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. But followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people. And that’s exactly what we’re pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship at these powerful events. [**But we can’t do it without you. Will you please make your generous and much-needed gift right now?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztp55gi6ecnjek5n9p2p21pcl33rbh3c0klrvt6g_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao76c1h2bs) Together, we can make these the first of many thousands to have their hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events. [**Your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give will enable us to bring hundreds more people to our Kingdom to the Capitol worship events -- until we've hosted one in EVERY state capital in America! -- over the next several months.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt4n4r6suo3inbar6bf3ntu4n72p3ospdf2lfb80_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao76c1h2bs)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf0f5jonrsfgq23a9e6v52pehppuemu312mfftqo_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao76c1h2bs)
---
Right now, we have events scheduled in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma; Austin, Texas; Topeka, Kansas; Madison, Wisconsin; Springfield, Illinois; Indianapolis, Indiana; and many more. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. These are desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God’s kingdom near. That’s exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. [**Will you please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of our world?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z473dine8o937c82np0qq3f6v798ogn13jlserng_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao76c1h2bs) Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=155%2E52803%2EKd-Ock)

| | 158 years ago today, the news of the Emancipation Proclamation finally reached the enslaved Black citizens of Galveston, Texas, more than two years after it was signed by President Lincoln. Today, we remember our ancestors, who faced despicable injustices, and still had the courage and the will to fight for a future they’d never get to see. They believed that one day, their children would live in a better America. That belief came true for my great-grandmother. My great-grandmother, Maebell James, was born just 31 years after the first Juneteenth, in the segregated South. She faced unspeakable tragedy in her life, and eventually our family fled to safety in Maryland, where my sister and I were born and raised. Maebell was always there, a walking example of wisdom, resilience, and dignity. [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2570?t=5&akid=155%2E52803%2EKd-Ock) I can’t tell you how proud she was when I entered law school. The fact that I’m now County Executive would have blown her away – let alone that I’m running for U.S. Senate! She was a link between past and present who taught me where we came from, what we fought for, and how incredibly far we’ve come. She witnessed America transform beyond imagination. I believe that our work today will give our own children a beautiful future that we can’t yet see. I remain committed to furthering that progress, and fighting for justice, safety, equality, and freedom for all, regardless of race, gender, class, or creed. Thank you for joining me on this journey. – Angela Alsobrooks
---

clean_body: | | | 158 years ago today, the news of the Emancipation Proclamation finally reached the enslaved Black citizens of Galveston, Texas, more than two years after it was signed by President Lincoln. Today, we remember our ancestors, who faced despicable injustices, and still had the courage and the will to fight for a future they’d never get to see. They believed that one day, their children would live in a better America. That belief came true for my great-grandmother. My great-grandmother, Maebell James, was born just 31 years after the first Juneteenth, in the segregated South. She faced unspeakable tragedy in her life, and eventually our family fled to safety in Maryland, where my sister and I were born and raised. Maebell was always there, a walking example of wisdom, resilience, and dignity. I can’t tell you how proud she was when I entered law school. The fact that I’m now County Executive would have blown her away – let alone that I’m running for U.S. Senate! She was a link between past and present who taught me where we came from, what we fought for, and how incredibly far we’ve come. She witnessed America transform beyond imagination. I believe that our work today will give our own children a beautiful future that we can’t yet see. I remain committed to furthering that progress, and fighting for justice, safety, equality, and freedom for all, regardless of race, gender, class, or creed. Thank you for joining me on this journey. – Angela Alsobrooks | | | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click . | Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate Alsobrooks for Senate PO Box 6058 Largo, MD 20792

name: American Action News
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3mc0ap0dk8brufmvg6torublim7q1tai2trjtpg_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao76c1h2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo8t3ekcanhcrp7scnhase4joo73h37c71lj1tug_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao76c1h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj1a2av42558blse21hitc1lfbjprsc8fdoiqih0_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao76c1h2bs)

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Juneteenth is more than a historical commemoration, it's a call to action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR BOB**](https://www
body:
Juneteenth has been celebrated by Black communities for over 150 years and its recent federal recognition marks a milestone of American equity and progress. This holiday commemorates not just emancipation but the day when the good news reached everyone. It serves as a reminder that freedom delayed is justice denied and true liberty is only achieved when it is extended to all.
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/f0OZJmIOe/c?w=XQwQUwwvDMV1RIDZSk-MiycB5raLTgYw6zEdiBzomks.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9zby9mME9aSm1JT2U_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)_**

---
| | This holiday commemorates not just emancipation but the day when the good news reached everyone. It serves as a reminder that freedom delayed is justice denied and true liberty is only achieved when it is extended to all.
On top of generations of barbaric injustice, slaves in Galveston were cheated of their freedom for two years, highlighting the importance of the government championing secure liberty not for some, not for most, but for all.
Today, our work is not over. Creating a more just society is a perpetually unfinished task, and our fight for equality is eternal.
Juneteenth also serves as a call to action. We must challenge and improve the systemic structures that perpetuate racial oppression in every corner of the country. We must strive to eliminate the remnants of racial oppression that still exist today — because injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere, and true freedom cannot exist until it is granted to every last one of us. Happy Juneteenth. Happy Freedom Day.
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: It's time for revival
body:
Our nation needs REVIVAL.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsft8bgflf6300prba5ul7hepdnfi4vvt313us1g_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao72cjh2bs)
---
Fellow American, **Our nation needs _REVIVAL_.** These are dark and trying times for America, and now more than ever, we need to turn to our great God for peace... for hope... for victory. That’s why TPUSA Faith has launched our **Kingdom to the Capitol Tour** \-- a series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY STATE CAPITALS over the next several months designed to ignite the flame of REVIVAL in bible-believing Americans across the country! We’re traveling from state to state and gathering _tens of thousands_ of believers together to seek the face of our Heavenly Father and invite his blessing on our great nation. And we’re praying for the partnership of friends like you as we continue building momentum for this movement. In fact, we can’t do it without you! [**As a friend, a fellow believer, and a lover of our great country, can I count on you to partner with TPUSA Faith in this important initiative by making a generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give today?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zinkuvktn1jbncsda53gu91ckh8jiqhgl5npjok0_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao72cjh2bs)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziufuihnufftesobsuij76btvp4tr23f0e56p008_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao72cjh2bs)
---
Your generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities ... to fill local church buildings with worshipers ... and to send an army of believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most. Whether it’s the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools, the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, you don’t have to look hard to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. But followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people. And that’s exactly what we’re pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship at these powerful events. [**But we can’t do it without you. Will you please make your generous and much-needed gift right now?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqa959rrueicsro9ijjp7plpf4th7ok6ul9rets8_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao72cjh2bs) Together, we can make these the first of many thousands to have their hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events. [**Your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give will enable us to bring hundreds more people to our Kingdom to the Capitol worship events -- until we've hosted one in EVERY state capital in America! -- over the next several months.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmh0i9o1tatmrsoq3p6b4s65ou6vj8glhjg0jnp0_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao72cjh2bs)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj5kvgr0le7um03knrtt1ar0muthqnuaq2pt2es8_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao72cjh2bs)
---
Right now, we have events scheduled in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma; Austin, Texas; Topeka, Kansas; Madison, Wisconsin; Springfield, Illinois; Indianapolis, Indiana; and many more. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. These are desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God’s kingdom near. That’s exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. [**Will you please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of our world?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv03ri81gkg5cb35d1s2a8o4jpad75dvl8d69f7o_rp22sh2s8i66o77chieao72cjh2bs) Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Who do lobbyist support?
body:
I was first elected in 2015 to serve in the Mississippi House of Representatives from District 6, Olive Branch. I'm often asked how I got involved in politics and what other political position I held before that of Representative. I had never run for any office before and was by any measure a complete novice at politics. I had always voted and I grew up listing to my dad, grand parents, and my great-uncle argue over politics. But I had never considered running or even thought it was a possibility. But on New Years Eve 2014 I found myself sitting on the couch discussing the possibility with my wife.

I was first elected in 2015, to serve in the Mississippi House of Representatives. I'm often asked how I got involved in politics and what other political position I held before Representative.
I had never run for any office before and was by any measure a complete novice at politics. I had always voted and I grew up listening to my dad, grandparents, and my great-uncle argue over politics, but I had never considered running. However, on New Years Eve 2014, I found myself sitting on the couch discussing the possibility with my wife.
Julie was not thrilled with the idea but finally agreed that I could take $2000 out of savings, print some flyers and a couple of signs and give it a shot. So right after the first of the year off I went, designing my logo, printing some cards and figuring out how to "qualify" to run and challenge the long-time incumbent.
I had no idea how to run a campaign, but the local conservative group, Desoto County Conservative Coalition, held a candidate training class one Saturday where I learned some of the ins-and-outs of campaigning. But even after that class I really didn't know what I was doing.
It turns out that $2000 does not even scratch the surface of the money needed to run a campaign, that figure is closer to $40,000. If I had known that before I started my adventure, I probably would have made another choice and I'm sure Julie would have put a swift end to my idea. But, since I was already in the race and I'm too stubborn to ever quite something I've started, I kept going.
The money is what I really want to talk about today because $40,000 is a lot of money and an amount that scares most people away from putting their name on the ballot. So how do candidates raise this much money?
A newly minted candidate is told to make a list of everyone they know; friends, family, acquaintances, anyone and everyone goes on the list. Then they estimate how much money each person spends eating out for a month, take that dollar amount, double it and start making phone calls. It is an excruciatingly painful process. Very few people enjoy this process but there really isn't any other way to fund a $40,000 campaign unless you personally have the cash in the bank or you know someone who does.
So why am I telling you this? Before my adventure into politics I occasionally gave a candidate a couple of dollars. I remember the first time Chris McDaniel ran for U.S. Senate I think I gave him $50 and I was proud of that donation. But I had no idea how difficult it is for a candidate to raise the money needed to run a successful campaign and I doubt you do either.
And here is another little secret, incumbents don't have this problem! You see, once elected, a "good" politician and by good I mean a generally bad, dishonest politician, immediately starts raising money for their next campaign. But once elected they no longer call friends and family, they now call the lobbyist. Lobbyist hand out checks every year, not just election years, to their favorite politicians. A politician just goes to the post office and there are $500 checks, $1000 checks and even more if you are a chairman or vice-chairman right there in the box.
So when I first got elected checks magically appeared in my mailbox. But only for my first couple of years after the election, because I discovered very quickly that those checks come with strings. They are not for everyone, they only go to the politicians who vote the way they are asked to vote. At first I received checks from the hospital association, but when they came out supporting medicaid expansion and I opposed medicaid expansion the checks stopped. I received checks from the auto dealers association, until I opposed legislation that protected car dealerships at the expense of their customers, then the checks stopped. After my first year in the legislature I don't think I received more than 2 or 3 checks the next 7 years.
One day I asked a lobbyist why I couldn't get any money for my next campaign, and his response was, "Would it change your vote if I sent you some money?" My answer of course was an answer he already knew, No. So what he said next was, "If I give you money, or not, it will not change how you vote. If you support a bill I am pushing, you would vote for it whether I give you money or not, and if you oppose a bill I am pushing a donation to you would not get you on my side. So there is no reason for me to give you any money. My money is better spent on guys I can influence."
So there you have it folks, if your candidate has a ton of money in their campaign account, and it is lobbyist money, then you can bet the lobbyist believe they can be influenced by money.
This makes it even more important for folks like me and you to give to candidates that we trust. If they hold true to their convictions then our money is the only money they will have to run a campaign. Without our money, the only politicians left are those who are controlled by the lobbyist.
Money talks so we need to start talking with our money. Find a candidate that will not sell out to the lobbyist and make a donation. How much do you spend eating out every month? I bet it's more than $50!
We have less than two months until the primary election, they need your money NOW!
_**PS - Want to know who to donate too? Check out[my list of candidates](https://substack.cc/redirect/44b65011-2a03-4839-a62b-cbd776e18a08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) worthy of your support. **_

name: Zak Malamed
subject: Juneteenth is a day to honor and celebrate Black freedom and Black resistance.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
It is a day to reflect on the hard work still to be done and to remember that the fight for freedom and equality is a tireless one that demands constant work.
#
Today marks the 157th anniversary of Juneteenth, the day when the news of abolition finally reached enslaved Black people in Texas — a full two and a half years after the passage of the Emancipation Proclamation.
Juneteenth is a day to honor and celebrate Black freedom and Black resistance. It is a day to reflect on the hard work still to be done and to remember that the fight for freedom and equality is a tireless one that demands constant work — from every single one of us.
I have been on a long journey to grow and learn — I am still learning. One thing I do know, as civil rights activist Fannie Lou Hammer said, “Nobody’s free until everybody’s free.”
Personally, I will be spending this Juneteenth continuing to uplift the Black political leaders that I have supported via my work at The Next 50, learning more about Black history in my community, and exploring the ways I can support the ongoing fight for racial justice — both in my daily life and as a potential member of Congress.
Thanks for reading,
Zak
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=113%2E8507%2EOFnHrQ)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=113%2E8507%2EOFnHrQ)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Happy Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Peter,

In 2020, I signed a proclamation designating June 19 as "Juneteenth National Freedom Day" here in the Commonwealth of Kentucky. This was the first time our Commonwealth recognized Juneteenth as a holiday.

158 years ago today, Major General Gordon Granger led Union soldiers into Galveston, Texas, bringing news of the end of the Civil War to the last enslaved people in Confederate states. He delivered President Lincoln's proclamation that all enslaved people were free and had equal personal and property rights.

Each year, we commemorate Juneteenth as the end of slavery. Today, we reflect on the incredible strides we have made toward equality, and what we must do to continue fighting for greater justice and fair treatment for all.

However you’re spending the day, I hope you have the opportunity to join your family and neighbors in commemoration today.

Wishing all a meaningful Juneteenth,

Andy

| PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
---
Andy Beshear for Governor
PO Box 4278
Louisville, KY 40204
United States
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: I’m thinking of Ms. Opal Lee today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
What happened when I called the grandmother of Juneteenth. |
#
Happy Juneteenth, team! Juneteenth marks the end of slavery in America. On June 19th, 1865, a full two-and-a-half years after the Emancipation Proclamation, Major General Gordon Granger issued General Order No. 3 in Galveston, Texas, that freed the last enslaved Americans. It’s never been more important to recognize our history and commemorate the end of the dark stain of slavery — especially as MAGA Republicans and school boards across the country are trying to erase the importance of the struggle for Black liberation. **Today we remember the countless Black activists who have fought for recognition of Juneteenth, but especially Ms. Opal Lee, known as the grandmother of Juneteenth.** In 2016, at 89 she walked from her home in Fort Worth, Texas, to Washington, bringing with her a petition in support of making Juneteenth a federal holiday. I felt a duty to heed her call. I was the leading co-sponsor of the _Juneteenth National Independence Day Act_ , which President Biden signed into law in his first year in office and makes today a nationally recognized federal holiday. After this bill passed the Senate, I had the opportunity to call Ms. Lee. When I told her the good news, the sound of the joy in her voice is a memory I will treasure for the rest of my life. So while we celebrate today, let this also be a moment of rededication to the cause of racial justice. Let us all work diligently toward the systemic change Black people deserve and need – like protecting voting rights and safeguarding our democracy, passing meaningful policing and criminal justice reform, pursuing economic and environmental justice, and working towards a more just and equitable world. I know that lately, the path to justice has felt impossibly long. But even in the darkest moments — let us draw inspiration and strength from the example of these heroes like Ms. Lee, and work together for a future of equity and justice for all. Thank you, Tina
---
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---

St. Paul, MN 55114
United States

name: Beth Van Duyne
subject: I’m no stranger to beating the odds
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Beth Van Duyne for Congress
body:
From single mom to Congresswoman >> I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. With your help, we held onto this GOP battleground district. And after a 24-year drought, I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. _**I am no stranger to beating the odds, Peter. **_

**I left home at the age of 17 with nothing but an unwavering determination and a fierce belief in the American Dream.** For years, I worked numerous jobs just to pay my rent. Eventually, **I put myself through college, defying the odds and graduating Magna Cum Laude from Cornell University.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=097171f092a244cfb367a1dc1b4c53aa&_e=RRmZ_GV_3sJ4b-KmEJPahMaJjHg4B0BKFR8TBvdoNkr7FS60Iv1_2qTm4UI7HjWTVkrF5d8izfbZZbZzzcb87Qf1D7x-7Hjn8wmpz-6cSgcqImo_2EyMAt8wRyDpEosFrh5PLIMqG3ycBZ3-URGDS7MGnwlkSM1qXymd6CpuPECKaXcDYlIOzdW82noUI_HshB8oU3vlE7d-yvo9XQ7AwLSpYxnQg1e93_uzIYMboFeU2dDeQ-20KPlH68_xJBZPOmAjWRDT2TXmZyb9MBBfpswSV3YSSAX6MiUcO6nROgTSoNDQbocqDnZQv4N1gR1McH5v0Y0FZ8lBDFmy6ckwpNU-lRPon4FwqC0km8TMRAyYCqcEOoB-EweA88xyt6eKNd8UWFc6uDyDKw0Hji3KSk-1Sa2hI-zX99-A8L9_iNmMh6zp5sqdAq25bokkz3EE)
It was a struggle, Peter. I was getting paid a little over $3 an hour and working paycheck to paycheck - living paycheck to paycheck. I paid for my own way through college with the help of student loans, and then I struggled for 10 years afterward to pay the loans back.

_**But through it all, I knew nothing would stop me from achieving the America Dream.**_

At my core, I knew my heart belonged in Texas. After graduating, I moved back to Irving, which has been my home for over 30 years. I was intent on becoming an integral part of the place that shaped me. _And that I did..._ **In 2011, I became the FIRST female EVER elected to serve as the Mayor of Irving, Texas.**

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? **Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.** She’s been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. **Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. [ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=097171f092a244cfb367a1dc1b4c53aa&_e=RRmZ_GV_3sJ4b-KmEJPahMaJjHg4B0BKFR8TBvdoNkr7FS60Iv1_2qTm4UI7HjWTVkrF5d8izfbZZbZzzcb87Qf1D7x-7Hjn8wmpz-6cSgcqImo_2EyMAt8wRyDpEosFrh5PLIMqG3ycBZ3-URGDS7MGnwlkSM1qXymd6CpuPECKaXcDYlIOzdW82noUI_HshB8oU3vlE7d-yvo9XQ7AwLSpYxnQg1e93_uzIYMboFeU2dDeQ-20KPlH68_xJBZPOmAjWRDT2TXmZyb9MBBfpmJMcHYLqdBDJN5A7ElwysUZBE6-KkHHQQhy2hf8-bOWVq0zztTSTkdiRd9aVlvCx4xjKIsgEkNTMzbt689L-k9YYArf7CIn_k-gvq60t8urqfT3fyKbd8g9h5pGmXVL3gP8Gc9fYBGFaXdXkiZ7eW97suDmeVVRpBsyMKHu0aZ1)

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: This Juneteenth, I stand firmly with all who are working to achieve equal rights and equal justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65055270/412180365/-876189841?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGQyYjJmOC1hYTBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uUSr_kSlK5fgcIptrFmwwCK2ooZNRIk3uL3RTARvsoM=&emci=6fd332f4-3e0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=70d2b2f8-aa0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Today is Juneteenth — a day to reflect upon the legacy of slavery and racism, to celebrate freedom and liberation, and to have important conversations about the work that still needs to be done so that freedom and justice are truly for all in this country.

Juneteenth commemorates the day on which the last enslaved Black Americans learned that they were free under the law. In 1865, Union forces made it to Galveston, Texas, and with them, they brought the full strength of the Emancipation Proclamation. The enslaved population of Galveston learned not only that they were free, but that they had been free for two years — for two years, they'd been free under the word of the law, yet not free in practice.

Too often over the next 158 years, a similar contradiction has remained. Black Americans face systemic barriers that white Americans do not — whether it's the right to vote, the ability to own a home or get a loan, or the right to be treated with dignity by law enforcement and the criminal justice system.

Today, Americans are increasingly aware of the ways that systemic racism has defined our past and present. The memories of historic marches for justice in recent years have not lessened, and many state and local governments have responded to public advocacy with tangible plans that begin to right decades-long wrongs.

While the road to true equality and justice remains long, I have hope for the future. I will continue to fight in Washington for comprehensive policies to advance racial justice – and I will continue to listen to those who've experienced oppression and do everything I can to elevate their voices.

So let us mark this Juneteenth — in only its third year as a national holiday — by reflecting, recommitting, and acting. I stand with all who are working to achieve equal rights and equal justice.

Sincerely,

Jennifer
---
Paid for by Wexton for Congress
Wexton for Congress
PO Box 650550
Sterling, VA 20165
United States

# PRESIDENTIAL PRIMARY CANDIDATE ALERT
#
We are excited to welcome the 45th President of the United States, and 2024 Presidential Candidate, Donald Trump to Oakland County on June 25th.
#

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: fw: I intercepted this email from Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
You should see this.
| Patriot,
---
As soon as he left the House floor yesterday, Adam Schiff sent out a fundraising email that attacked me by name.
---
**He begged his left-wing donors for even more cash to help him "fight back" against my efforts to hold him accountable for his unethical behavior. **
---
_**Schiff is _TERRIFIED_ because he knows this battle isn't over.**_
---
_I 'm coming for him next week - and I'll make him pay for abusing his office to launch a fraudulent, political investigation to sabotage President Trump. _
---
**But first, I need your help proving that Schiff 's liberal donors in California are NO MATCH for our army of grassroots America First patriots from all over the country.**
---
[**Please stand with me by rushing a contribution to help us OUTRAISE Adam Schiff as I keep fighting to make him pay - 1500% impact active.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62844963:JM7V8uIgN:m:1:3299561967:E174CAF99C0DF830684EFD26608F2DD5:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >> $400](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62844964:JM7V8uIgN:m:1:3299561967:E174CAF99C0DF830684EFD26608F2DD5:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >> $800](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62844965:JM7V8uIgN:m:1:3299561967:E174CAF99C0DF830684EFD26608F2DD5:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> $1,600 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62844966:JM7V8uIgN:m:1:3299561967:E174CAF99C0DF830684EFD26608F2DD5:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >> $4,000](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62844967:JM7V8uIgN:m:1:3299561967:E174CAF99C0DF830684EFD26608F2DD5:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62844963:JM7V8uIgN:m:1:3299561967:E174CAF99C0DF830684EFD26608F2DD5:r)
---

Thank you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62844963:JM7V8uIgN:m:1:3299561967:E174CAF99C0DF830684EFD26608F2DD5:r)
---
Anna Paulina Luna
Congresswoman (FL-13)
U.S. Air Force Veteran
---
\- - - - Forwarded Message - - - -

**From:** Adam Schiff
**Date:** Thu, June 15, 2023
**Subject:** Kevin McCarthy's personal vendetta against me just failed on the House floor ** **
---
[](Schiff Email )
---
My Friend, I just left the House floor.
---
Moments ago, the MAGA Republican effort to censure and fine me $16 million for holding Donald Trump accountable and leading Trump's impeachment failed on a bipartisan vote.
---
I won't kid you, it wasn't pleasant listening to the clerk read this false and defamatory resolution before the whole Congress. But then the most incredible thing happened - almost one out of every ten Republicans voted against it. The MAGA resolution was too much even for them.
---
But I want you to know, this wasn't just an attack on me - it was an attack on our democracy and the institution of Congress and one fully supported by Speaker Kevin McCarthy. This debacle was just another example of how far MAGA GOP extremists will go to seek political retribution to avenge Trump's campaign. And though it failed, almost 200 MAGA Republicans went along with it.
---
But make no mistake: This wasn't the far-right's first attack against me, and it sure as hell won't be the last. They will do whatever it takes to deter me from holding Donald Trump and his accomplices accountable, and keep me from being elected to the Senate.
---
They'll continue going after me in the coming months to distract from Trump's legal peril, to gratify Trump and his base, and try to tear down someone they feel is his most effective adversary.
---
In fact, as I was walking off the floor, Rep. Anna Paulina Luna - a woman I've not met until today and couldn't have picked out of a lineup - let me know that she's filing another censure resolution next week, "and this one will pass."
---
They are not giving up. But I've got news for them, neither am I. I will continue defending our democracy against the twice-impeached, twice-indicted, ex- president and his lackeys.
---
This team was integral in helping me fight back and defeat these attacks. Friend, I'm going to need you by my side now more than ever: Will you add in a grassroots donation of $3 to help me stand up to the GOP's continued smear campaign?
---
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
[](Schiff Email )
---
Thank you for your support today and every day.
---
\- Adam
---
[](Schiff Email )
---
[](Schiff Email )
---
---
PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
---
PO Box 23064, St. Petersburg, FL 33742
---

---

body:
Can you believe it’s been 8 YEARS?
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX_NcAOZsbHhwGG3FpdIVdWq6movkTN2ktliQ8E0zb-viNJev_c0ep_GxXnk870H8wqIV_YrIIJ8AcSDen37rA8_DrZ09SJKqxt121P8BIj5Pof_1eeVKkTH406NLXyP1CJREfpat6ZulWib4tor14X23HWK3OmM0ulGtZ6kEV6h9E1bcI8CpdB1V6tayaYiEUwTSDWNaQQKAiVunCo_JTf6j7xsca5oisXYX3Oe18ekAXBYA21LqG6cluD3xs7c71C6GBYmV35MnHJ53pJfHK-cLiVNMXLOIQAOicbW-JP36oSnGqkzGuSw5XiMwfMWQdqnr97hOm0LBZCW-OiejFycHV8SSPt00v-SKeWQMkjbSd0B6mMa2YO0X4aX9z8_f8mv3x7w8RFpL_at_q7duy2W3s83HkdetQElLvuC3e1vAAAA___blYzr)
---
Friend,
It’s hard to believe it’s been 8 YEARS since we first embarked on our journey to Make America Great Again.
On June 16, 2015, I announced that I would challenge the FAILED political ruling class and run for president as a complete political outsider.
We defied all odds and overcame EVERY SINGLE obstacle that was thrown our way.
But I never could’ve done it without YOU.
**That’s why I wanted to make sure to record a video for YOU commemorating this special 8-year anniversary.**
[**Please watch my BRAND NEW video commemorating the 8-year anniversary of our America First movement.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2q2zAQhZ9G3tlIoz9n4UXvFaEQKF209NJNkKVxMqklG1tuyNsXh_Ruv3MYzsf4NI80PDpm3xjAleLKAJj8wgBO6u3jmzn9Ornai4XXzmh131N4ZwDlMeNn9XWlweRp3Kl1VewgtBBChZ0wrRWt4q2urp1QrVeIreaWx34w2hrOdRRD36vBDqqiDjhIbsRBKKGkbgJHqzEora3mwANT_E65iVP2Y7yVZUtzE6ZUjd21lHl9TjoyOK4YtgWbO-UF497Ymf-LtU-4UPD1baJc6mHLcfG0Ur7UYUqJSkFkcMxhbG3sY1Q99ALCwRomj1tJ54SRtsSke_maHa7TtgRk0gU6-xcLPs2eLplJ93Iy_5MpF8yFSXeQ5sDAnPNIkUn3Q2L5-mj_vH9_wudHpLu4D_HT-N-uWro432kcaTWWKX7ZF-xu_wIAAP__wdeM2Q)

**Think about all of the many attacks the Left has thrown at us since June of 2015...**
_They spied on me._
_They tried to frame me as a Russian asset._
_They leaked false information to the media to try and sabotage our presidency._
_They intimidated my family members and associates (and they’re STILL doing it)._
_They censored damaging information about Biden at the peak of the 2020 election._
_They directed the FBI to raid my home._
_They impeached me twice._
_They unjustly indicted me twice._
_They even had me ARRESTED as an innocent man._
But 8 years later, after the most egregious attacks imaginable, our movement is STILL STANDING – and STRONGER than _ever_ before.
I owe that to YOU.
[**So, I hope you’ll watch my new video – and, ONLY if you can, please make a contribution on this special day to ensure that our movement PREVAILS in 2024.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2u0zAQhZ_G2SVyxn_xIgsupgsq2CEqNpU7dtu5xE5IHKq-PUoV7vY7R6PzaXyaBro-e2beGMCdwsIAmPjEAI7y7fRdH38eXe3bmddOK_nYUvjMAMpzih_V_UoTk6dho8ZVoQfsALGKfas703aSd6q69yaiscpztNp0QSmQ-gpgL9Ybzm2QFfXAQXDd2la2UqgGeTQqolTKKA4cmeQPyk0Ysx_Ce5nXNDU4pmro76VMy2vSgcFhibjOsXlQnmPYGhvzf2PtU5wJff0-Ui71dc1h9rRQvtU4pkSlxMjgkHHoTLiEIC9waQGt0Uwc1pLOKQZaExNu99UbXMZ1xsiEQzr7naFPk6dbZsLtTvp_MuYSc2HCWaEtA33OAwUm3Om3-_rnS_5Wphd8fUS4mzu1P7T_5aq5D9ODhoEWbZjkt23B5vYvAAD__zljjKw)

clean_body: Can you believe it’s been 8 YEARS? | | | Friend, It’s hard to believe it’s been 8 YEARS since we first embarked on our journey to Make America Great Again. On June 16, 2015, I announced that I would challenge the FAILED political ruling class and run for president as a complete political outsider. We defied all odds and overcame EVERY SINGLE obstacle that was thrown our way. But I never could’ve done it without YOU. That’s why I wanted to make sure to record a video for YOU commemorating this special 8-year anniversary. | Think about all of the many attacks the Left has thrown at us since June of 2015... They spied on me. They tried to frame me as a Russian asset. They leaked false information to the media to try and sabotage our presidency. They intimidated my family members and associates (and they’re STILL doing it). They censored damaging information about Biden at the peak of the 2020 election. They directed the FBI to raid my home. They impeached me twice. They unjustly indicted me twice. They even had me ARRESTED as an innocent man. But 8 years later, after the most egregious attacks imaginable, our movement is STILL STANDING – and STRONGER than ever before. I owe that to YOU. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Today’s a special day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | 157 years ago today, freedmen in Texas celebrated the first anniversary of their emancipation. What started as a local tradition became a nationwide event commemorating the end of slavery — a holiday we now call Juneteenth.

**Two years ago, Congress established Juneteenth as a federal holiday, and I’m proud to have cast my vote in favor of recognizing this time-honored tradition.**

But we can’t forget that it shouldn’t have taken this long in the first place — and the long wait is only a sign of how much further we must go before we reach full equality. To be sure, this is a step in the right direction. It’s an acknowledgment of our past, and a celebration of freedom. But it’s also a reminder that our work continues.

This Juneteenth, let’s remember our past, and keep fighting for equality and justice

— Josh Gottheimer
---
|
---
