name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: A note on Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
The importance of today, and the work we've yet to do

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65064953/412213462/1633369994?refcode=EM_C_230619Juneteenth_DBW_7__logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTMxZjhhZTgtYzAwZS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D-mW2K7LpEl3DeW1WgMnxZGduOGOQgghDYzhtoY77WU=)
Peter,

After President Lincoln issued the Emancipation Proclamation, it took more than two years for the news to reach the last enslaved Americans. June 19th, or Juneteenth, is commemorated as the day that the last enslaved people were freed in Galveston, Texas in 1865.

I am descended from enslaved people. I am also descended from people who took oaths to fight in foreign countries to guarantee the rights of life, liberty, and happiness they were denied here in the United States under Jim Crow. Their service inspired my own.

Today, we celebrate a defining moment when justice and equality were advanced for all Americans. But we must continue taking bold action to address the racial injustice that persists today.

As a Black man who has served our country as an Air Force Veteran, a trauma surgeon, and a community leader, I have navigated our country’s complicated relationship with race firsthand. I have treated patients in my emergency department whose need for my care was a direct result of racial disparities resulting from historical policies. And I’ve told far too many mothers and fathers that they wouldn’t see their child alive again as a result of gun violence. Gun violence disproportionately affects Black Americans, and as a surgeon, I grew weary of putting bandaids on bullet holes in Black men and women and then sending them back to environments where they remained at high risk of reinjury and death.

I’m running for Congress because I want to bring my firsthand experience from the frontlines of our epidemic of gun violence to Washington. We need the voice of a trauma surgeon and a Black doctor at the decision-making table in Congress. I’m dedicated to ensuring that equality for everyone isn’t merely an ideal, but a reality for each and every American. That means investing in education, better healthcare access, and affordable housing in the communities that continue to experience the direct results of structural racism today.

I’m not asking you to contribute to my campaign. Instead, I hope you’ll take a moment to think both about the importance of today, and the work we’ve yet to do to make equality a reality for all.

Happy Juneteenth,

Brian | Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives.

You can learn more about Dr. Williams’ campaign for Texas’ 32nd Congressional District here:
---
[LEARN MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65064954/412213463/1587297274?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTMxZjhhZTgtYzAwZS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D-mW2K7LpEl3DeW1WgMnxZGduOGOQgghDYzhtoY77WU=&emci=f597ca69-5a0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=531f8ae8-c00e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)

body:
Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. # [#]
Peter,

Today is Juneteenth, a day to commemorate the end of slavery in America. On this day in 1865, the news of emancipation reached Galveston, Texas, and the last enslaved people in the Confederacy were freed. As we remember this historic moment, we must also confront the inequity and racism still present in our nation today.

Two years ago, Juneteenth was finally declared a federal holiday. This was a meaningful step in the right direction, but there is still so much work to be done to recognize our nation’s historic wrongs and actively support Black Americans. While our nation outlawed slavery over a century ago, we are still in the fight against the systemic injustices that remain.

Let’s reflect today on our past and continue working towards a better future — ensuring that we are an accepting and fair nation, advocating for each and every American.

In solidarity,
Seth

PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: It's time for revival
body:
Our nation needs REVIVAL.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c133af0ce4049068a680f947cf3e8f5&_e=iU6_BPLJoveORS518A25kwVKDUC-tXeJbvZVd1HrTKcLnPqr3KtfaYb4NNjJddcDK0-EZlao5vW3HYs2IK0u4KHMfJ8Qyuys4cA4_D3-n8XRCcanclg9QKrK3I_o-6reRBBSdNIi9_WmbQ0EuDISZ0ex64CuCSaqYrctyrGXaQHiMnJL40OPbrsDYyCJFiPRBTCZfyS2Ot87bWXh0MkKCDh4Xe2QNAkZ_U7djqpkPDxlYQ5vlBY0Q1JY-tKBVp_m)
---
Fellow American, **Our nation needs _REVIVAL_.** These are dark and trying times for America, and now more than ever, we need to turn to our great God for peace... for hope... for victory. That's why TPUSA Faith has launched our **Kingdom to the Capitol Tour** \-- a series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY STATE CAPITALS over the next several months designed to ignite the flame of REVIVAL in bible-believing Americans across the country! We're traveling from state to state and gathering _tens of thousands_ of believers together to seek the face of our Heavenly Father and invite his blessing on our great nation. And we're praying for the partnership of friends like you as we continue building momentum for this movement. In fact, we can't do it without you! [**As a friend, a fellow believer, and a lover of our great country, can I count on you to partner with TPUSA Faith in this important initiative by making a generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give today?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c133af0ce4049068a680f947cf3e8f5&_e=iU6_BPLJoveORS518A25kwVKDUC-tXeJbvZVd1HrTKcLnPqr3KtfaYb4NNjJddcDK0-EZlao5vW3HYs2IK0u4KHMfJ8Qyuys4cA4_D3-n8UE01xESi6xbHsurxonid50yKesd_F3dfQPMR09aWz3cEhFQjZ_f8k45DynThPUemMD3pH4hUVV2ltFGvI6wu0RVSRMyKcI4RjJYcSqXwQagioUWmYTJgL9aSNK6IULwSvmLoyPSBDVky9VriUQwcNJ)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c133af0ce4049068a680f947cf3e8f5&_e=iU6_BPLJoveORS518A25kwVKDUC-tXeJbvZVd1HrTKcLnPqr3KtfaYb4NNjJddcDK0-EZlao5vW3HYs2IK0u4KHMfJ8Qyuys4cA4_D3-n8Xyuo8S0omVzhxJbJC8PN_LJ-0fEMlC8DWzIbqUuH-yx_I9q0iaPx-WjIBqH4f2KI5brudh7dN0E-fdjZkhEsvMFanAPLLbp3QIYOANGP4PwgV0590o4lnBp0kD67TBj6_7xZY30Dd5imcuWr3O2XpR)
---
Your generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities ... to fill local church buildings with worshipers ... and to send an army of believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most. Whether it's the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools, the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, you don't have to look hard to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. But followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people. And that's exactly what we're pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship at these powerful events. [**But we can 't do it without you. Will you please make your generous and much-needed gift right now?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c133af0ce4049068a680f947cf3e8f5&_e=iU6_BPLJoveORS518A25kwVKDUC-tXeJbvZVd1HrTKcLnPqr3KtfaYb4NNjJddcDK0-EZlao5vW3HYs2IK0u4KHMfJ8Qyuys4cA4_D3-n8WjxjheZl43hole2ctEDYHopBzzWxq0xBCl27mG41KcMM7kayFIMOkZngGSPtRPd5Q6HeJSESYnVpqNwh_sT-poEqw2RLdi82k_PX5ddgzzioM_v3IFhESZWHbU9jw6_6bHwFa9VkF-vL8Io9WMtY2o) Together, we can make these the first of many thousands to have their hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events. [**Your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give will enable us to bring hundreds more people to our Kingdom to the Capitol worship events -- until we've hosted one in EVERY state capital in America! -- over the next several months.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c133af0ce4049068a680f947cf3e8f5&_e=iU6_BPLJoveORS518A25kwVKDUC-tXeJbvZVd1HrTKcLnPqr3KtfaYb4NNjJddcDK0-EZlao5vW3HYs2IK0u4KHMfJ8Qyuys4cA4_D3-n8WCWRJQES_-1A7PXiEILxGPFVzKDFKd0k0xb9XgnTHTX6MGrP8KRF13uBEghJT7qWe9UQE-_ajrrKVHszwLKVfp3oo6UenYAzuCothuRPTgF289r6Refk-Es-rAlWDkx644aqxfzmd69vqwaNdzQXOb)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c133af0ce4049068a680f947cf3e8f5&_e=iU6_BPLJoveORS518A25kwVKDUC-tXeJbvZVd1HrTKcLnPqr3KtfaYb4NNjJddcDK0-EZlao5vW3HYs2IK0u4KHMfJ8Qyuys4cA4_D3-n8XsvjUP0z4tg9OVLaohbDni-QfX1PQ6DOFXWMekOMlHp7yM7zbp1sm2oddlCss0nz_ft33CSMkDIQb6rBwaho2NW3i6x5XtLYYLDt5G03RL6rzQxW-WuIpoCwQAtQJfYD-mVpZ2SOzEkm_sgPFG8UAz)
---
Right now, we have events scheduled in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma; Austin, Texas; Topeka, Kansas; Madison, Wisconsin; Springfield, Illinois; Indianapolis, Indiana; and many more. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. These are desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God's kingdom near. That's exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. [**Will you please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of our world?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c133af0ce4049068a680f947cf3e8f5&_e=iU6_BPLJoveORS518A25kwVKDUC-tXeJbvZVd1HrTKcLnPqr3KtfaYb4NNjJddcDK0-EZlao5vW3HYs2IK0u4KHMfJ8Qyuys4cA4_D3-n8VTK-im8ycvqPK0PDqa5PSUmnFKrrKf95Wjvd6XkJJpZB-fzKRlFr0396FxNoUgmKYBgH0lXHSpIrPB-V6JDu8RIGoVfiGmFfbCW5pfeoEwl9Gnw7lldiEewYWyChaCZ7B1agmen7CQV5CCEUuDPtUy) Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you,
---
Charlie Kirk TPUSA Faith
---

We're traveling from state to state and gathering tens of thousands of believers together to seek the face of our Heavenly Father and invite his blessing on our great nation. And we're praying for the partnership of friends like you as we continue building momentum for this movement. In fact, we can't do it without you! Your generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities ... to fill local church buildings with worshipers ... and to send an army of believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most. Whether it's the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools, the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, you don't have to look hard to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. But followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people. And that's exactly what we're pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship at these powerful events. Together, we can make these the first of many thousands to have their hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events. Right now, we have events scheduled in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma; Austin, Texas; Topeka, Kansas; Madison, Wisconsin; Springfield, Illinois; Indianapolis, Indiana; and many more. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. These are desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God's kingdom near. That's exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you, Charlie Kirk TPUSA Faith 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: The truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
Today is Juneteenth — a day of celebration that commemorates the end of the United States’ historic practice of slavery. It's a day to honor the freedom of all people living in the United States.
Only two years ago, a bill to establish Juneteenth as a national holiday unanimously passed the Senate + was signed into law by President Biden. It was a long overdue step to acknowledge the long shadow of systemic racism casts over America.
**But the truth is that we still have a painfully long way to go.**
We can never stop fighting to guarantee true freedom, equality, and liberation for Black folks — in PA + across our nation. As we celebrate today, we must recommit to the work.
Thank you, and sending lots of love to yinz + yours today,
All of us at Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230619-8419-footer&t=1&refcode2=8419_434096_egj3a9&akid=8419%2E434096%2Eegj3a9)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8419%2E434096%2Eegj3a9)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Movement Labs
subject: “Liberty and justice for all…”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rapid Resist Action
body:
Every day, we work towards a more equitable and inclusive future for all.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65067850/412221535/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230619Juneteenth_N_ML_90do_6_NG_B_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzZjMDY3Ni1jNjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAkYEfl7oc-tfNViXJ46_QgcGOump-damaUms0QGvcQ=)
Team, happy Juneteenth!
While the Emancipation Proclamation had been the law for two and a half years, it was not until this day, 158 years ago, that Union Troops arrived to enforce it in Texas and liberate more than 250,000 formerly enslaved people.
The ensuing celebration of **Juneteenth** became an annual commemoration of the end of slavery and has been celebrated since.
Today we proudly celebrate Juneteenth and liberation, but our work to empower and support Black, Indigenous, and other communities of color continues year-round.
**[Here at Movement Labs, we are dedicated to winning a future that works for everyone, and that starts with uplifting historically marginalized communities and giving them the resources they need to lead. Can you pitch in $10 to help us continue our movement for a diverse and inclusive future?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65067851/412221536/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230619Juneteenth_N_ML_90do_6_NG_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzZjMDY3Ni1jNjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAkYEfl7oc-tfNViXJ46_QgcGOump-damaUms0QGvcQ=)**

Through Contest Every Race, we’re proud to recruit diverse candidates for elections up and down the ballot and support the fight for meaningful representation in politics.
We’ve also worked with numerous Black-led and Black community-focused groups over the years, helping them recruit volunteers, organize events, and expand their power. Earlier this year, we expanded our grant program for these organizations, thanks to the help of grassroots donors like you.
**[As we continue the fight for equity for all, we know the real power behind our movement lies with regular people, not the rich and powerful who benefit most from the status quo or take us backward. Will you donate any amount today to help support the fight to finally establish liberty and justice for all?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65067853/412221538/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230619Juneteenth_N_ML_90do_6_NG_B_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzZjMDY3Ni1jNjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAkYEfl7oc-tfNViXJ46_QgcGOump-damaUms0QGvcQ=)**

clean_body: Every day, we work towards a more equitable and inclusive future for all. = Team, happy Juneteenth! While the Emancipation Proclamation had been the law for two and a half years, it was not until this day, 158 years ago, that Union Troops arrived to enforce it in Texas and liberate more than 250,000 formerly enslaved people. The ensuing celebration of Juneteenth became an annual commemoration of the end of slavery and has been celebrated since. Today we proudly celebrate Juneteenth and liberation, but our work to empower and support Black, Indigenous, and other communities of color continues year-round. = = Through Contest Every Race, we’re proud to recruit diverse candidates for elections up and down the ballot and support the fight for meaningful representation in politics. We’ve also worked with numerous Black-led and Black community-focused groups over the years, helping them recruit volunteers, organize events, and expand their power. Earlier this year, we expanded our grant program for these organizations, thanks to the help of grassroots donors like you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = In solidarity, Movement Labs || Rapid Resist Action 5515 S. Hyde Park Blvd. # 1N Chicago, IL 60637 United States ** | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We celebrate Juneteenth because in the state of Texas on June 19th 1865, Union General Gordon Granger announced that Slaves were free. It is only fitting then, that Black Texan Colin Allred is taking on Senator Ted Cruz--the former a protector of democracy and the rights of our citizens, the latter lined up ideologically and temperamentally with those Texas Confederates.
body:
Another Juneteenth hero
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3614f6aa-2018-45ad-951f-09c069255c91/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Happy Juneteenth, Blue Amp Action community! **
**We celebrate Juneteenth** **because in the state of ****Texas** **on June 19th 1865, Union General Gordon Granger announced that _Slaves were free_. ** It is only fitting then,**** that**[Black Texan Colin Allred is taking on Senator Ted Cruz--the former a protector of democracy and the rights of our citizens](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9416d83e-77a3-4165-8fe2-ca6577de39c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), the latter lined up ideologically and temperamentally with those Texas Confederates. _As Allred said during his campaign launch, Cruz incited & sided with those, who like Confederate traitors, laid seige to America, this time at the Capitol on Jan 6th._** **Cruz is the ideological heir to Texas slaveholders who had to be told on Juneteenth to release humans from bondage.**_Cruz has criminalized women's bodies, attempted a coup to overthrow our republic and has supported laws and spouted talking points to smear and discriminate vs Blacks, Jews, the LGBTQ community and more_. **_Allred, on Juneteenth, would've been celebrating the Emancipation Proclamation finally reaching Texas._** _He was raised by a single mother and rose to be an NFL star, Obama Administration appointee, civil rights lawyer and Congressman, after knocking out an incumbent in a Republican leaning seat in 2018. He is all that makes so-called men like Ted Cruz cower behind discrimination in order to compete._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T055d5b39-d475-4466-b0b4-3e8f7b10ff50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Le _t's honor Juneteenth and Allred's courage to keep fighting these fights, not just for him, but the promise of America. Allred winning increases Black representation, adds a strong voice from a different background to Senate debates, eliminates one of the most dishonest members from the Senate and holds Democrats' majority, so we can pass more landmark legislation from 2024-2028._ [**With that in mind, will _ you rush Allred_ _ $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so this next generation of heroes, like Colin Allred, can build on Juneteenth's leagacy to achieve true equality, for Texans, and all Americans._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee7e0aa9-881a-4d04-9839-32fcb285560c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for our Constitution and the true meaning of Juneteenth. Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19dd7155-6987-4189-9a38-5b0c5271f187/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Like bees on honey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My Conservative friends over in the House have a really big deadline coming up

Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I have something in common: we don't beat around the bush when we speak to the American People. Who has time for that??? I sure don't!

So I'll be straightforward:

My Conservative friends over in the House have a really big deadline coming up, and I just got word they're falling **DANGEROUSLY** behind their goal. It'll be a real disaster if they miss it.

_**[With respect, I'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time is completely out. We've only got DAYS 'til June is over and done with. Do you think you could do that for me?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z740on3b39sg108hllg3ni69la8bask3u2jp8h98_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i60oj4c3h2bs "With respect, I’m personally asking you for just a few bucks before time is completely out. We’ve only got DAYS ‘til June is over and done with. Do you think you could do that for me?")**_

Look, this deadline was important before, but now I'm hearing Pelosi's favorite Super PAC has decided to spend $80,000,000 in top-tier swing states-- yep, they're investing almost $100M to defeat ALL my Conservative friends.

I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top...

With America-hating donors swarming to Democrats like bees on honey AND Conservatives behind their goal, it could be all over for us. **That's why I really need your help right now:**| | | [Contribute Ten Bucks Now >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z38egnqk5d65ihed1deoiqc8i9fj6kb95vqt6usg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i60oj4c3h2bs "Contribute Ten Bucks Now")

Kevin McCarthy asked...
James Comer asked...
Sean Spicer asked...
Kellyanne Conway asked...
Dan Crenshaw asked...
Jim Jordan asked...
Steve Scalise asked...

Sorry to bombard you like this, but we just don't have time to stand around -- not if we want to win!

_**[I'm personally asking you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo6guhd4v7gj11k6vlu8g0nuchjpov20p2q4sba0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i60oj4c3h2bs "I’m personally asking you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.")**_

God bless you,
John N. Kennedy

name: Kat Cammack
subject: RECAP: A few accomplishments
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001giVzu49Q-2kvhkZ60p8JrQa0sTzjzW87hPvNlyEWbovbPMq4tPP9RgIRfIpa7r_xNanM0LXIJzA2nkyXPR5K4OTxo44ZVMaAMTEGX-awKakW_qND5nt3fOrbdtyp3x6TfD8gNx5W68DgjMeBqOYK8q_L5lymuKnb&c=lq01oC6H3NmTASAhC5ziRKENFItb7HR6ga-2Ksb9KxoYkrEg52CvDw==&ch=pwTfVKjX6Zs3ccftfAv_ERyq_Y8rHKSHSNMQ88SJatKuLEnS-sI2Mg==)
---
| Friend
June so far has been a productive month for the House!
We were elected to make a difference in Washington and lead America on a new path away from the two years of one-party liberal rule. And I can say with confidence and pride that we have delivered well so far!
In just this one month, we have worked to cut deficit spending in spite of the White House's refusal to negotiate, protect American energy by protecting our strategic oil reserves, passed legislation to hold the DHS accountable for leaving our borders wide open, and hold the intelligence community accountable for targeting conservative organizations and politicians.
These are the results that conservative leadership in Congress can get us, which is why it's so important for us to keep the House and get Republicans elected to the Senate and White House.
I will continue to work hard for all of our communities across our nation, and I will continue to be a voice for America First values!
Thank you so much for your continued support!
Thank you, Rep. Kat Cammack
---
|

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Exactly 158 years ago today, the last group of enslaved African Americans in the United States learned of their freedom. While the Emancipation Proclamation had been issued two years prior, it wasn’t until June 19, 1865 – now known as Juneteenth – that the 250,000 enslaved people in Galveston, Texas were officially and finally free.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65070991/412223857/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzA5YTNiOS1jODBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxrUhfZpCr7t7KZlipiopingugwGzhxsGbpi5EzwHqc=&emci=6e1a1f55-bb0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e709a3b9-c80e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)
Peter,

Exactly 158 years ago today, the last group of enslaved African Americans in the United States learned of their freedom. While the Emancipation Proclamation had been issued two years prior, it wasn’t until June 19, 1865 – _now known as Juneteenth_ – that the 250,000 enslaved people in Galveston, Texas were officially and finally free.

Today, 158 years later, communities across America still gather together on Juneteenth to commemorate the end of slavery, honor the extension of freedom to all enslaved people, and reflect on the progress we’ve made towards equity, justice, and freedom for all.

I’m heartened, humbled, and honored to be taking part in these celebrations.

**But, Peter, while today is certainly a time to celebrate how far we’ve come in our pursuit of a more perfect union, it also is a day to reflect on how far we still have to go.**

With systemic racism and modern-day Jim Crow laws – like voter suppression and redlining – still oppressing Black communities across the nation, it couldn’t be more clear that we are far from emulating the perfect union that our country was founded to be; far from embodying the values of equity and freedom our country was born to champion.

So today, may we all recommit ourselves to the fight for _true_ freedom for all Americans – because no one can be truly free until _all_ of us are free.

In celebration and solidarity: Happy Juneteenth.

Onward,

Emilia
---

| Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [EmiliaSykesForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65070993/412223858/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzA5YTNiOS1jODBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxrUhfZpCr7t7KZlipiopingugwGzhxsGbpi5EzwHqc=&emci=6e1a1f55-bb0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e709a3b9-c80e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)

clean_body: Exactly 158 years ago today, the last group of enslaved African Americans in the United States learned of their freedom. While the Emancipation Proclamation had been issued two years prior, it wasn’t until June 19, 1865 – now known as Juneteenth – that the 250,000 enslaved people in Galveston, Texas were officially and finally free. Peter, Exactly 158 years ago today, the last group of enslaved African Americans in the United States learned of their freedom. While the Emancipation Proclamation had been issued two years prior, it wasn’t until June 19, 1865 – now known as Juneteenth – that the 250,000 enslaved people in Galveston, Texas were officially and finally free. Today, 158 years later, communities across America still gather together on Juneteenth to commemorate the end of slavery, honor the extension of freedom to all enslaved people, and reflect on the progress we’ve made towards equity, justice, and freedom for all. I’m heartened, humbled, and honored to be taking part in these celebrations. But, Peter, while today is certainly a time to celebrate how far we’ve come in our pursuit of a more perfect union, it also is a day to reflect on how far we still have to go. With systemic racism and modern-day Jim Crow laws – like voter suppression and redlining – still oppressing Black communities across the nation, it couldn’t be more clear that we are far from emulating the perfect union that our country was founded to be; far from embodying the values of equity and freedom our country was born to champion. So today, may we all recommit ourselves to the fight for true freedom for all Americans – because no one can be truly free until all of us are free. In celebration and solidarity: Happy Juneteenth. Onward, Emilia | Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjm4fkih9mum9b9mv87if6on95n3fc6raq9jaja8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i68p32c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zecbb40l28kuc75tq6nq1c42v52qu0jt6enak8f0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i68p32c9h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbnh5otstb7h42m947shd4jttu1c06k8rib8l25g_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i68p32c9h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoqcoj9vn7ab0a2bnp4rdv904r0ei0l227hf61po_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i68p32c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chh6co74slh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7p9jfbir61htu05qiftm17v1em2hgnef8j31si0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i68p32c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z61dgphmkdftjnjhb5vt39b24udilr9s82q97g88_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0sth68p34c9h649fg)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Stacked against Christians
body:
Our educational system should illuminate the world around us, helping us to see things as they truly are... revealing what's right, good, true, and beautiful.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9013433d0ef44eeb968b8481b765a748&_e=RZxUqq-Mw0S7ZJgvBob_VQsiapfxFbAcdQfnYmhjMktj1JEGm6vYBVd6rtg_9oZc5C344W7T63VLLeLP-rO7qFr70ZV9C6V1x8eq--oNHDVpS9FRYISPWMWCUlRBRMlekm9ionDlyaSYlpo0beRi9r2zMGt7tLfkKRZHLql3NDfYfsT4ELd7u6gIkRd_w3sEX8on0bq8CxXd3n8I5jGTXI69g-x7OzBvDbVr0NR9ghRvjxbq8YuuTKexUp_yfyoY)
---
Friend I gave my life to Christ when I was in fifth grade. But fifth graders today are facing a cultural, political, and social climate that is stacked against Christians. Public schools are teaching sex education to fourth graders, telling kindergarteners to choose their gender, and writing curriculum based on critical race theory. As Christians, we have a strong sense of right and wrong, good and bad, true and false. Yet, our nation's children are being shaped by an education system that vehemently disagrees with our beliefs. **_America needs Christians who have the Holy Spirit working in their lives to stand up for what they believe and let the light of truth into our schools, communities, and culture._** That's exactly why **TPUSA Faith** launched **Kingdom to the Capitol** -- a series of live worship events in **_ALL FIFTY state capitals_** to ignite the flame of REVIVAL all across our country. **As a fellow believer in Christ, I want to invite you to attend Kingdom to the Capitol when we 're in your state capital. ** [**But whether or not you 're able to attend, I hope you'll support TPUSA Faith with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100 to enable us to bring hundreds more people to each of our FIFTY worship events.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9013433d0ef44eeb968b8481b765a748&_e=RZxUqq-Mw0S7ZJgvBob_VQsiapfxFbAcdQfnYmhjMktj1JEGm6vYBVd6rtg_9oZc5C344W7T63VLLeLP-rO7qFr70ZV9C6V1x8eq--oNHDVS1U0UhqDDd5wYqCBFWMk7nNqzFVWhKR4Jw3MX4xp-31_-pIcatW4pHmLuKX5g00ix-uDBJOee4n5XQOtJ6ndwifdadjq_wvDilgWYR7KcsaYxtBCG8GOTJLaiB6fkUV7Mgsi7C0YsHTX65SqrUsdO)
---
[Support Kingdom to the Capitol](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9013433d0ef44eeb968b8481b765a748&_e=RZxUqq-Mw0S7ZJgvBob_VQsiapfxFbAcdQfnYmhjMktj1JEGm6vYBVd6rtg_9oZc5C344W7T63VLLeLP-rO7qFr70ZV9C6V1x8eq--oNHDUyLnrtCGF1w29uaDkgtiGLdV_-HXoyxLyk13cexfQ9S1CG1lH9m2X8PRa-4BiL66WQPV3jPJN3m1biOsJk2znGakYFaJ5cDGgmwTlb2SaT6m9YV7zGVduV9Vpri1rA3YXX4xCIdQ-AWMj08Mm8aBNx)
---
Our educational system should illuminate the world around us, helping us to see things as they truly are... revealing what's right, good, true, and beautiful. TPUSA Faith is on a mission to empower Christians who care about our nation's children and public education to go to school boards, classrooms, and city councils to boldly ask our leaders to do what is right. Right now, we have **Kingdom to the Capitol** events scheduled in Texas, Wisconsin, Virginia, and more, and we are planning future events in additional state capitals. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. [**Will you please pray for the success of our REVIVAL tour and support this mission for the glory of God, for the good of our nation 's children, and the future of our nation?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9013433d0ef44eeb968b8481b765a748&_e=RZxUqq-Mw0S7ZJgvBob_VQsiapfxFbAcdQfnYmhjMktj1JEGm6vYBVd6rtg_9oZc5C344W7T63VLLeLP-rO7qFr70ZV9C6V1x8eq--oNHDVgC1-PSS-m0THyzqFbRwmG8FhrxCQOLOBsu8PgxsFEO2dIra4mqgYGC5rlKPSjoSmGTudHhRQIGsjbUZ0AX8UztDqpolHumRs9RMo76swGMEQI-Dv12Xvp4AQXxkkFK4KEJZZD2vbGxmOcJ89Rl7nv) I believe this is a season for revival for our nation. These are desperate times in America. Whether we're talking about public education, the spread of socialism, gender ideology, or abortion, you don't have to look far to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. With the generous partnership of followers of Jesus -- like you -- TPUSA Faith will promote these powerful worship events far and wide, fill local church buildings with worshipers, and send an army of believers back into their communities. I pray that by coming together as believers in Christ, we will renew the hope of Christians and bring much-needed revival to our nation. [**As Christians, it often feels like we are being ganged up upon, which is why it 's critical that we come together in powerful worship and prayer in EVERY state capital. But we can't do that without you. clean_body: Our educational system should illuminate the world around us, helping us to see things as they truly are... revealing what's right, good, true, and beautiful. | | | Friend I gave my life to Christ when I was in fifth grade. But fifth graders today are facing a cultural, political, and social climate that is stacked against Christians. Public schools are teaching sex education to fourth graders, telling kindergarteners to choose their gender, and writing curriculum based on critical race theory. As Christians, we have a strong sense of right and wrong, good and bad, true and false. Yet, our nation's children are being shaped by an education system that vehemently disagrees with our beliefs. America needs Christians who have the Holy Spirit working in their lives to stand up for what they believe and let the light of truth into our schools, communities, and culture. That's exactly why TPUSA Faith launched Kingdom to the Capitol -- a series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY state capitals to ignite the flame of REVIVAL all across our country. As a fellow believer in Christ, I want to invite you to attend Kingdom to the Capitol when we 're in your state capital. Our educational system should illuminate the world around us, helping us to see things as they truly are... revealing what's right, good, true, and beautiful. TPUSA Faith is on a mission to empower Christians who care about our nation's children and public education to go to school boards, classrooms, and city councils to boldly ask our leaders to do what is right. Right now, we have Kingdom to the Capitol events scheduled in Texas, Wisconsin, Virginia, and more, and we are planning future events in additional state capitals. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. I believe this is a season for revival for our nation. These are desperate times in America. Whether we're talking about public education, the spread of socialism, gender ideology, or abortion, you don't have to look far to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. With the generous partnership of followers of Jesus -- like you -- TPUSA Faith will promote these powerful worship events far and wide, fill local church buildings with worshipers, and send an army of believers back into their communities. I pray that by coming together as believers in Christ, we will renew the hope of Christians and bring much-needed revival to our nation. Our educational system should be filled with the Spirit as it teaches our children how to discern God's will, how to live in society, and how to be wise. But you and I both know that our current public education system has strayed as far as possible from this purpose. TPUSA Faith is working to engage, equip, and empower Christians to change the trajectory of public education -- and our nation -- for the future of our children. Kingdom to the Capitol is our most ambitious and historic revival tour yet, visiting every single state capital in America with the hope of restoring American Biblical values in schools and communities across our nation. Together, Friend, we can spark REVIVAL in our beloved nation. God bless you, Charlie Kirk TPUSA Faith 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: 'The Warrior Class' Episode 3
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
The Untold Stories of America's Heroes
The Warrior Class Episode 3
Fox Local Stations aired The Warrior Class Saturday June 17th at varying times in select markets (check below for your local Fox time).
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mIkSamTHZck [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mIkSamTHZck]
Friend,
In case you missed it, ‘The Warrior Class’ episode three is airing on our YouTube channel after airing this weekend nationally on local Fox Stations. For future air times, check our website.
In Episode 3, we took you behind the scenes with the highest ranking Democrat on the House Armed Services Committee Adam Smith to talk courageously about his own mental health and the importance of quality behavioral healthcare for all Americans.
This Thursday I’m chairing the multimillion dollar national ‘Face the Fight’ initiative with USAA CEO Wayne Peacock. Why? Because every year 6000 of our brother and sister veterans die by suicide. Our goal is to cut veteran suicides in half by 2025. Sign up below today to get updates as we combat the stigma and do more for mental fitness all across America.
If you can, please click on our YouTube link, give it a like, and share it to your friends and family. These topics and need for change are too important not to be part of the solution.
Yours in the fight,
Patrick
Honorable Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Army Under Secretary
Honorary Chairman, Face the Fight

name: Katie Porter
subject: Thoughts on Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=24887%2E3422442%2Eb0889M)
Derek,
On Juneteenth we remember that the fight for racial justice is ongoing and that words must be matched with action.
Juneteenth has been celebrated by Black communities for decades, and in 2021 I was proud to vote to make Juneteenth a federal holiday. While the Emancipation Proclamation of 1863 technically freed enslaved Americans, slavery remained in places like Texas, where Confederates still wielded control. On June 19, 1865, Union troops arrived in Galveston, Texas and announced that enslaved people were free. Ever since, Juneteenth has been a day of celebration for many.
We must also acknowledge the work that needs to be done to uplift Black communities. I’ll keep pushing for policies and a government that truly does so.
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAI19_1_JUN_20230619_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=24887_3422442_b0889M&akid=24887%2E3422442%2Eb0889M)**

subject: An important announcement
body:

Washington")

|
Friends, We have some important news to share with you! Tomorrow, we will be going on a summer hiatus, taking a short break to recharge and prepare to take on the far Left and mainstream media establishment types leading up to the 2023 November elections (and beyond). We will still be posting a few items, but our Daily Briefing will be temporarily paused until our entire team's return on July 10th. While we are gone, we want to extend another an opportunity for valuable readers like you to participate in shaping our future content. We appreciate your opinion. **_[So- if you have not already - please participate in our candidate questionnaire survey.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61938549:W9gW-zDNz:m:1:2610672541:32BEF3D5D9FD8ED897AFAA4AB01D0C88:r)_** Simply **_[click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61938549:W9gW-zDNz:m:1:2610672541:32BEF3D5D9FD8ED897AFAA4AB01D0C88:r)_** to provide us with your input on the questions you would like to see candidates answer in a future voter's guide questionnaires. **[Taking our survey only takes a few minutes of your time, but the insights you provide will have a lasting impact on our work moving forward!](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61938549:W9gW-zDNz:m:1:2610672541:32BEF3D5D9FD8ED897AFAA4AB01D0C88:r)** We look forward to reviewing the survey responses and resuming our regular work on July 10th. Thank you, The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61938550:W9gW-zDNz:m:1:2610672541:32BEF3D5D9FD8ED897AFAA4AB01D0C88:r)

body:

Peter, Can you believe what’s happened to our great country since I left office? I always say, you can take the 5 worst Presidents in American history, and they still wouldn’t be worse than what _**[CROOKED Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’ FAILED Administration has produced.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dd8e4752fa634a0eb75e61099bf6ce31&_e=qlfz7mZqOqpPIndAj0vOHiQId5oPwg9-o35W2shM5rXpm7v68rUkvmEl89oOeE_C34sVpYtGHidkLsqDaRi1xjhq6SAE_7l3W-2RwT8YymUM6oOXWbf1J4OeWH--UgaImBTrgSg6ChwLx9n_bRnKU4UUFt4oAsQmEqND8BIk1YaLDSXDR9wUjCWSUH19a94y4wxYtM3qQcWZVgS8Hwj3KPDiWkaJQCJJT5-dZtkHV2sgA7ENW9cxQIwXGBK8vHhoj151HLdnq8q09rj7JPfWOzIIWhKMfRsW7-uGmSIaXN5oSNp_m2dhJt4Q1dRHO3qU5mHvk4PI2sf7GRB-dAWv7wwmbS51OlNOns4PqvZqTqHHpJS0umiB-K2SlgzKxBXG-iGVGexCqDmc72TTP5h8-d-zW_sPr5rtSE0XD0kxx8Y%3D)**_ The fake news media, run by the Democrat Party, wants you to forget how Biden has made a mockery out of OUR country, but we can’t let them get away with it. Peter, we cannot let them forget...
1. The disastrous and DEADLY Afghanistan Withdrawal
2. The total destruction of our southern border
3. Defunding the police, leading to a SURGE in violent crime nationwide
4. The horrific and TOTALLY preventable Russian invasion of Ukraine
5. Massive spikes in your gasoline prices
6. And so much more

2024 is our last shot at Making America Great Again. When I’m back in the White House, Peter, I _NEED a Republican Majority in the Senate_ to pass our America First Agenda. name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669703%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JNXsLTj05%2bqIHo1ncTci7g&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669704%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JESqtEMozswPoLvIT7hZ%2bw&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669704%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JESqtEMozswPoLvIT7hZ%2bw&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: My email is less than 400 words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I think most candidates get this wrong, and I want to set the record straight.
---

| | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=598ebfb4e53a4cb6bfe18e38c7777f11&_e=aXywA-gSHISdnQLezfqLHJiY4MARbnBEgcWJud9LBbw3KcY1ADzItKqDQKi8SjaU_Nc1WWY2sURhQsS7RTO8s9iGl43jbxppu7QOgrtoCx98GDfofILWjd08_qoNO7yJrgrbBqkFUa969E4mQulMpe5IzFipmtQn7vK2sa5IHiXXXinCAsf6BVGYdPRIACAtrj9pgd_yB3CNMiZVOfoDGcyJi7zOxhLNSwotD0A7DN3EfLpQxId7wb4lQL_bKxmRoXkDifvHQ7q8qoanO1g3fMn0GXdc6NMWU4mbzJ9KPy3Ky3qzEZ0Are8S8RoDOsiaKIuabAgrf5AnW8Qe_W27qaFeaGxaERDrXMNjI3mDJYFj22HrX0ehIlah3l3cRICfhpqCOUK_Z92fUEK_HldmScVThYr7PAkvWjcMZtoTvv_l_Ab9FtJvkAIycsX1o3E4)
---

Fellow Conservative, During my time serving as Florida's 46th governor, we went through one of the most pivotal moments in our nation's history: the Covid crisis. It fell upon the shoulders of our nation and tested every one of our elected leaders. And that test was about more than just getting the policy right--_**it was about demonstrating true leadership. **_

Before, during, and after the pandemic, I've led Florida my own way--**bucking Fauci,** **bucking the establishment,** and **bucking the media. **
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=598ebfb4e53a4cb6bfe18e38c7777f11&_e=aXywA-gSHISdnQLezfqLHJiY4MARbnBEgcWJud9LBbw3KcY1ADzItKqDQKi8SjaU_Nc1WWY2sURhQsS7RTO8s9iGl43jbxppu7QOgrtoCx98GDfofILWjd08_qoNO7yJrgrbBqkFUa969E4mQulMpe5IzFipmtQn7vK2sa5IHiXXXinCAsf6BVGYdPRIACAtrj9pgd_yB3CNMiZVOfoDGcyJi7zOxhLNSwotD0A7DN3EfLpQxId7wb4lQL_bKxmRoXkDifvHQ7q8qoanO1g3fMn0GXdc6NMWU4mbzJ9KPy2lg2Z1uHwzXtjot9mfD0Ll5rIJhkFE7kr2Ql5fz2vlprgrInsi6TJxWiUMwJ9F0DxZ5uEClljrL30RRoe3iDpDQ7poQ5kfZxRTFqFLdcCgFgHM15d4X-j_YLstM6MtjxBRnwnR-85k2oiY2qM3wdrK)
---

Unsurprisingly, this refusal to back down, my unwillingness to waiver, has brought on incoming daily assaults and smears like no governor has ever faced while many supporters have warned me to change course so I can remain in politics.

But, Fellow Conservative, a leader does not put his own short-term political calculation ahead of the greater good. Leadership is not about entertainment. It's not about building a brand. It's not about virtue signaling. _**Leadership is ultimately about producing results for the people that you represent --the people that you serve.**_ To produce these results, we must defeat Biden, restore energy to the executive, and reinstate common sense as a common virtue across our nation.

This starts with:
* Swiftly and completely securing our Southern border

* Rebuilding the post-Covid economy in a way that supports our working families and our seniors hardest hit by inflation

* Ensuring our school systems are designed to focus on educating our kids--NOT indoctrinating them

In Florida, even my most significant political adversaries have acknowledged that when the governor says he's going to do something, he is going to do it.

Fellow Conservative, you can take that to the bank.

As I lay out my vision for America, you can rest assured that I WILL follow through. I do not make campaign promises that I do not mean or cannot achieve.

I pledge to you, Fellow Conservative, that as President, I will be an energetic executive who will go on offense to take the big issues head-on. I will never shy away from a fight because the media or the Left doesn't like it. We are going to reverse Biden's disastrous policies. _**And we are going to start on DAY ONE. **_

As the campaign heats up and the Left begins to pour even more money into attack tactics to cripple our Great American Comeback, I'm going to need your support to stand up and stand strong. **[Will you join me, Fellow Conservative?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=598ebfb4e53a4cb6bfe18e38c7777f11&_e=aXywA-gSHISdnQLezfqLHJiY4MARbnBEgcWJud9LBbw3KcY1ADzItKqDQKi8SjaU_Nc1WWY2sURhQsS7RTO8s9iGl43jbxppu7QOgrtoCx98GDfofILWjd08_qoNO7yJrgrbBqkFUa969E4mQulMpe5IzFipmtQn7vK2sa5IHiXXXinCAsf6BVGYdPRIACAtrj9pgd_yB3CNMiZVOfoDGcyJi7zOxhLNSwotD0A7DN3EfLpQxId7wb4lQL_bKxmRoXkDifvHQ7q8qoanO1g3fMn0GXdc6NMWU4mbzJ9KPy2UBbQz5SHyenlJt2Xm0VhZvzjzJYTHGvKotI9mAEEivGc34PH9n4uuFWf0K4r3cbJ_-B_AGrf5BdyeVf6QNBBt--SgpQh9ZO51BI8Kkp8e567K2vEhW7bJM7cAsS2UEliRioSmqWPs8zrYC0-oDj9_ "Will you join me, Fellow Conservative?") **

| | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=598ebfb4e53a4cb6bfe18e38c7777f11&_e=aXywA-gSHISdnQLezfqLHJiY4MARbnBEgcWJud9LBbw3KcY1ADzItKqDQKi8SjaU_Nc1WWY2sURhQsS7RTO8s9iGl43jbxppu7QOgrtoCx98GDfofILWjd08_qoNO7yJrgrbBqkFUa969E4mQulMpe5IzFipmtQn7vK2sa5IHiXXXinCAsf6BVGYdPRIACAtrj9pgd_yB3CNMiZVOfoDGcyJi7zOxhLNSwotD0A7DN3EfLpQxId7wb4lQL_bKxmRoXkDifvHQ7q8qoanO1g3fMn0GXdc6NMWU4mbzJ9KPy04f5TuoB8Y_aDmvx0iMdTOW5EINoaBR1Xe9i4ohJhskdeIsIeEOENy7iXFAz1GYuK8EUWALrTRDOLrIc4qhHLzkhUnvWLq2z7eMwTxFX2KDpXb5UY7sSHJAiXVbCqDr6dtWT8EpC9L_pWPlTkKHXIZ)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

clean_body: I think most candidates get this wrong, and I want to set the record straight. | | | | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, During my time serving as Florida's 46th governor, we went through one of the most pivotal moments in our nation's history: the Covid crisis. It fell upon the shoulders of our nation and tested every one of our elected leaders. And that test was about more than just getting the policy right--it was about demonstrating true leadership. Before, during, and after the pandemic, I've led Florida my own way--bucking Fauci, bucking the establishment, and bucking the media. | Unsurprisingly, this refusal to back down, my unwillingness to waiver, has brought on incoming daily assaults and smears like no governor has ever faced while many supporters have warned me to change course so I can remain in politics. But, Fellow Conservative, a leader does not put his own short-term political calculation ahead of the greater good. Leadership is not about entertainment. It's not about building a brand. It's not about virtue signaling. Leadership is ultimately about producing results for the people that you represent --the people that you serve. To produce these results, we must defeat Biden, restore energy to the executive, and reinstate common sense as a common virtue across our nation. This starts with: Swiftly and completely securing our Southern border Rebuilding the post-Covid economy in a way that supports our working families and our seniors hardest hit by inflation Ensuring our school systems are designed to focus on educating our kids--NOT indoctrinating them In Florida, even my most significant political adversaries have acknowledged that when the governor says he's going to do something, he is going to do it. Fellow Conservative, you can take that to the bank. As I lay out my vision for America, you can rest assured that I WILL follow through. I do not make campaign promises that I do not mean or cannot achieve. I pledge to you, Fellow Conservative, that as President, I will be an energetic executive who will go on offense to take the big issues head-on. I will never shy away from a fight because the media or the Left doesn't like it. We are going to reverse Biden's disastrous policies. And we are going to start on DAY ONE. As the campaign heats up and the Left begins to pour even more money into attack tactics to cripple our Great American Comeback, I'm going to need your support to stand up and stand strong. "Will you join me, Fellow Conservative?" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Let's prove to the Left that we have the strength to defeat any adversary. Success is attainable. Decline is a choice. And freedom is worth fighting for. Are you ready to join the team? name: Lateefah Simon
subject: It's Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
We must continue the fight.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=45%2E1163%2ECBX4SQ)
Today is Juneteenth, marking the day that 250,000 enslaved Texans learned of their freedom through the Emancipation Proclamation and commemorating the struggle for Black liberation that folks like me continue to fight for each and every day.
Juneteenth has only been a federal holiday for three years – but it’s a critical reminder that the work for justice and liberty takes time. We must never stop fighting for true equality.
The systemic injustices of our political system and our society still burden Black folks in expansive and deep ways, and our movement must dismantle them from stem to root.
It’s incumbent on us all to honor, unify, and recommit to the work of those before us and those now who fought and are fighting for Black lives, Black voices, and Black votes.
**I hope you have a blessed weekend with those you love. Thank you for standing alongside me, and have an excellent day.**
Together,
Lateefah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230619&t=2&refcode2=45_1163_CBX4SQ&akid=45%2E1163%2ECBX4SQ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=45%2E1163%2ECBX4SQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=45%2E1163%2ECBX4SQ)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8b47rgjn0m6vb9qon7hb0kfr85754b48hhkg8q8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8cufatqg10to9u5dl6ue11bi8n1nk5m459a55do_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z054burpmerlf1ason06d99k77bhqh7b0rfn8qh8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z54igsiss4kpfjgvv65aafj64blco8834aojulv0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpl0q9pgid5bja0aer3ultspv7cir7479l0u3tcg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zatvfvmqr9fv4vqtsvtsmiqop93khpkdme58ugs8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsb5jnl43aluj4sn8f5n9d4af5ghh47o4idststo_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z552jucaomj1br7386f1akuivbbfqogl2c221v3o_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z08sor1koooueho9qvn4qobghruciq33r7kdns7g_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg0pqqmi18tjmo43ljmgtfjc3do666sr92vg8vl0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm5nc5p3pbtco2f6mcst39j38nhn6dta5uihrt60_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs71firju4nuuafdrcmv97lhacl4fajncin0tjt8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z19r2no57cphotq9bannb5qk0rap06ub62ra10p8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfee7pu7tekug7jeuttmag589o35ddpp8qp6hap8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcbrsk9o5ak5tjj1agtcer8nt4mps9nj0qnc7qjg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Pro Life Update

Deciding when and how much to invest for retirement is one of most important financial decisions people will make in their lifetime. However, it can also be one of the most complex and challenging ones with several tax rules, fund types and investment plans to utilize. One such plan, available to members of the uniformed services and federal government employees, is the Thrift Savings Plan (TSP).
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlbrddbgn2bphl75v29busmppb1tmfk4ejvr63qo_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64o31c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1hmf934suib7cpnm9qr8cbkmupr8cdlkdq3b83nm4r38djhemgrad1h6pqqet5h6kqq4t1jmsqb7dplk4qbcthlepr79dtjmmjr7dd36kojacjk66qqedtjekp77ddl6eonctd2ekon9cjl6mqj7cblk1or8ctnk8iv0)
