subject: reaching out this Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65075732/412227744/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1232-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkYmZhN2NjLWNiMGUtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T0MwMuO_EjD7-RL2IZCFHxyBehiKeILIotKRqtq3pB4=)
---
Peter,
**Today is Juneteenth and I wanted to take a few minutes to reflect on this occasion and give you an important update on Emerge’s work to achieve fair representation at every level of our government.**
We can’t afford to let the meaning of this day fall out of focus. After the Emancipation Proclamation, the news that slavery had been abolished was deliberately withheld from enslaved Black Americans across the South. **It was more than a century later that all Black Americans won the right to vote. And now, all these decades later, that right is under attack again. That's why we chose the theme "Defenders of Democracy” for our annual Emerge event for the second year running. We showcased the incredible Emerge alums who have been protectors of our fundamental rights and champions of progressive change at all levels of government.**
As Emerge’s first Black woman president, I’m proud to lead an organization dedicated to changing the face of power, politics, and leadership in our country – so we can achieve policies that address the lived experience of all our communities. To that end, **we must empower more Black women to lead at every level of office – from school boards to the U.S. Congress – and continue to support committed changemakers in our communities across the South.**
**Juneteenth is a reminder that real and lasting change won’t happen overnight** , and an important opportunity to look clear-eyed at the state of our democracy right now. We must pay close attention to the ongoing battles for fairness, equity, and meaningful representation at every level of our government. **And we must act to ensure that Black voices are heard and uplifted in the halls of power.**
In the face of far-right extremists attacking our rights and democratic institutions, concerned Americans are counting on progressive, compassionate, and diverse leadership to turn our country around. **Emerge is critical to this mission. We have 246 Black alums proudly serving in office right now, and we work day in and day out to train more bold women of the New American Majority to run and win.**
Our work is far from over, but by continuing to build our movement, Emerge is advancing the fight for real representation so that all our communities can thrive.

Thank you for being a part of this crucial work.
Standing with you,

A’shanti Gholar
President, Emerge
| | Emerge is working tirelessly to change the face of politics and ensure that bold Democratic women have the support they need to fight for the rights, dignity, and prosperity of all our communities. [**Will you donate $5 or more in honor of Juneteenth to help recruit, train, and empower Democratic women to run for office in every state?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65075733/412227745/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1232-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkYmZhN2NjLWNiMGUtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T0MwMuO_EjD7-RL2IZCFHxyBehiKeILIotKRqtq3pB4=)

| | My Sisters and Brothers, Juneteenth National Independence Day is an extraordinary accomplishment in the fight for equality, marking a monumental milestone in American history. The lessons left out of history books for far too long will now be taught in classrooms from coast to coast, celebrating significant progress for all Americans! As we march ahead in our mission for equality and justice, join me in reflecting on the tremendous progress we have made. Let's celebrate this Juneteenth National Independence Day and keep up the fight for a brighter future! [**For events in Milwaukee, you can find information here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65075818/412227874/1187394979?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTUxZTFkOS1jYjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_d2cDUZdVQb2eO-PlM67lna8MAJyk_e4BXrqfO7cGeA=&emci=9f05c63e-ca0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=da51e1d9-cb0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1486204) It's our 52nd annual Juneteenth Festival, one of the country's longest-running Juneteenth celebrations. Join us!

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: Juneteenth National Independence Day is an extraordinary accomplishment.| | | | | My Sisters and Brothers, Juneteenth National Independence Day is an extraordinary accomplishment in the fight for equality, marking a monumental milestone in American history. The lessons left out of history books for far too long will now be taught in classrooms from coast to coast, celebrating significant progress for all Americans! As we march ahead in our mission for equality and justice, join me in reflecting on the tremendous progress we have made. Let's celebrate this Juneteenth National Independence Day and keep up the fight for a brighter future! It's our 52nd annual Juneteenth Festival, one of the country's longest-running Juneteenth celebrations. Join us! = Together, #WeRepresent! | | Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | =| =| = ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. name: Working Families Party
subject: This Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Today is a day to celebrate Black freedom. It's also a day to reflect on the ways freedom continues to be denied for Black people in the United States. | | | Today is Juneteenth, Peter. **It is a day to celebrate Black freedom. It's also a day to reflect on the ways freedom continues to be denied for Black people in the United States.** Juneteenth commemorates the day enslaved people of Galveston, Texas were told that they were free from slavery in 1865 — more than two years after the Emancipation Proclamation. Today, it's worth questioning what freedom means. On June 19, 1865, more than 250,000 enslaved people in Texas were announced free by executive order.1 [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhkjyHYqt8H8hDV-_Pd8DlhN4z-pz9keHd1CtmEen-uqiT4n8gEauRqbppTkV3jJTjmUpdwA7dcbs5Z8v0MrQNzT_cpEYzItTSidnCcHQIiLdwa2PSW449wiVoUcmi7FEsaMQXigjns8a_mcaAUtPWpaCkM9HoiSLnBnloveC7emclJ-jdrgf4dyS5IUXrnigE6M60hvpMeXWj7ui6-oh5ECy8AqZri-L8DmOZ2EpDzZI6sV4rTmY6Mqxq1UEm5CfG1oWeQQ6OZWYAFNIQ2Xzqtg/3x6/LhzzLG5ASRG3DWd0RM1c3A/h0/QZDZs6l2Guf8w6oaC110jHaIk5sq8c18MV8gwo6adlk) It was a day those enslaved in Galveston, Texas were told they were free. But it was not a day every enslaved person was freed. Some white slaveowners ignored the order. Outside the city of Marshall, Katie Darling continued being enslaved for six years.2 Juneteenth celebrations began the year after the order was put into effect in 1866 and have continued to this day. In 1980, Texas became the first state to designate Juneteenth as a holiday. All 50 states and the DC now recognize the day in some form.3 But it wasn't until the summer of 2021 after the Black Lives Matter uprisings that Congress passed a bill for federal recognition of the holiday.4 Juneteenth is a day to reflect on the ways Black communities built and continue to build this country. It is a day to reflect on the ways racism and white supremacy are deeply intertwined with U.S. systems. It is a day to reflect on the ways slavery is still alive. It is a day to reflect on the reparations that have not been made. It is a day to recommit in the fight for Black liberation. [**Share this post on social media — and share your own reflections this Juneteenth:**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhkjyHYqt8H8hDV-_Pd8DlhN4z-pz9keHd1CtmEen-uqiT4n8gEauRqbppTkV3jJTjjAHm6bIEqASCg1Qcpp9ET5TgKmCoxxC301XPPv7_hPjr2glaXNpJgvEOn9QSoiOTO9W5tZFcNG8V4ax_NU41uIbukv1C2cpprW2sAJQrJ0IG4W-Sw1hxqeRae7NzadgMIBNGpdJJSZ0uTYMKcmle2YgEDqxRBAgboyha50bTcFhaHGbfjF4wbIQ0znbiZdlcj1TeM5b7mEJ3LpVHvjtp60/3x6/LhzzLG5ASRG3DWd0RM1c3A/h1/H3lbvaDeCr3DOFiyvXJkfek5CAA9Ib8nh5teIa5pZvg)

Today and at all times, we’re learning and deepening our commitment to the work yet to be done. In solidarity, Team WFP

clean_body: Today is a day to celebrate Black freedom. It's also a day to reflect on the ways freedom continues to be denied for Black people in the United States. | | | Today is Juneteenth, Peter. It is a day to celebrate Black freedom. It's also a day to reflect on the ways freedom continues to be denied for Black people in the United States. Juneteenth commemorates the day enslaved people of Galveston, Texas were told that they were free from slavery in 1865 — more than two years after the Emancipation Proclamation. Today, it's worth questioning what freedom means. On June 19, 1865, more than 250,000 enslaved people in Texas were announced free by executive order.1 It was a day those enslaved in Galveston, Texas were told they were free. But it was not a day every enslaved person was freed. Some white slaveowners ignored the order. Outside the city of Marshall, Katie Darling continued being enslaved for six years.2 Juneteenth celebrations began the year after the order was put into effect in 1866 and have continued to this day. In 1980, Texas became the first state to designate Juneteenth as a holiday. All 50 states and the DC now recognize the day in some form.3 But it wasn't until the summer of 2021 after the Black Lives Matter uprisings that Congress passed a bill for federal recognition of the holiday.4 Juneteenth is a day to reflect on the ways Black communities built and continue to build this country. It is a day to reflect on the ways racism and white supremacy are deeply intertwined with U.S. systems. It is a day to reflect on the ways slavery is still alive. It is a day to reflect on the reparations that have not been made. It is a day to recommit in the fight for Black liberation. This weekend, we’re buying Black and Black joy is being created across the country. Today and at all times, we’re learning and deepening our commitment to the work yet to be done. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , New York Times , July 7, 1865 2\. , Jezebel , June 19, 2020 3\. , PBS.org 4\. , New York Times , June 19, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

Earlier this month, you heard from two members of the Tennessee Three, Reps. Johnson and Pearson, about how the Tennessee GOP has used their supermajority in the legislature to enact their extreme agenda and work to ban abortion, protect the gun lobby, restrict voting rights, and so much more.
They know firsthand that it takes people power to fight back against Republican attacks on our democracy, and they called on you to fight the Republican agenda head-on by re-electing state Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson.
**In a few short weeks, Democrats can get it done. We can deal a huge blow to the GOP by officially re-electing Reps. Jones and Pearson of the Tennessee Three to the state House.**
It’s crucial we show the Republican Party that they can’t simply expel their colleagues for speaking out against their hate-fueled platform. **Special elections like these are key to defending Democratic power and chipping away at Republican strongholds, and we need all our grassroots supporters on our side.**
[Will you chip in $7 or more ahead of Tennessee’s vital special elections so we can defeat extreme Republicans and elect state Democrats nationwide? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURt3B-Jxc4nNvF-EVj5ZQXouZw24TKJfxj-7rmo18UHb4rWqaLUI0rJcVOxyVIwtc-PoG7Q_C94sZJfbc3gG2vcMPB1Y99gnJK4SNQdacywlM6n1v10dv_MUgUv9zaumPL473xpYBCRLtMQdv28L9jkYFFOy7bnsi84xhTzrYRQ-gvwTg3MXRlShvKPB4d6jPYfwmEZA5-mgQGAWqYF2y1xpZ30uUP7iq3tmm9I4NuSj8J_ygABPSZeR9UG9kxydXQpgoaPqUv15rzeR8vGx6qPYDLG2LgRh7NXHoTLYOn3NfDxy-Ib4oyylnEUnYry9hQXCltiunjHrFxaEPwkOwWIMFuNm6rBi2UWRJNudQgJ7dui8NMz0_Cy86csvLRlbllnG34J4tEHWquvauVYSpSHwtFs6lkV2Ev0ObTz0DdscOAdfjriz7PKEIpRTdQaHYx9/3x6/-kK1C8PxRd-3SFjiq9TKpA/h6/f45SUk8pZWpmS3L48hxhIj4d33C2olIPzxep-o0E7-Y)
It’s races like these where grassroots donations can make the most impact – re-electing Reps. Jones and Pearson will be a monumental step in our fight to build a better America. Together, we can face this fight directly and elect the Democratic leaders we need in states like Tennessee and beyond.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeiaemg014eeak9kscbf3bd6ah5crfrpgancmm40_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64p76clh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs0nfeaq2snpeb46obbhju04bf6cpof5ck8kv77o_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64p76clh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr1fh0fl16c9vjlpe3f1nsee9ba77d3a50bmqci0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64p76clh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7cm3bnul6e8pco2sbq0bll8qvl5jb9jpebqmec0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9i64p76clh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|

name: Greg Landsman
subject: 158 years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65077910/412230034/-1268629450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDZiOTMyNi1jZjBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o6RZUEmNWndNmN8ExA5iO_NSQmNAr8eF6XvRa7v4-sg=&emci=e50dfe32-bf0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=946b9326-cf0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10283101)
---
Friends,

Today we commemorate Juneteenth – the day on which the last group of those enslaved learned of their freedom, more than two years after the Emancipation Proclamation.

For the last 158 years, June 19th has symbolized both a triumphant and reflective moment in American history. Today we celebrate freedom, reflect on how far we must go, and find inspiration to fight harder on behalf of justice for all.

**Our work towards racial equity and justice is far from over.** This continued moment of racial reckoning has illuminated the fact that racism is not only still ingrained in the heads and hearts of thousands across the country, but also deeply woven into the fabric of our government and our systems. It’s up to _us_ to change that.

I hope you’ll join me today in recommitting yourself to the fight for change and the pursuit of racial equity, freedom, and justice for all.

Grateful to have you in this fight with me.

– Greg

www.landsmanforcongress.com

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Records Show Biden Justice Department Discussions About Trump’s Closed-Circuit Video of FBI Raid on Mar-a-Lago
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 477 pages of records pages from the Department of Justice (DOJ) that show top officials of the National Security Division discussing the political implications of Trump allowing CNN to use closed-circuit TV (CCTV) footage of the raid on his Mar-a-Lago home.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 19, 2023
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63835&L=29714&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXBzLWNsb3NlZC1jaXJjdWl0LXZpZGVvLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=43dcc2eb59b47a669075485b3aee3346b7057a9fbe8388f17ebcc7fbe9d17c63) | **[Judicial Watch: Records Show Biden Justice Department Discussions About Trump’s Closed-Circuit Video of FBI Raid on Mar-a-Lago](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63835&L=29714&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXBzLWNsb3NlZC1jaXJjdWl0LXZpZGVvLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=43dcc2eb59b47a669075485b3aee3346b7057a9fbe8388f17ebcc7fbe9d17c63)** Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 477 pages of records pages from the Department of Justice (DOJ) that show top officials of the National Security Division discussing the political implications of Trump allowing CNN to use closed-circuit TV (CCTV) footage of the raid on his Mar-a-Lago home. The documents confirm that the Justice Department had asked that Mar-a-Lago CCTV be turned off before the raid. Anna Paulina Luna](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63835&L=29715&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYW5uYS1wYXVsaW5hLWx1bmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=2480866d6217d9744143f4fdbd8f7ffec2459ec6adb42ba7b1d369ec30076149)** According to the suit, on February 13, 2023, the U.S. House Committee on Armed Services and U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Accountability disclosed the Air Force had improperly revealed the unredacted records of at least 11 Republican congressional candidates, who are Air Force veterans, to the research firm Due Diligence Group. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 477 pages of records pages from the Department of Justice (DOJ) that show top officials of the National Security Division discussing the political implications of Trump allowing CNN to use closed-circuit TV (CCTV) footage of the raid on his Mar-a-Lago home. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 19, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 477 pages of records pages from the Department of Justice (DOJ) that show top officials of the National Security Division discussing the political implications of Trump allowing CNN to use closed-circuit TV (CCTV) footage of the raid on his Mar-a-Lago home. The documents confirm that the Justice Department had asked that Mar-a-Lago CCTV be turned off before the raid. ---|--- | | | | | According to the suit, on February 13, 2023, the U.S. House Committee on Armed Services and U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Accountability disclosed the Air Force had improperly revealed the unredacted records of at least 11 Republican congressional candidates, who are Air Force veterans, to the research firm Due Diligence Group. ---|--- | | | | | While the Biden administration and its media allies highlight that illegal immigration has dropped considerably since the termination of a Trump-era restriction, a record number of suspected terrorists have been caught trying to enter the U.S. through Mexico. Not surprisingly, mainstream news reports have focused on the positive effect that the expiration of a COVID-related rule known as Title 42 has had on migration. ---|--- | | | | | Joe Biden wants to distract from his own personal corruption and join the ranks of foreign dictators by trying to jail and turn Trump into a political prisoner. Congress should act immediately and do everything possible under the law to undo this attempt to wreck our republican form of government. Every candidate for public office should denounce this attack on our elections. ---|--- | | | USA Today Tom Fitton, one of Trump’s most vocal supporters, said the judge’s order was so vague as to virtually guarantee a confrontation between Trump, the Justice Department and the judge who ultimately oversees the case. The Wall Street Journal Although the indictment against Donald Trump doesn’t cite the Presidential Records Act, the charges are predicated on the law. The indictment came about only because the government thought Mr. Trump took records that didn’t belong to him, and the government raided his house to find any such records. NY Post President Joe Biden’s administration is receiving backlash online over its Pride Month display at the White House on Sunday as many Twitter users are saying it violates the US Flag Code. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

name: Cori Bush via Justice Democrats
subject: Black people continue to bear the harms of slavery and its vestiges.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

As a Black woman in Congress, I work in a building built by our ancestors
who were enslaved. I serve in an institution where past members of
Congress enslaved Black people, near the White House where past presidents
traded and enslaved Black people.

Throughout my life, I’ve personally experienced how Black people continue
to bear the harms of slavery and its vestiges. We see this in present-day
health disparities, the growing Black-white wealth gap, escalating police
violence against Black communities, and so much more.

That’s why I partnered with grassroots groups to introduce the Reparations
Now Resolution, which recognizes the federal government’s responsibility
to provide reparations for the enslavement of Africans -- and for the harm
our government continues to inflict on millions of Black people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135044?t=1001&akid=29503%2E1203867%2EGnQ_2D ]Please sign on today to become a grassroots co-sponsor of my
Reparations Now Resolution.

Throughout our country’s history, the federal government has enslaved and
exploited people of African descent. This anti-Black racism is built into
our country’s institutions, including our criminal legal system, housing,
education, and healthcare.

In my home state of Missouri, Black people are almost 5 times more likely
to be killed by police compared to white people. In the U.S., Black people
die at 3 times the rate of white people during childbirth.

Across the country, Black people are also 3.6 times more likely to be
arrested for cannabis possession than white people, despite using it at
similar rates. Arrests and convictions have lifelong impacts that deny
people of their basic rights, including voting rights and opportunities
for housing and employment.

This is all part of the legacy of chattel slavery and its evolutions, such
as Jim Crow, segregation, and redlining.

Discriminatory lending practices are ongoing, contributing to the growing
racial wealth gap. And legalized slavery persists in our system of
incarceration and policing, which has grown dramatically in the past 40
years.

I’ve introduced policies to address these anti-Black injustices, including
by decriminalizing drugs, investing in non-carceral public health
alternatives to policing, addressing the trauma of generations of police
violence, and investing in the resources Black communities need.

The next and necessary step to achieve racial justice is by enacting
reparations.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135044?t=1002&akid=29503%2E1203867%2EGnQ_2D ]Please add your name if you agree: We need reparations now.

Add your name »

With love,

Cori Bush

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you're struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1003&akid=29503%2E1203867%2EGnQ_2D ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1004&akid=29503%2E1203867%2EGnQ_2D ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230619-29503-footer&t=1005&refcode2=29503_1203867_GnQ_2D&akid=29503%2E1203867%2EGnQ_2D

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=29503%2E1203867%2EGnQ_2D

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4c1f8699fc0945cf99e762bdadb1681f&_e=11kSmkM_q1sck9tcmY1XZF9SIQqzzr2mfJ9wGcSgb59CTAyqNuah1qw4tye-AdL7iUpbkzrFTaOIguVNCayPZb3yXUdtpNOuJLGghQZPMy6ISPfMbGiwBBfYy62G1EB_xhtJwtG5KTy4sh6GUra768HVZ3EOoryeQAWYFCJwdcuv03hNx-yHf3jBePt59WfUVZeUdJsSF85E-06i-oD3o2-Fssl36Q6GvumyNUe2vYOKxURM0w32k5Ipm48pn3ds3F1OmeaTPTbzG4x8ezEQs4xwZgmJS-mBxBOj-KH7pWj24gMrLy9jVLavDDSVphdKGyK4-jzYK64P8zst1bX94idHY3ChTprf74hn6oAQjSSuBxXmsJOwFi2cjPGoyMElRZcezCUrqny96qhia21phg%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

name: Al Canata
subject: The Founding Fathers would be shocked at our taxes!
body:
The federal budget is out of control.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b2cd267a32b748769e9ae1125d26ebe3&_e=Dm7OeiQ5FIj5_cuJrhQlOoiYjWvlozIGe_8zVQ-K1K5l1TILnt2cdbHXmqdelsPOCtseXZ-Aovl7qGk9bNzeKBEFObO534Eb-6SjuSDKYIIFhtbGlrDCbpiKcMwxTp5aMHfiDtjgXcN99bhr20gFFL3s4rRm-QstkJW2VO1tUQ2NkekuknIDJ1J_ufq80uFCRHrJTINZnmFRJ8o3qS2wY5hFCza25hOTwCT3w0CgZTZrQ7G0XGSz1TtgRWO2XT3trzBoNSgcwWau9mp1glXPLPSk95c9hMgoxBhiYHuUt64%3D)

Hello Friend,

With the utmost respect for the principles set forth by our Founding Fathers, we turn to you today to advocate for the preservation of your hard-earned money.

As James Madison once eloquently stated,

_"I cannot undertake to lay my finger on that article of the Constitution which granted a right to Congress of expending, on objects of benevolence, the money of their constituents."_

These timeless words from one of our nation's esteemed architects serve as a reminder of the importance of fiscal responsibility and the protection of taxpayer rights.

I am Al Canata, Vice President of Strategic Partnerships at the National Taxpayers Union (NTU).

At NTU, we are steadfast in our commitment to championing these principles, defending your financial freedom, and holding our elected representatives accountable. NTU has played a major role in signature taxpayer victories over the past five decades. We helped overhaul the federal tax code under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a "Taxpayer Bill of Rights" in the late 80s and 90s, culminating in the Taxpayer First Act of 2019. In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform, and now we're working to make the benefits from that law permanent.

**However, our work is far from complete, and we need your support now more than ever!**

The challenges facing taxpayers have become increasingly complex, with the government continuously expanding its reach into our wallets. Excessive spending, wasteful programs, and burdensome regulations threaten our economic stability and erode the very fabric of our democratic values.

NTU is working to persuade Congress to support debt reduction and reduce spending so that tomorrow's generation won't face crushing tax burdens or lower living standards. The recent bipartisan "debt ceiling deal" to rein in the growth of part of the federal budget is only the beginning of what needs to be done.

[By contributing to the NTU, you can help us continue our vital mission to promote limited government and fiscal responsibility. Will you click here and send an urgent donation of $100, $35, or even $10 today to support our mission >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b2cd267a32b748769e9ae1125d26ebe3&_e=Dm7OeiQ5FIj5_cuJrhQlOoiYjWvlozIGe_8zVQ-K1K5l1TILnt2cdbHXmqdelsPOCtseXZ-Aovl7qGk9bNzeKBEFObO534Eb-6SjuSDKYIIFhtbGlrDCbpiKcMwxTp5aMHfiDtjgXcN99bhr20gFFO7ru-Pv-yWB-zMvs8E9ILGPiMMxlzassyFm0hWXLUVyAKtybcEsgMchFHYPN_5_R8FnnEN5i2ahjkShvwB22mKm0eX3yPABYN-6MIwKCCAzWrX6hiJ0YoJjuWTdIyxR3OwXwbbFQH4FzwU9yKXA2Nw%3D)

The federal budget is out of control. We have reached the statutory debt limit of $31.4 trillion and have nearly exhausted all extraordinary measures to continue funding our responsibilities. Our fiscal trajectory must be changed.

A continuation of our reckless fiscal policies would mean more debt, fewer jobs, higher interest rates, and a less prosperous America.

We can't allow that to happen.

With your generous support, we will:
1. **Advocate for Lower Taxes:** We will tirelessly fight against unnecessary tax hikes, advocating for tax policies that foster economic growth, job creation, and individual prosperity.

2. **Combat Government Waste:** We will hold elected officials accountable for their stewardship of taxpayer dollars, identifying and exposing wasteful spending and inefficiencies at every level of government.

3. **Promote Transparency:** We will push for greater transparency and accountability in government budgets, ensuring that your tax dollars are used efficiently and responsibly.

4. **Empower Taxpayers:** We will provide you with the tools, resources, and information necessary to make informed decisions about your personal finances and engage with policymakers effectively.

Your contribution, no matter the size, makes a tangible difference in our fight to protect your hard-earned money. We rely on the generosity of individuals like you to fund critical research, launch advocacy campaigns, and amplify our voices in the halls of power.

[Please make an urgent donation to help NTU advocate for taxpayers. _Click here to donate today_ _._](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b2cd267a32b748769e9ae1125d26ebe3&_e=Dm7OeiQ5FIj5_cuJrhQlOoiYjWvlozIGe_8zVQ-K1K5l1TILnt2cdbHXmqdelsPOCtseXZ-Aovl7qGk9bNzeKBEFObO534Eb-6SjuSDKYIIFhtbGlrDCbpiKcMwxTp5aMHfiDtjgXcN99bhr20gFFEWEqS3FXr6qQ6iUv4FWOoLDHwXMuYZCIJhDkKVnwqIhOIAzKUpyupIqEgO73qyCxsnQ7lxnSha5N00YdfRQDwpatcLmmXBkulY_zSZsDArEe5QXmGt931Z5dLBiHukW_0H1JLS5Ichw6KeupRVJdIQ%3D)

We're known on Capitol Hill as **" Voice of America's Taxpayers"** because we have been behind every major taxpayer victory in the last five decades. But until we make sure that Congress is fiscally responsible toward every part of the federal budget and that the well-being - _**the rights**_ - of taxpayers always come first, our mission remains as important as ever!

Your urgent donation can make a lasting impact and secure a brighter financial future for all Americans.

Please join us in preserving the vision of our Founding Fathers and ensuring that future generations inherit a government that respects the rights and prosperity of taxpayers.

To make your donation to the National Taxpayers Union today, please click any button below. Every dollar counts and brings us one step closer to achieving our shared goals.

clean_body: The federal budget is out of control. Hello Friend, With the utmost respect for the principles set forth by our Founding Fathers, we turn to you today to advocate for the preservation of your hard-earned money. As James Madison once eloquently stated, "I cannot undertake to lay my finger on that article of the Constitution which granted a right to Congress of expending, on objects of benevolence, the money of their constituents." These timeless words from one of our nation's esteemed architects serve as a reminder of the importance of fiscal responsibility and the protection of taxpayer rights. I am Al Canata, Vice President of Strategic Partnerships at the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). At NTU, we are steadfast in our commitment to championing these principles, defending your financial freedom, and holding our elected representatives accountable. NTU has played a major role in signature taxpayer victories over the past five decades. We helped overhaul the federal tax code under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a "Taxpayer Bill of Rights" in the late 80s and 90s, culminating in the Taxpayer First Act of 2019. In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform, and now we're working to make the benefits from that law permanent. However, our work is far from complete, and we need your support now more than ever! The challenges facing taxpayers have become increasingly complex, with the government continuously expanding its reach into our wallets. Excessive spending, wasteful programs, and burdensome regulations threaten our economic stability and erode the very fabric of our democratic values. NTU is working to persuade Congress to support debt reduction and reduce spending so that tomorrow's generation won't face crushing tax burdens or lower living standards. The recent bipartisan "debt ceiling deal" to rein in the growth of part of the federal budget is only the beginning of what needs to be done. The federal budget is out of control. We have reached the statutory debt limit of $31.4 trillion and have nearly exhausted all extraordinary measures to continue funding our responsibilities. Our fiscal trajectory must be changed. A continuation of our reckless fiscal policies would mean more debt, fewer jobs, higher interest rates, and a less prosperous America. We can't allow that to happen. With your generous support, we will: 1. Advocate for Lower Taxes: We will tirelessly fight against unnecessary tax hikes, advocating for tax policies that foster economic growth, job creation, and individual prosperity. 2. Combat Government Waste: We will hold elected officials accountable for their stewardship of taxpayer dollars, identifying and exposing wasteful spending and inefficiencies at every level of government. 3. Promote Transparency: We will push for greater transparency and accountability in government budgets, ensuring that your tax dollars are used efficiently and responsibly. 4. Empower Taxpayers: We will provide you with the tools, resources, and information necessary to make informed decisions about your personal finances and engage with policymakers effectively. Your contribution, no matter the size, makes a tangible difference in our fight to protect your hard-earned money. We rely on the generosity of individuals like you to fund critical research, launch advocacy campaigns, and amplify our voices in the halls of power. We're known on Capitol Hill as " Voice of America's Taxpayers" because we have been behind every major taxpayer victory in the last five decades. But until we make sure that Congress is fiscally responsible toward every part of the federal budget and that the well-being - the rights - of taxpayers always come first, our mission remains as important as ever! Your urgent donation can make a lasting impact and secure a brighter financial future for all Americans. Please join us in preserving the vision of our Founding Fathers and ensuring that future generations inherit a government that respects the rights and prosperity of taxpayers. To make your donation to the National Taxpayers Union today, please click any button below. Every dollar counts and brings us one step closer to achieving our shared goals. Please support NTU's fight in Congress by donating any amount you can generously send today. With your support, we can protect the rights of taxpayers across the nation. Thank you for being a stalwart defender of fiscal responsibility and limited government. Al Canata Vice President of Strategic Partnerships National Taxpayers Union Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| CRP Newsletter / June 19, 2023
---
---
| |
---
|
##### Saturday, June 24, 2023
## Our First Convention!
**Location: **Lure Lakebar, 2800 N Nokomis NE, Alexandria, MN **Time:** 1:00 - 5:00 pm
**Convention fee:** $20 (members-only voting)
Our first convention is less than a week away! Join us for electing officers, candidate speeches, platform finalization, and bylaw adjustments. Convention fee is only $20 and you must be a member to vote. To get your ticket visit our donation page, donate $20, and type "convention" in the comments.
Help us make history by becoming a member if you haven't already, we will only be able to do with with your help!
---
| [Buy Your Convention Ticket Today!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMjQwODEwMzg3MzMzMTkyMDUyJmM9dzd3NiZlPTAmYj0xMTU5NTQxMzMxJmQ9YjRmMHg4dw==.l-iiIneJwz0SYyH4hU6TovAJQJhydJy25OE17dD-RrY)
---
---
| |
---
| | Lawsuit Update
---
Some of you have reached out asking about the proposed lawsuit against the state on the matter of ballot access. The CRP is not a recognized party by the state (yet). To obtain this status, we need to run a candidate and obtain at least 1% of votes in a statewide race. As such, lawyers do not see a lawsuit as a viable option. **Why a lawsuit? ** One of the ways a new party can gain recognition as a party in MN is through a petition. However, for minor party status that does not come with ballot access. The state standard to obtain ballot access is to petition 1% of the number of people who voted in the last statewide election. We would need approximately 25,000 signatures, obtained within a one-year time period.
---
| |
---
| |
---
**Petition 1% or approximately 25,000 signatures!**

| |
---
| A few years ago in South Dakota, their petitions were challenged and the courts ruled that anything over 1% for ballot access was excessive. When this happens, laws in other states need to be challenged in court to get them to meet the new standard. This is what we are proposing.
**Libertarian party help.** ****We initially proposed this to all the other "little parties,” including the Libertarian party of Minnesota. The Legal Marijuana Now party supports our lawsuit, but because they already have ballot access they would not have standing to sue therefore, they are not affected. Lawyers are stating that the only path to victory would be with an established party, which would give us the greatest avenue to succeed. They were not willing, and we have not heard anything different from their chair since. What we worked on, and helped organize was getting a major attorney who was willing to take the case pro-bono–David Schoen out of Atlanta. We would will still incur filing fees, transportation, and lodging costs for David, as well as the foremost ballot access expert in the country, Richard Winger of Ballot Access News. We also secured other parties who were willing to help shoulder the cost. The only piece left to join in the fight was the support of the Libertarian party.
**Years before we’d gain enough signatures.** ****It will likely be years before we could muster the manpower needed to collect the required signatures. The Libertarian party has the manpower needed, along with a booth at the state fair. I am confident that the Libertarian party will agree to lead this suit as it would be of great benefit to them as well. Though we may not benefit from a lawsuit in the near future, this is the right thing to do. This year, the state made it harder for parties to gain ballot access. This kind of action cannot go unanswered. The people need to be able to choose from more than two options on the ballot, giving people the chance to be truly represented
Thank you for joining us in this fight.
Travis Bull Johnson
---

| |
---

This Juneteenth it's time to emancipate ourselves from the psychological slavery based on race that our society perpetuates now.

**"Those who deny freedom to others, deserve it not for themselves; and, under a just God, can not long retain it."**
-- President Abraham Lincoln

Fellow American,

On this Juneteenth, let us finally emancipate ourselves from the psychological slavery based on race that our society perpetuates now.

**Today, we should commit to finally emancipate our children from toxic dogmas that teach them they are 'oppressed' based on the color of their skin.**

Political and cultural leaders like Ibram Kendi, Ayanna Pressley, and Don Lemon assert that your skin color dictates the content of the views you're allowed to espouse. **This is un-American.**

Let us not ceaselessly flog ourselves for our failures more than 160 years ago. Let's instead celebrate the progress we have made to become the quintessential nation on Earth where no matter your skin color, you can achieve anything you ever want. _That's who we are._

That's how we honor Juneteenth today.

Thanks,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=a460507b26ba44d7a8af6cf245d49f22&_e=ZaiAUcr6Hqvv0m4yM3R3bDXMgwF_LDEBvpv051X8KIA7ERpQwaMlpU_4o3VtPyv-pDoablJbKiIcPSahwNbLX79pVFMMDOHw0NkOcuC5XVyRLGYJ4U-qfyphUfdE1R8Z6TM_9Wj_x7AUYfyz6GAbCuvIvBHjYZZGB7oRxUhvxinvoF8QHeNZk0CyWYIGhUBPuAxvFzvFwSBy6LUsiSYNOTWjx_qt3coJLQRcFd0Xjk_RvV0uVPSHknPDrEX2Tao0H5C8odvaSpmxhZONzznjQoMedPot2MsJP28r4QuNJ7byMw_LQQFwdUoruutZ5yH7RFUFa8DLDavC637y_rovCV38FwHjqc5g1r4ac7wikHCMP8-vRe1qTzoCGTCj4sPibz_LkgKbYB92hyX84Yx-4w%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** REVIVE AMERICAN EXCELLENCE ->**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=a460507b26ba44d7a8af6cf245d49f22&_e=ZaiAUcr6Hqvv0m4yM3R3bDXMgwF_LDEBvpv051X8KIA7ERpQwaMlpU_4o3VtPyv-pDoablJbKiIcPSahwNbLX79pVFMMDOHw0NkOcuC5XVyRLGYJ4U-qfyphUfdE1R8Z6TM_9Wj_x7AUYfyz6GAbCuvIvBHjYZZGB7oRxUhvxinvoF8QHeNZk0CyWYIGhUBPuAxvFzvFwSBy6LUsiSYNOTWjx_qt3coJLQRcFd0Xjk-QUTUe2hJvzyRJXC78hKGv2F4xjjQONOgJAXQaXNEIlfJ1Xad1WRlWC2p6-BLZLz465OYMX6cJ2VYlg8cpGdx7vV3xnxfaRGqksCMfIZsTDgmAEmGdXApjgrPhmaV7hjgC7KysAIp15La1lBCwPckmphWw-N6eoEbiQPwgeOPH7Q%3D%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
This is more convincing than anything I could say to you.
---

---

Peter, During my time serving as Florida's 46th governor, we went through one of the most pivotal moments in our nation's history: the Covid crisis. It fell upon the shoulders of our nation and tested every one of our elected leaders. And that test was about more than just getting the policy right--_**it was about demonstrating true leadership. **_

Before, during, and after the pandemic, I've led Florida my own way--**bucking Fauci,** **bucking the establishment,** and **bucking the media. **
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3349bd953af64d4a9cf1d4ae1d097059&_e=CAVaq66bW_0QkgOmEN_2ZPw397jUxzfZOEi9czasd_Ki0CXlSU6WVMYMhtcyiK4c6uSyhcFO4u_LRXZuBWXwsR4EZ2XYIrmUlgUvYesFwYXjr1eE6YT5n2pqS8XuQE-ZRQU_XgoV8XMoHBU8qRrwTFU2iFKthMC3NrXierTQbHzcSlygMQMyvKsBapoeElH3cg7gTOA0oMGw3MzXtGOOe-hnFsJuMwu1HjuFtAQBiY9YqPJQCkVsjpjQWM2bGBq5EUmncHGj256ZvmardhHC1GZl78p0Ff04vvm4xcYMhdOsf3xYk3Zhr8QQg--bgiwdnkcWlz_rE0y0e_O__gvRrg7a6iJ7089zW00GvxQBomQZqOfHqF5nlpAHFJvjiGC5bTT1kqejJVM-wUP-UPXv62QOIfE2bTRcaMamuNMl_NXhBWsSJL2OV2uswYNjKpjV)
---

Unsurprisingly, this refusal to back down, my unwillingness to waiver, has brought on incoming daily assaults and smears like no governor has ever faced while many supporters have warned me to change course so I can remain in politics.

But, Peter, a leader does not put his own short-term political calculation ahead of the greater good. Leadership is not about entertainment. It's not about building a brand. It's not about virtue signaling. _**Leadership is ultimately about producing results for the people that you represent --the people that you serve.**_ To produce these results, we must defeat Biden, restore energy to the executive, and reinstate common sense as a common virtue across our nation.

This starts with:
* Swiftly and completely securing our Southern border

* Rebuilding the post-Covid economy in a way that supports our working families and our seniors hardest hit by inflation

* Ensuring our school systems are designed to focus on educating our kids--NOT indoctrinating them

In Florida, even my most significant political adversaries have acknowledged that when the governor says he's going to do something, he is going to do it.

Peter, you can take that to the bank.

As I lay out my vision for America, you can rest assured that I WILL follow through. I do not make campaign promises that I do not mean or cannot achieve.

I pledge to you, Peter, that as President, I will be an energetic executive who will go on offense to take the big issues head-on. I will never shy away from a fight because the media or the Left doesn't like it. We are going to reverse Biden's disastrous policies. _**And we are going to start on DAY ONE. **_

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

It fell upon the shoulders of our nation and tested every one of our elected leaders. And that test was about more than just getting the policy right--it was about demonstrating true leadership. Before, during, and after the pandemic, I've led Florida my own way--bucking Fauci, bucking the establishment, and bucking the media. | Unsurprisingly, this refusal to back down, my unwillingness to waiver, has brought on incoming daily assaults and smears like no governor has ever faced while many supporters have warned me to change course so I can remain in politics. But, Peter, a leader does not put his own short-term political calculation ahead of the greater good. Leadership is not about entertainment. It's not about building a brand. It's not about virtue signaling. Leadership is ultimately about producing results for the people that you represent --the people that you serve. To produce these results, we must defeat Biden, restore energy to the executive, and reinstate common sense as a common virtue across our nation. This starts with: Swiftly and completely securing our Southern border Rebuilding the post-Covid economy in a way that supports our working families and our seniors hardest hit by inflation Ensuring our school systems are designed to focus on educating our kids--NOT indoctrinating them In Florida, even my most significant political adversaries have acknowledged that when the governor says he's going to do something, he is going to do it. Peter, you can take that to the bank. As I lay out my vision for America, you can rest assured that I WILL follow through. I do not make campaign promises that I do not mean or cannot achieve. subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=72423ef0182b47cda9368ceed8ee769e&_e=FgbkMAWK_74seDNGHVp1iLolIriSe7VY_bIply5vw97v0zYMSW6yRbUh6Y475gkTtBNe2_cfw4nq5nIsrBVrGIyzTovNhs-Xnp6XeHegELmghAi357W8Ht9m3aPiA_mFoFAW_elc67YFKkYNVfE3i6cJE0DAVdiYO3l8Y0Qrg0ubnPAeEZRTp0Mzre0p5_gS1MlEJxq9ekLBdwqK0cs5plsRrBglBmw8RweEocHye6fPEj4oVZPmgtXdOT3yBHWF_yVDkP6YFxDxYWWfJKAhhhz1ZHJ-auP_M_3Fi24ZyOrooTXYki4853da5d2Dp0oeWKPintodfJJUf04NLcGhI-KjWMuIRcf71KIPdBQo8yNsHnDcp7POJ4bOnk_dbUsr2L12D9g5I0Hfp2AT3JS09vnsdWXAKXSs2mClUBkGD9g%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:

The Biden Administration wants to put me in JAIL for **400 YEARS.**
My crime? _Running for president as a political outsider determined to destroy the rigged system that has crushed hardworking Americans for far too long._
_**But it’s not just my freedom that’s on the ballot in 2024...**_

clean_body: Because I will NEVER let them take away YOUR freedom. | | | Friend, The Biden Administration wants to put me in JAIL for 400 YEARS. My crime? Running for president as a political outsider determined to destroy the rigged system that has crushed hardworking Americans for far too long. But it’s not just my freedom that’s on the ballot in 2024... It’s also YOURS. It’s very simple: the Deep State is only after me, because I fight for you. And if they see that they can successfully get away with weaponizing the legal system at the federal level to silence opposition and crush dissent,then it will not end with me... America has never been this close to the brink of tyranny. YOU are our only hope of saving America. | | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Nick Melvoin
subject: Reflections on Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65080059/412242470/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRhNTk1NjQtZGQwZS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ci4fI7vAz6oO308G7sb3V_7EUs5dbMa0CLIRLo0nlIc=&emci=02c7af7a-cd0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9da59564-dd0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059)
---

| | Peter – Today marks just the third federally-recognized Juneteenth. This holiday commemorates the moment when news of the Emancipation Proclamation finally reached the last enslaved people in Texas, more than two years after the Emancipation Proclamation legally abolished slavery in the United States. **Now, Juneteenth symbolizes liberation, progress, resilience, and the continued struggle for equality in the United States.** **If the term 'Juneteenth' is relatively new to you, you're not alone.** Its history wasn't really taught in schools when I was growing up, and for too many of us, this is all new information. But a federally recognized holiday provides a moment for reflection on our history, our progress, and the work ahead to promote equality, justice, and the eradication of systemic racism. **It took our nation more than 150 years to simply recognize Juneteenth as a holiday. Unfortunately, there's an organized nationwide effort to hide essential elements of American history**. Around the country, we're seeing groups mobilizing to take books off of shelves, erase slavery from our history books, and deny ongoing modern systemic racism. We can't allow our nation to continue down this road, Peter. The best way to prevent a repeat of our past failures is to take responsibility and teach the next generation about them. Fortunately, Angelenos are working hard to shed light on the cascading impacts of systemic racism, and bring real, enduring change to the region.**The Community Coalition is doing frontline, on-the-ground work to transform the social and economic conditions in South LA that foster addiction, crime, violence and poverty by building a community institution that involves thousands in creating, influencing and changing public policy.** **[Today, I'm asking folks in our movement to commemorate Juneteenth by supporting Community Coalition's efforts to fight systemic racism and build a more equitable future for all of our children.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65080061/412242472/510989970?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRhNTk1NjQtZGQwZS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ci4fI7vAz6oO308G7sb3V_7EUs5dbMa0CLIRLo0nlIc=&emci=02c7af7a-cd0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9da59564-dd0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059)** More soon, _Nick_ [support the coalition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65080064/412242475/510989970?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRhNTk1NjQtZGQwZS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ci4fI7vAz6oO308G7sb3V_7EUs5dbMa0CLIRLo0nlIc=&emci=02c7af7a-cd0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9da59564-dd0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059) |

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
[](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkLtuKyEQhp-G7XbFDBzwFhRHibaJnCJNSjSGsZeYvQiwrLx9ZEvp0_-37_88-iOlnNbLOy3srqH4Uv22N3-lOvdh3lLxKFH10vQwetVFF8dgyHTswBwsorQKutlJsgcyHPEEIDXoM1h9Ri0tEP_TJLvkHjnSwIggAfQQw4jKKIjBsDpbLbSkzKUNV-Y9bOulcK2F99spp0DrELaly25uba9C_Rc4CZwqh1vh4Z7WwvGhEDjFbaXGbYv0LXB6cuzUf9FqnjgPo5pubfEtCPX69vLR_w7riov7PeWcqrFCy8tCKT972x-u-QkAAP__tZlocQ)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkLtuKyEQhp-G7XbFDBzwFhRHibaJnCJNSjSGsZeYvQiwrLx9ZEvp0_-37_88-iOlnNbLOy3srqH4Uv22N3-lOvdh3lLxKFH10vQwetVFF8dgyHTswBwsorQKutlJsgcyHPEEIDXoM1h9Ri0tEP_TJLvkHjnSwIggAfQQw4jKKIjBsDpbLbSkzKUNV-Y9bOulcK2F99spp0DrELaly25uba9C_Rc4CZwqh1vh4Z7WwvGhEDjFbaXGbYv0LXB6cuzUf9FqnjgPo5pubfEtCPX69vLR_w7riov7PeWcqrFCy8tCKT972x-u-QkAAP__tZlocQ)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkLtuKyEQhp-G7XbFDBzwFhRHibaJnCJNSjSGsZeYvQiwrLx9ZEvp0_-37_88-iOlnNbLOy3srqH4Uv22N3-lOvdh3lLxKFH10vQwetVFF8dgyHTswBwsorQKutlJsgcyHPEEIDXoM1h9Ri0tEP_TJLvkHjnSwIggAfQQw4jKKIjBsDpbLbSkzKUNV-Y9bOulcK2F99spp0DrELaly25uba9C_Rc4CZwqh1vh4Z7WwvGhEDjFbaXGbYv0LXB6cuzUf9FqnjgPo5pubfEtCPX69vLR_w7riov7PeWcqrFCy8tCKT972x-u-QkAAP__tZlocQ)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkLtuKyEQhp-G7XbFDBzwFhRHibaJnCJNSjSGsZeYvQiwrLx9ZEvp0_-37_88-iOlnNbLOy3srqH4Uv22N3-lOvdh3lLxKFH10vQwetVFF8dgyHTswBwsorQKutlJsgcyHPEEIDXoM1h9Ri0tEP_TJLvkHjnSwIggAfQQw4jKKIjBsDpbLbSkzKUNV-Y9bOulcK2F99spp0DrELaly25uba9C_Rc4CZwqh1vh4Z7WwvGhEDjFbaXGbYv0LXB6cuzUf9FqnjgPo5pubfEtCPX69vLR_w7riov7PeWcqrFCy8tCKT972x-u-QkAAP__tZlocQ)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkLtuKyEQhp-G7XbFDBzwFhRHibaJnCJNSjSGsZeYvQiwrLx9ZEvp0_-37_88-iOlnNbLOy3srqH4Uv22N3-lOvdh3lLxKFH10vQwetVFF8dgyHTswBwsorQKutlJsgcyHPEEIDXoM1h9Ri0tEP_TJLvkHjnSwIggAfQQw4jKKIjBsDpbLbSkzKUNV-Y9bOulcK2F99spp0DrELaly25uba9C_Rc4CZwqh1vh4Z7WwvGhEDjFbaXGbYv0LXB6cuzUf9FqnjgPo5pubfEtCPX69vLR_w7riov7PeWcqrFCy8tCKT972x-u-QkAAP__tZlocQ)
