But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Keep Congress Republican PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Win my $1,400 AR-15
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
I’m raffling off one of my favorite AR-15’s, made right here in Arizona, to one lucky individual.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=0fd2ed19db2547079f978f274deec9f8&_t=2ZAJjhkcutEnTXxlaxXP6Y1uUpWgkKfP9s25KsV5VE87iapuc_8Qumo0D4bpK8yOxmmnFxqgI0pervnzEqKG-dPaThHRJNtK8r8raXgH-lA%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=0fd2ed19db2547079f978f274deec9f8&_t=2ZAJjhkcutEnTXxlaxXP6Y1uUpWgkKfP9s25KsV5VE87iapuc_8Qumo0D4bpK8yOxmmnFxqgI0pervnzEqKG-dPaThHRJNtK8r8raXgH-lA%3D)

| **_“An armed man is a citizen; an unarmed man is a victim.”_
- Allen West**
* * *

Fellow American,

Have you ever wanted to own a rifle used by an American Sheriff? Well, now is your chance. Today I’m announcing that **[I’m gifting one of my BTE-USA Tanker Carbine AR-15 Pattern rifles to ONE lucky supporter!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0fd2ed19db2547079f978f274deec9f8&_e=m7xzBeRUorc17dOcUaM9xCD033pTKMtLt124hgtbuzLuvugaP25x28op2qPhLvwXnZ5LKjNhR6g1A7huu4jOZfEhCknbqGXbQ9rLddmYkEx1i8XjkE7lNVjvNVecisRVSgXsDqitWlD93jAx2C7ZWQ73rzUwgsmdnKu7aS0JiTpyyhzodVZRhCpW9nGhOZfu2XnQJ5_uMwEmYblt7mOtbiR5TPdrkr5VttQO4j8JdnyK4oBNx6FX8Nnmaq3kJiLe8g8eeE6RwKErGKwREO9pDHbBNe5lkBklQWuNDQZ9IFkf8bkNGjrJmiswRwXuHRdyJcq6WQzUUYLnRjcj70VojZRf8Jkay_02SYU3-a2B9p2YQxoLKZV1ybTKaDY5PcBnGHWxU8WcxpAb-SVZ98Gnww%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0fd2ed19db2547079f978f274deec9f8&_e=m7xzBeRUorc17dOcUaM9xCD033pTKMtLt124hgtbuzLuvugaP25x28op2qPhLvwXnZ5LKjNhR6g1A7huu4jOZfEhCknbqGXbQ9rLddmYkEx1i8XjkE7lNVjvNVecisRVSgXsDqitWlD93jAx2C7ZWQ73rzUwgsmdnKu7aS0JiTpyyhzodVZRhCpW9nGhOZfu2XnQJ5_uMwEmYblt7mOtbiR5TPdrkr5VttQO4j8JdnyK4oBNx6FX8Nnmaq3kJiLehmNkj4QbtYP5_PNtRrGaT9z6HI1tZMgdzAfq-ZvyzM-B-00gfUTTYcM931mFGti53sPhqoT16mwo5rjB3dl8jKGujM3AkC99oV63XIPEl5Kc2JccMSIzDuDqfUNE_l1n1r3YJ9dzxnhKe0pp2pCYcA%3D%3D)

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: I’m raffling off one of my favorite AR-15’s, made right here in Arizona, to one lucky individual. | | “An armed man is a citizen; an unarmed man is a victim.” - Allen West Fellow American, Have you ever wanted to own a rifle used by an American Sheriff? Well, now is your chance. Today I’m announcing that Some of you reading this right now might be asking yourselves, “Why are you giving away a beautiful tan rifle with a 16” barrel and A2 flash hider?” It’s simple: this American-made AR-15 will help my U.S. Senate campaign become bullet-proof come Election Day 2024. As the top law-enforcement official in Arizona’s third largest county and candidate for U.S. Senate, I believe it’s my responsibility to show the Left that most gun owners are responsible, law-abiding citizens. Responsible gun owners pay our taxes on time. Responsible gun owners use our Second Amendment right to protect ourselves and those we love from those who would wish harm upon us. Responsible gun owners obey the law. Giving away my AR-15 through this contest allows me to connect with other gun enthusiasts like you and opens another avenue to Like my campaign, this contest will likely get so hot that it’ll break my thermal scope. If you want my gun, you’ll need to ensure you enter by 11:59 p.m. on June 30th. So HURRY - if you’re reading this right now, Good luck - and thank you! Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate P.S. Fellow American - I know times are hard in Joe Biden's America, and I hate to ask for money... but if you can spare enough to help my campaign fight the tough battles ahead, I would be so appreciative. If you aren't in the position to give, you can Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. One (1) winner will receive the following prize: One (1) winner will receive (1) BTE-USA TANKER CARBINE AR-15 PATTERN RIFLE (approximate retail value or "ARV": $1400.00). Only one prize per person and per household will be awarded. Prizes cannot be transferred, redeemed for cash or substituted by winner. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkbuunDAQhp_GdCDfsKGgWIUgpdjoKE1Ky9gDx5EvyDaJ9u0jlN2t085882l-_T_v6q6dd3H_rgNMOahcVNRKG9dm8G536SyKYspaLFoyKtbYSYxUDqSBiYhBUkoGzpvPyRhiuBSMSEJkD5vFfJRaDxasZLgfGzddHizISAkZ2dD162b7lXHB5TAyMyCOMxzn6p3RMehfKbv66CLUxk-ftR4FsRuiC6JL2jbIpdMB8sWalCPkUlOELuUd0eX9e-vdCrk-2nLm3_C4ztly1qCMDod2e0RsfsNP9oWKiyvpzAYQm4-cygGmurg_VwGsOwNiMwTt_HNoUqwQK2Lzx639cW9fmREV_1TKJHv5bl--UYb51w-MSZMne_xx3rsiJOJ4v4SdSaGp_9PJ3wAAAP__swGU8Q)

| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkbuunDAQhp_GdCDfsKGgWIUgpdjoKE1Ky9gDx5EvyDaJ9u0jlN2t085882l-_T_v6q6dd3H_rgNMOahcVNRKG9dm8G536SyKYspaLFoyKtbYSYxUDqSBiYhBUkoGzpvPyRhiuBSMSEJkD5vFfJRaDxasZLgfGzddHizISAkZ2dD162b7lXHB5TAyMyCOMxzn6p3RMehfKbv66CLUxk-ftR4FsRuiC6JL2jbIpdMB8sWalCPkUlOELuUd0eX9e-vdCrk-2nLm3_C4ztly1qCMDod2e0RsfsNP9oWKiyvpzAYQm4-cygGmurg_VwGsOwNiMwTt_HNoUqwQK2Lzx639cW9fmREV_1TKJHv5bl--UYb51w-MSZMne_xx3rsiJOJ4v4SdSaGp_9PJ3wAAAP__swGU8Q) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkbuunDAQhp_GdCDfsKGgWIUgpdjoKE1Ky9gDx5EvyDaJ9u0jlN2t085882l-_T_v6q6dd3H_rgNMOahcVNRKG9dm8G536SyKYspaLFoyKtbYSYxUDqSBiYhBUkoGzpvPyRhiuBSMSEJkD5vFfJRaDxasZLgfGzddHizISAkZ2dD162b7lXHB5TAyMyCOMxzn6p3RMehfKbv66CLUxk-ftR4FsRuiC6JL2jbIpdMB8sWalCPkUlOELuUd0eX9e-vdCrk-2nLm3_C4ztly1qCMDod2e0RsfsNP9oWKiyvpzAYQm4-cygGmurg_VwGsOwNiMwTt_HNoUqwQK2Lzx639cW9fmREV_1TKJHv5bl--UYb51w-MSZMne_xx3rsiJOJ4v4SdSaGp_9PJ3wAAAP__swGU8Q)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkbuunDAQhp_GdCDfsKGgWIUgpdjoKE1Ky9gDx5EvyDaJ9u0jlN2t085882l-_T_v6q6dd3H_rgNMOahcVNRKG9dm8G536SyKYspaLFoyKtbYSYxUDqSBiYhBUkoGzpvPyRhiuBSMSEJkD5vFfJRaDxasZLgfGzddHizISAkZ2dD162b7lXHB5TAyMyCOMxzn6p3RMehfKbv66CLUxk-ftR4FsRuiC6JL2jbIpdMB8sWalCPkUlOELuUd0eX9e-vdCrk-2nLm3_C4ztly1qCMDod2e0RsfsNP9oWKiyvpzAYQm4-cygGmurg_VwGsOwNiMwTt_HNoUqwQK2Lzx639cW9fmREV_1TKJHv5bl--UYb51w-MSZMne_xx3rsiJOJ4v4SdSaGp_9PJ3wAAAP__swGU8Q)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

On this day 157 years ago, word of slavery’s abolition in the United States reached Galveston, Texas, and a tradition started. Today we call this celebration Juneteenth.

**But we must remember that our nation continues to struggle with basic rights and opportunity for Black Americans.** We’re still battling the shameful legacies of slavery, Jim Crow, housing segregation, voter suppression, the wealth gap, life expectancy and institutional racism.

This is a pivotal moment in our nation’s history, and we must take action. Let’s take that movement and build an America whose laws reflect the undeniable truth that Black Lives Matter.

[Will you join us in honoring Juneteenth today by making a donation of $10 or more before midnight? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3ctS5hNB79sJKSCS3Rqjjb3Ky0eZf-PAfzygCPNdRzUHox6hdB7UEi35YBwdxbGFoqyyAg0gGa5QkgmT1gfHU70NffH-2dXzu_twKYtS8CSPWZ3M8hwrkTMuhCTSkZei-9QlAXSrxm40Sz88b6aYbOw3tNJ3lI4v1RbePnZ8uqCv74ua3-W4-ie_MBy3RT40xaJ5F0bNX3Un_EKERUYaAimBiZaTmH2aQL3Ye1yFp1DYKRK8oIOrol4RiXOdrWGiFyzj7eo8d4XSq3xrkutIZZOnOvS2T7NT2LiSI_MgqOcL9-2eqK-Cxjfc7RRxUe1bMG8dBSTZZ4ePFPEYFyN4XLXQo2sENq0r33dDXXzyuUa7KbyY2pJovqRWxfGF_zZJ0kT4-U-hIg2EIPO-965KXVoNm-IicYLhXEHfRRHk_LS7TGQatPFf-eE4UWrf_g5GTPcrwtz36mRjn9au_GiD-84g/3x6/6CXHIaT1QpyvPBY4HCCnpQ/h2/XyvCY40XhUyMDtlwivhtN9S2Gca6Sr3qiUON9-tq1N8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

For over six years, we’ve been fighting day in and day out to **Build Black Political Power** and create a truly representative democracy — one that works for _all_ Americans — **and we hope you’ll agree with us when we say that this fight is more important than ever in 2023.**

We know that our efforts make a difference. In 2022, we:
* **Invested over one million dollars into our endorsed candidates**
* **Contacted 3.1 million low-propensity Black voters directly** through our phone banking and text banking efforts and encouraged them to turn out to the polls
* **Supported 187 candidates on the Nov. 8th ballot** , 107 of whom won their races
* **Powered 16 History-Makers to victory** , including the first Black governor of Maryland and the first Black female mayor of Los Angeles

But here’s the thing: **_Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you, Peter._**

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, On this day 157 years ago, word of slavery’s abolition in the United States reached Galveston, Texas, and a tradition started. Today we call this celebration Juneteenth. But we must remember that our nation continues to struggle with basic rights and opportunity for Black Americans. We’re still battling the shameful legacies of slavery, Jim Crow, housing segregation, voter suppression, the wealth gap, life expectancy and institutional racism. This is a pivotal moment in our nation’s history, and we must take action. Let’s take that movement and build an America whose laws reflect the undeniable truth that Black Lives Matter. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | For over six years, we’ve been fighting day in and day out to Build Black Political Power and create a truly representative democracy — one that works for all Americans — and we hope you’ll agree with us when we say that this fight is more important than ever in 2023. We know that our efforts make a difference. In 2022, we: Invested over one million dollars into our endorsed candidates Contacted 3.1 million low-propensity Black voters directly through our phone banking and text banking efforts and encouraged them to turn out to the polls Supported 187 candidates on the Nov. 8th ballot , 107 of whom won their races Powered 16 History-Makers to victory , including the first Black governor of Maryland and the first Black female mayor of Los Angeles But here’s the thing: Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you, Peter. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, Quentin James The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . name: Rick Larsen
subject: Celebrating diversity
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Juneteenth symbolizes liberation, resilience, and the ongoing pursuit of equality and struggle for civil rights in the United States.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65081225/412246981/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjRlZjJkYS1lODBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KEFT1pjwRRSBubRsWirXrDOoFtDGrgGdCMdLsP5fkTM=&emci=21e22f2a-dc0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=df4ef2da-e80e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Today is the federally recognized Juneteenth holiday. June 19th marks the moment when enslaved people in Texas finally received word of the Emancipation Proclamation — more than two years after it had been signed by President Lincoln. **Now, Juneteenth symbolizes liberation, resilience, and the ongoing pursuit of equality and struggle for civil rights in the United States. The observance of Juneteenth has rightfully gained increased prominence in recent years.** In communities across the country, you can participate in events celebrating Black heritage, culture, achievements, and joy. But most importantly, the day provides a reminder to reflect on the progress this country has made, while also acknowledging the ongoing work required to fortify equality and justice through the eradication of systemic racism. To honor Juneteenth, join me in broadening your understanding of the history of this holiday and its impacts on our culture and society. It is going to take a conscious effort by all of us to ensure we are taking steps toward meaningful progress to an inclusive society. _Rick_ |
---|---|---

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: What today means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I hope you will join me in recommitting to the fight for equality. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65081366/412247850/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzJkYjJhMC1lYzBlLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJWpk3JXWFb_Y980AM8vv9pEw7V6Fk2I-jSa7Eaj7n4=&emci=319c9eda-800c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=232db2a0-ec0e-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
**Happy Juneteenth, Peter!**

Today we celebrate the day the last enslaved Black people of Galveston, Texas learned they were free on June 19, 1865.

But while Juneteenth has come to symbolize the liberation of those enslaved, it reminds us that there is still much more we must do to realize the promise of a country where people are truly equal.

**Today, we celebrate Juneteenth while understanding it isn't a declaration of victory. It's a step forward in the fight for progress.**

The legacy of slavery still exists today. It’s up to us––all of us, working together––to continue making progress on racial equality.

As we celebrate Juneteenth today and commemorate the end of a dark period in our nation's history, I hope you will join me in recommitting to the fight for equality.

Thanks,

Kim
| Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress

name: Tamie Wilson Polling Team
subject: Reflecting on Juneteenth and Continuing the Fight for Equality
body:
Today, we come together to honor and celebrate the historic milestone that represents the emancipation of African-Americans from slavery. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65081786/412249403/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q4NmU3MDMtZWUwZS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ck9Z8cc84fyCPMd0ju5dZzJ5EX_Lff9laQ09V5_BQio=)

| | Dear Friend, Happy Juneteenth! 🎊🎉 Today, we come together to honor and celebrate the historic milestone that represents the emancipation of African-Americans from slavery. On this day of reflection, I am filled with gratitude for the progress we have made, but fired up with determination to continue the fight for true equality, so everyone can live their American dream.
---
[**Donate**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65081787/412249404/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q4NmU3MDMtZWUwZS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ck9Z8cc84fyCPMd0ju5dZzJ5EX_Lff9laQ09V5_BQio=)
---
On this very day, June 19th, in the year 1865, Union General Gordon Granger arrived in Galveston, Texas, and issued General Order No. 3, proclaiming the freedom of enslaved African Americans in the state. It serves as a powerful reminder of the enduring spirit and determination of our ancestors, who fought for their freedom and the freedom of future generations. As we commemorate Juneteenth, I cannot help but be reminded of the significance of this day in my own journey. My grandfather, a true American hero, fought against fascism in World War II, risking his life for a nation that promised freedom and equality for all. Yet today, it seems people are trying to return our country to the days of Jim Crow segregation and discrimination. So like those before me, I have joined the fight for civil rights, working tirelessly to usher in a new era of equality and justice within the United States. The sacrifices, struggles, and triumphs of my grandfather have shaped who I am today. His unwavering dedication to the principles of freedom and equality have instilled in me a deep sense of purpose and an unyielding commitment to creating a more just society. As a biracial woman, mother, and entrepreneur, I have experienced firsthand the systemic challenges and discrimination that still run rampant in Ohio and across America. These experiences have hardened my resolve to break down barriers and fight for a more equitable America for all. Growing up, I witnessed the challenges faced by my community firsthand. I saw how limited access to quality education, affordable healthcare, and economic opportunities held us back. These disparities continue to persist, stifling the progress and potential of countless individuals. It is time for us to rise against these injustices and demand better. By running for Congress, I am determined to be a voice for the voiceless and an advocate for policies that uplift our communities, dismantle systemic racism, and create a brighter future for all children. My opponent Jim Jordan (R-OH), a racist good ‘ol boy, is diametrically opposed to all of this. He went rabid during the 2020 Black Lives Matter movement calling for a crackdown on the protestors and blaming the legitimate sentiments of black protestors on ‘Antifa’. And when DC Mayor Muriel Bowser called for a renewed effort to rename buildings named after slave owners, Confederates, and other leaders who have worked to oppress African-Americans throughout history, he stated that he was ““shocked and appalled” that that the city “would seek to erase the legacy of our nation’s founders and trivialize their contributions to the American experiment.” [I cannot take on Jim Jordan alone. I need your support to bring about the change we so desperately need. Together, we can challenge the vestiges of racism that remain entrenched in this otherwise incredible country. Can you make a donation of whatever you can spare to help us reach voters, raise awareness about the issues that matter most to my constituents, and continue to combat the anti-black racism that Congressman Jim Jordan continues to promote? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65081788/412249405/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q4NmU3MDMtZWUwZS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ck9Z8cc84fyCPMd0ju5dZzJ5EX_Lff9laQ09V5_BQio=)

name: Election Alert via Courier Newsroom
subject: Tomorrow’s primary will have a massive impact on everything from abortion rights to voting rights.
body:
Will you help us mobilize voters and spread accurate information about candidates and ballot initiatives before the polls officially open?
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1125%2E120351%2EXSLToe)
Peter —
**We’re just one day out from some of the most important state and local elections of 2023: the Virginia primaries.** These races will have a massive impact on everything from abortion rights to voting rights.
[**We’ll explain more about the consequences of this state primary in just a moment, but if you’re short on time: will you chip in $5 to help us mobilize voters and spread accurate information about candidates and ballot initiatives before they head to the polls?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230619?refcode=em20230619&refcode2=1125_120351_XSLToe&akid=1125%2E120351%2EXSLToe)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230619?refcode=em20230619&refcode2=1125_120351_XSLToe&akid=1125%2E120351%2EXSLToe)**
**Many Virginia communities don’t have access to trustworthy local news coverage.** That leaves many voters either unaware that there’s a primary election happening or without trustworthy coverage to help them make an informed decision at the ballot box.
**That’s where Courier Newsroom comes in.**
Our dedicated reporters at our local, Virginia-based newsroom, _Dogwood_ , are working tirelessly to remedy this information gap by publishing eye-catching, straightforward news pieces.
Their stories range from explainers outlining what’s at stake in this important election to articles introducing people to the candidates vying for their support:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230619?refcode=em20230619&refcode2=1125_120351_XSLToe&akid=1125%2E120351%2EXSLToe)
**With less than 24 hours until the polls open** , our reporters are racing to get this information in front of Virginians. Still, the work of our _Dogwood_ team — the articles and amplified posts — is only possible with support from people like you. [**
**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230619?refcode=em20230619&refcode2=1125_120351_XSLToe&akid=1125%2E120351%2EXSLToe)
[**Will you chip in $5 now to power their work and help us spread accurate, factual information to as many voters as possible?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230619?refcode=em20230619&refcode2=1125_120351_XSLToe&akid=1125%2E120351%2EXSLToe)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230619?refcode=em20230619&refcode2=1125_120351_XSLToe&akid=1125%2E120351%2EXSLToe)**
Thanks for your support,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1125_120351_XSLToe&akid=1125%2E120351%2EXSLToe)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1125%2E120351%2EXSLToe)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37a2db0aa2e244fc881351046b6e5b6a&_e=_kDCwo2uRdx0er6MfLysteaSDUjx5CFYRbtDGIzsJFUfu4OFrIWUywdGvytaTNhL4jMXv22FlKDiz78wBviqWgXPWMW_g_qqFLvCmv1D34QNawQO5GF51qHRoabPPU7BYINvheHzXPUs0X6km1ZZKGGgp6p5sZmX7sioXNyoAKDyP0gaQjz6nu0acq_t-lhAimKtwr2yEr1NwT_yGfxV29xr-E5Io_pxjygj6D_gbnk_aKzP_B0km7LLmIIcCjaB) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37a2db0aa2e244fc881351046b6e5b6a&_e=_kDCwo2uRdx0er6MfLysteaSDUjx5CFYRbtDGIzsJFUfu4OFrIWUywdGvytaTNhL4jMXv22FlKDiz78wBviqWgXPWMW_g_qqFLvCmv1D34TMmVSILU9ef-eKgOrs6Pdfy-NdpYQeFIUi8hWFVmXEea5PJmoSBjbq1PlUcoyhfVktXwgfPMxxuDim3OIiR7qxqW3OjwViM5tRxS5B8En2yo6Q3M01Z35TK-nHK1OGLdYQkxP9eGW7Z_tPAIT0VsLx) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37a2db0aa2e244fc881351046b6e5b6a&_e=_kDCwo2uRdx0er6MfLysteaSDUjx5CFYRbtDGIzsJFUfu4OFrIWUywdGvytaTNhL4jMXv22FlKDiz78wBviqWgXPWMW_g_qqFLvCmv1D34Tczr0mMZZo_Bl5cGtYWwtrubNgLO0M-VADyIIB7ipOpZC6h8r7H-ZSIrlKJ8yInWLINB-8v0hiNNWVmDLeD-4K5NS0clPsGQnCOEpC3zHC7BDHWd3uMcDxIzHYGicQmHoxGAlbpAJEER9b6y-ewgSv) Regards, Maria Bonaventura

Friend! You've got to trust me here - If you were to ever donate off of a fundraising email, **_it should be this one, you need to see this ..._** When we took back the House I was excited for what was to come - but right now things are different. **I 'm so anxious, I had to get this out IMMEDIATELY.**

As the top law-enforcement official in Arizona’s third largest county and candidate for U.S. Senate, **I believe it’s my responsibility to show the Left that most gun owners are responsible, law-abiding citizens.**

Responsible gun owners pay our taxes on time.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. Friend,
**Our Second Amendment rights are NOT up for negotiation.**
If you agree, I want to invite you to join us at Firearms Policy Coalition...the 2A group that’s **fighting for gun owners in our courts**...and REFUSING to play nice with people who hate us.
**We’re growing fast and we’re fighting back hard**...but we need your muscle behind us to win this fight for good, Friend.
Are you ready? **[Join the real fight to DEFEND the Second Amendment >>](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMjzGP3CAQhX_NuDsLBgPrwkWS1aZKE-mutVgY1ihgCMY6-d9H3qyitN97mm-eSSUGf0ygvwLiEtwGiCC-AOLexId5f_9Rjzf-8_fbd_mBjzPEb4DYjkL_mq8jPSUT4kn1tXPTgIZ729HE1UUjV1rLbpku4s786KWVfFCKcXFninEkN94HMXjfhQkZCqb4iIKPyHsptZXaWbw48iPzMLCnqPeVqC1h_UXVmRCP3ubUxWlprWzPx26At43sXqn3oZKpaSs5Bnv0uT4AbznNLq-zL3a-m43mv2ImQdz2luYt79USiOtnXluJ5liDJUB1Zolc2BOIa04vYk0qJjzW_1mjenZ8c4DKpLyvDcQVZVcnVz5DjGFTGgb2eO6xOf0JAAD__87vfTo)** | | | | [DEFEND GUN RIGHTS](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMjzGP3CAQhX_NuDsLBgPrwkWS1aZKE-mutVgY1ihgCMY6-d9H3qyitN97mm-eSSUGf0ygvwLiEtwGiCC-AOLexId5f_9Rjzf-8_fbd_mBjzPEb4DYjkL_mq8jPSUT4kn1tXPTgIZ729HE1UUjV1rLbpku4s786KWVfFCKcXFninEkN94HMXjfhQkZCqb4iIKPyHsptZXaWbw48iPzMLCnqPeVqC1h_UXVmRCP3ubUxWlprWzPx26At43sXqn3oZKpaSs5Bnv0uT4AbznNLq-zL3a-m43mv2ImQdz2luYt79USiOtnXluJ5liDJUB1Zolc2BOIa04vYk0qJjzW_1mjenZ8c4DKpLyvDcQVZVcnVz5DjGFTGgb2eO6xOf0JAAD__87vfTo)
---
We have a little saying here at FPC, and I think you’re going to like it:**

“Fuck you. **No.** ”

Because that’s the _only_ thing you can say to anti-gun radicals who hate us, hate our families, and hate our rights.

For far too long, **gun owners have been stabbed in the back with “compromises”** that eroded our basic right to own a firearm.

Unlike some, **FPC knows these gun grabbers will _never_ be appeased**...because the only thing they care about is disarming you and your family.

Anti-gun politicians can kick and scream all they want. We don’t care about them.

**We’re fighting for our gun rights on the _only_ playing field that matters: America’s court system.**

**FPC has built the greatest pro-2A legal team ever to exist**...and we’re not just fighting the “big” fights, but fighting every single attempt to erode the Second Amendment.

Because we know **if we give anti-gun crazies _even one inch_ , they’ll take a mile.**

Right now, FPC is leading the charge on a major lawsuit to stop Biden’s ATF from banning pistol braces. We’ve already scored a major early success: a judge decided that FPC members are covered by an injunction.

But look: **waging an all-out war against the Federal Government and deep-pocketed gun grabbers is expensive, exhausting, and all-consuming.**

We do NOT yet have the resources to continue fighting wherever we need to go.

**[That’s why I hope you’ll pitch in just a few bucks to join FPC...and make sure that the best 2A legal team in America has everything we need to defend our rights in court.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMjzGP3CAQhX_NuDsLBgPrwkWS1aZKE-mutVgY1ihgCMY6-d9H3qyitN97mm-eSSUGf0ygvwLiEtwGiCC-AOLexId5f_9Rjzf-8_fbd_mBjzPEb4DYjkL_mq8jPSUT4kn1tXPTgIZ729HE1UUjV1rLbpku4s786KWVfFCKcXFninEkN94HMXjfhQkZCqb4iIKPyHsptZXaWbw48iPzMLCnqPeVqC1h_UXVmRCP3ubUxWlprWzPx26At43sXqn3oZKpaSs5Bnv0uT4AbznNLq-zL3a-m43mv2ImQdz2luYt79USiOtnXluJ5liDJUB1Zolc2BOIa04vYk0qJjzW_1mjenZ8c4DKpLyvDcQVZVcnVz5DjGFTGgb2eO6xOf0JAAD__87vfTo)**

Don’t give them one inch, Friend. **Join me in saying, “Fuck you. NO!” to the radicals who want to strip you and your family of your basic rights.**

**[Join FPC with a contribution of any amount, big or small, to help us hold the line and win these battles for the Second Amendment.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMjzGP3CAQhX_NuDsLBgPrwkWS1aZKE-mutVgY1ihgCMY6-d9H3qyitN97mm-eSSUGf0ygvwLiEtwGiCC-AOLexId5f_9Rjzf-8_fbd_mBjzPEb4DYjkL_mq8jPSUT4kn1tXPTgIZ729HE1UUjV1rLbpku4s786KWVfFCKcXFninEkN94HMXjfhQkZCqb4iIKPyHsptZXaWbw48iPzMLCnqPeVqC1h_UXVmRCP3ubUxWlprWzPx26At43sXqn3oZKpaSs5Bnv0uT4AbznNLq-zL3a-m43mv2ImQdz2luYt79USiOtnXluJ5liDJUB1Zolc2BOIa04vYk0qJjzW_1mjenZ8c4DKpLyvDcQVZVcnVz5DjGFTGgb2eO6xOf0JAAD__87vfTo)**
| | | [JOIN FPC](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMjzGP3CAQhX_NuDsLBgPrwkWS1aZKE-mutVgY1ihgCMY6-d9H3qyitN97mm-eSSUGf0ygvwLiEtwGiCC-AOLexId5f_9Rjzf-8_fbd_mBjzPEb4DYjkL_mq8jPSUT4kn1tXPTgIZ729HE1UUjV1rLbpku4s786KWVfFCKcXFninEkN94HMXjfhQkZCqb4iIKPyHsptZXaWbw48iPzMLCnqPeVqC1h_UXVmRCP3ubUxWlprWzPx26At43sXqn3oZKpaSs5Bnv0uT4AbznNLq-zL3a-m43mv2ImQdz2luYt79USiOtnXluJ5liDJUB1Zolc2BOIa04vYk0qJjzW_1mjenZ8c4DKpLyvDcQVZVcnVz5DjGFTGgb2eO6xOf0JAAD__87vfTo)

Thanks!**

Richard Thomson

Fellow American,

You have been identified by Republican leaders as someone we must reach out to regarding our new [**American Patriot Census.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ddf2821b01f444a791b83d35b5d17e3f&_e=9S3gCA11v3G4xiIwuEcysgJn84I9Uco2-sLUXrlTaDAGx1Fs4no_ysbEDVs10Bwy0LYmWtvww5rLiz-BXPvCcY-FgYieQN7zf83L2GjkNyekCPe6GQtojZRdojSyNl2PJj8Zyo36FUviTP5x2QC-kJJDD8QzIsN41au2Zi4vA5nOLiTp77C2qdoaLc8-ceUlEVEvmNfT1c_CcQv5xBBLLhyod6zjVlxsuijWSgfHG4JVF3WlcK1uWoWGWXBpQXniHk7fdv3fbm3R6_EUG8WmqkwQBadWYHpZEIQFCKVe6cJBI0eH3G3NNlMNTTzcKWJKWwcthShPEGzB9ltat67MYrN8bOy9W4_wCrHHELziHXsj77VMpM531W8ZtyWxSUcY-3riJvWjvZX_Z-o30K-M8csSy60HV_IN1DW7oaSrRKuLx9hmw6vZ3MpPQsRk4a2M_pvXE6Q-SqXArTFpKdrzsg%3D%3D)

The American Patriot Census plays a crucial role in shaping our strategic plan for the upcoming 2024 elections. Your input is of utmost importance and time is of the essence. The Democrats already have the advantage in their planning efforts.

To ensure that your voice is heard - we kindly request that you participate in the [**American Patriot Census**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ddf2821b01f444a791b83d35b5d17e3f&_e=9S3gCA11v3G4xiIwuEcysgJn84I9Uco2-sLUXrlTaDAGx1Fs4no_ysbEDVs10Bwy0LYmWtvww5rLiz-BXPvCcY-FgYieQN7zf83L2GjkNyekCPe6GQtojZRdojSyNl2PJj8Zyo36FUviTP5x2QC-kJJDD8QzIsN41au2Zi4vA5nOLiTp77C2qdoaLc8-ceUlEVEvmNfT1c_CcQv5xBBLLhyod6zjVlxsuijWSgfHG4JVF3WlcK1uWoWGWXBpQXniHk7fdv3fbm3R6_EUG8WmqkwQBadWYHpZEIQFCKVe6cJBI0eH3G3NNlMNTTzcKWJKwU7wVm0ows9sA6BJXjRNZ6US8HFcuvZ70ZFDVVOzKG2vpMvM9kShMx1PQWsqRc40MQOKJr80_NgXTQ43svlkS5Rb8eVk43IfZiYF-cGxfjhMPWR0s87rfQSmo01Ge995-7k2VvQEpl1LdIAc91Pd7w%3D%3D) immediately. Your response will contribute to building our platform for 2024 and beyond.

Please click on the following link to access the census: [**https://secure.winred.com/rnc/american-patriot-census**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ddf2821b01f444a791b83d35b5d17e3f&_e=9S3gCA11v3G4xiIwuEcysgJn84I9Uco2-sLUXrlTaDAGx1Fs4no_ysbEDVs10Bwy0LYmWtvww5rLiz-BXPvCcY-FgYieQN7zf83L2GjkNyekCPe6GQtojZRdojSyNl2PJj8Zyo36FUviTP5x2QC-kJJDD8QzIsN41au2Zi4vA5nOLiTp77C2qdoaLc8-ceUlEVEvmNfT1c_CcQv5xBBLLhyod6zjVlxsuijWSgfHG4JVF3WlcK1uWoWGWXBpQXniHk7fdv3fbm3R6_EUG8WmqkwQBadWYHpZEIQFCKVe6cJBI0eH3G3NNlMNTTzcKWJKUjgqE75IgOXPo69o_eCxM4W7LiqNLVpv5jYFb9qJxb9-rW4z9MUm7m2XTlPCDewMYusTDkHQTAQFm6muJdgbzDCGgrJeSkFk60nZRA7HMqZ3BcExdHH0Ctw-SzKg7Yygq1ZO6jTNzWUJB3kB-eRHpg%3D%3D)

Please understand the urgency of this matter, and promptly return your[**American Patriot Census.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ddf2821b01f444a791b83d35b5d17e3f&_e=9S3gCA11v3G4xiIwuEcysgJn84I9Uco2-sLUXrlTaDAGx1Fs4no_ysbEDVs10Bwy0LYmWtvww5rLiz-BXPvCcY-FgYieQN7zf83L2GjkNyekCPe6GQtojZRdojSyNl2PJj8Zyo36FUviTP5x2QC-kJJDD8QzIsN41au2Zi4vA5nOLiTp77C2qdoaLc8-ceUlEVEvmNfT1c_CcQv5xBBLLhyod6zjVlxsuijWSgfHG4JVF3WlcK1uWoWGWXBpQXniHk7fdv3fbm3R6_EUG8WmqkwQBadWYHpZEIQFCKVe6cJBI0eH3G3NNlMNTTzcKWJKRaNf7MpxC2m0jJbkNb1abIGE9wJl226GHT2izft9YCX9ytNTeodO6N_HUlJuCN7Rt24yGHC79GAyUYZnnQk2qp4i1eGs2embasH1yVlcmamWObeSmogJ6io6liePtN4haGBeNcH_tgKXszRX8hp8ag%3D%3D) The provided link will expire in one hour, so we urge you to take the survey as soon as possible.

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party.
